`DataProvider.tsx`:

```tsx
   1 | 
   2 | import { and, asc, count, desc, eq, ilike, inArray, or } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | import type { PgColumn, PgTable } from "drizzle-orm/pg-core";
   4 | import type {
   5 |   CreateParams,
   6 |   DataProvider,
   7 |   DeleteParams,
   8 |   GetListParams,
   9 |   GetManyReferenceParams,
  10 |   GetOneParams,
  11 |   RaRecord,
  12 |   UpdateParams
  13 | } from "ra-core";
  14 | 
  15 | import { db } from "./client";
  16 | import type { DbAppointment, DbDoctor, DbGrowthRecord, DbImmunization, DbPatient } from "./schema";
  17 | // Schema imports from your existing codebase
  18 | import { appointment, doctor, growthRecord, immunization, patient } from "./schema";
  19 | 
  20 | type ResourceHandlers = {
  21 | 	[key: string]: {
  22 | 		table: PgTable;
  23 | 		searchFields?: string[];
  24 | 		sortFields?: Record<string, PgColumn>;
  25 | 		transformForCreate?: (data: Record<string, unknown>) => Record<string, unknown>;
  26 | 		transformForUpdate?: (data: Record<string, unknown>) => Record<string, unknown>;
  27 | 		// biome-ignore lint/suspicious/noExplicitAny: Generic records from Drizzle need loose typing here
  28 | 		transformForGet?: (record: any) => Record<string, unknown>;
  29 | 		withRelations?: Record<string, unknown>;
  30 | 	};
  31 | };
  32 | 
  33 | const resourceConfig: ResourceHandlers = {
  34 | 	patients: {
  35 | 		table: patient,
  36 | 		searchFields: ["firstName", "lastName", "email", "mrn"],
  37 | 		sortFields: {
  38 | 			id: patient.id,
  39 | 			firstName: patient.firstName,
  40 | 			lastName: patient.lastName,
  41 | 			dateOfBirth: patient.dateOfBirth,
  42 | 			createdAt: patient.createdAt
  43 | 		},
  44 | 		transformForGet: (record: DbPatient) => ({
  45 | 			...record,
  46 | 			fullName: `${record.firstName} ${record.lastName}`
  47 | 		}),
  48 | 		withRelations: {
  49 | 			clinic: true,
  50 | 			user: true
  51 | 		}
  52 | 	},
  53 | 	doctors: {
  54 | 		table: doctor,
  55 | 		searchFields: ["name", "specialty", "email"],
  56 | 		sortFields: {
  57 | 			id: doctor.id,
  58 | 			name: doctor.name,
  59 | 			specialty: doctor.specialty,
  60 | 			rating: doctor.rating
  61 | 		},
  62 | 		transformForGet: (record: DbDoctor) => ({
  63 | 			...record
  64 | 		})
  65 | 	},
  66 | 	appointments: {
  67 | 		table: appointment,
  68 | 		searchFields: ["type", "status"],
  69 | 		sortFields: {
  70 | 			id: appointment.id,
  71 | 			appointmentDate: appointment.appointmentDate,
  72 | 			status: appointment.status
  73 | 		},
  74 | 		withRelations: {
  75 | 			patient: true,
  76 | 			doctor: true
  77 | 		},
  78 | 		transformForGet: (record: DbAppointment & { patient?: DbPatient; doctor?: DbDoctor }) => ({
  79 | 			...record,
  80 | 			patientName: record.patient ? `${record.patient.firstName} ${record.patient.lastName}` : null,
  81 | 			doctorName: record.doctor?.name
  82 | 		})
  83 | 	},
  84 | 	immunizations: {
  85 | 		table: immunization,
  86 | 		searchFields: ["vaccine", "dose"],
  87 | 		sortFields: {
  88 | 			id: immunization.id,
  89 | 			vaccine: immunization.vaccine,
  90 | 			date: immunization.date
  91 | 		},
  92 | 		withRelations: {
  93 | 			patient: true
  94 | 		},
  95 | 		transformForGet: (record: DbImmunization & { patient?: DbPatient }) => ({
  96 | 			...record,
  97 | 			patientName: record.patient ? `${record.patient.firstName} ${record.patient.lastName}` : null
  98 | 		})
  99 | 	},
 100 | 	growthRecords: {
 101 | 		table: growthRecord,
 102 | 		searchFields: [],
 103 | 		sortFields: {
 104 | 			id: growthRecord.id,
 105 | 			date: growthRecord.date,
 106 | 			weight: growthRecord.weight,
 107 | 			height: growthRecord.height
 108 | 		},
 109 | 		withRelations: {
 110 | 			patient: true
 111 | 		},
 112 | 		transformForGet: (record: DbGrowthRecord & { patient?: DbPatient }) => ({
 113 | 			...record,
 114 | 			patientName: record.patient ? `${record.patient.firstName} ${record.patient.lastName}` : null
 115 | 		})
 116 | 	}
 117 | };
 118 | 
 119 | export const drizzleDataProvider: DataProvider = {
 120 | 	async getList<RecordType extends RaRecord = RaRecord>(resource: string, params: GetListParams) {
 121 | 		const config = resourceConfig[resource];
 122 | 		if (!config) throw new Error(`Unknown resource: ${resource}`);
 123 | 
 124 | 		const { pagination, sort, filter } = params;
 125 | 		const { page = 1, perPage = 10 } = pagination || {};
 126 | 		const offset = (page - 1) * perPage;
 127 | 
 128 | 		let query = db.select().from(config.table).$dynamic();
 129 | 
 130 | 		// Apply search/filter conditions
 131 | 		const conditions = [];
 132 | 		if (filter?.q && config.searchFields) {
 133 | 			const searchConditions = config.searchFields.map(field => {
 134 | 				const column = (config.table as unknown as Record<string, PgColumn>)[field];
 135 | 				if (!column) throw new Error(`Column ${field} not found on table for resource ${resource}`);
 136 | 				return ilike(column, `%${filter.q}%`);
 137 | 			}
 138 | 			);
 139 | 			conditions.push(or(...searchConditions));
 140 | 		}
 141 | 
 142 | 		// Apply other filters
 143 | 		if (filter) {
 144 | 			Object.entries(filter).forEach(([key, value]) => {
 145 | 				if (key !== "q" && value !== undefined && value !== null && value !== "") {
 146 | 					const column = (config.table as unknown as Record<string, PgColumn>)[key];
 147 | 					if (column) {
 148 | 						conditions.push(eq(column, value));
 149 | 					}
 150 | 				}
 151 | 			});
 152 | 		}
 153 | 
 154 | 		if (conditions.length > 0) {
 155 | 			query = query.where(and(...conditions));
 156 | 		}
 157 | 
 158 | 		// Apply sorting
 159 | 		if (sort?.field && config.sortFields?.[sort.field]) {
 160 | 			const sortField = config.sortFields[sort.field];
 161 | 			query = query.orderBy(sort.order === "ASC" ? asc(sortField as PgColumn) : desc(sortField as PgColumn));
 162 | 		} else {
 163 | 			const table = config.table as unknown as Record<string, PgColumn>;
 164 | 			if (table.createdAt) {
 165 | 				query = query.orderBy(desc(table.createdAt));
 166 | 			}
 167 | 		}
 168 | 
 169 | 		// Apply pagination
 170 | 		query = query.limit(perPage).offset(offset);
 171 | 
 172 | 		// Execute query
 173 | 		const data = await query;
 174 | 
 175 | 		// Fetch total count
 176 | 		let countQuery = db.select({ count: count() }).from(config.table).$dynamic();
 177 | 		if (conditions.length > 0) {
 178 | 			countQuery = countQuery.where(and(...conditions));
 179 | 		}
 180 | 		const totalResult = await countQuery;
 181 | 		const total = Number(totalResult[0]?.count || 0);
 182 | 
 183 | 		// Transform data if needed
 184 | 		const transformedData = config.transformForGet
 185 | 			? data.map(config.transformForGet)
 186 | 			: data;
 187 | 
 188 | 		return { data: transformedData as RecordType[], total };
 189 | 	},
 190 | 
 191 | 	async getOne<RecordType extends RaRecord = RaRecord>(resource: string, params: GetOneParams) {
 192 | 		const config = resourceConfig[resource];
 193 | 		if (!config) throw new Error(`Unknown resource: ${resource}`);
 194 | 
 195 | 		const { id } = params;
 196 | 
 197 | 		const idColumn = (config.table as unknown as Record<string, PgColumn>).id;
 198 | 		if (!idColumn) {
 199 | 			throw new Error(`Primary key column 'id' not found for resource ${resource}`);
 200 | 		}
 201 | 
 202 | 		const query = db.select().from(config.table).where(eq(idColumn, id));
 203 | 
 204 | 		if (config.withRelations) {
 205 | 			// Handle relations - this is simplified, you'd need proper joins
 206 | 			// For now, we'll do separate queries or use Drizzle relations
 207 | 		}
 208 | 
 209 | 		const result = await query;
 210 | 		const record = result[0];
 211 | 
 212 | 		if (!record) {
 213 | 			throw new Error(`Record not found: ${id}`);
 214 | 		}
 215 | 
 216 | 		return {
 217 | 			data: (config.transformForGet ? config.transformForGet(record) : record) as RecordType
 218 | 		};
 219 | 	},
 220 | 
 221 | 	async create<RecordType extends RaRecord = RaRecord>(resource: string, params: CreateParams) {
 222 | 		const config = resourceConfig[resource];
 223 | 		if (!config) throw new Error(`Unknown resource: ${resource}`);
 224 | 
 225 | 		const { data } = params;
 226 | 
 227 | 		const createData = config.transformForCreate
 228 | 			? config.transformForCreate(data)
 229 | 			: { ...data, id: crypto.randomUUID(), createdAt: new Date(), updatedAt: new Date() };
 230 | 
 231 | 		const result = await db.insert(config.table).values(createData).returning();
 232 | 		const record = result[0];
 233 | 
 234 | 		return {
 235 | 			data: (config.transformForGet ? config.transformForGet(record) : record) as RecordType
 236 | 		};
 237 | 	},
 238 | 
 239 | 	async update<RecordType extends RaRecord = RaRecord>(resource: string, params: UpdateParams) {
 240 | 		const config = resourceConfig[resource];
 241 | 		if (!config) throw new Error(`Unknown resource: ${resource}`);
 242 | 
 243 | 		const { id, data } = params;
 244 | 
 245 | 		const updateData = config.transformForUpdate
 246 | 			? config.transformForUpdate(data)
 247 | 			: { ...data, updatedAt: new Date() };
 248 | 
 249 | 		const idColumn = (config.table as unknown as Record<string, PgColumn>).id;
 250 | 		if (!idColumn) {
 251 | 			throw new Error(`Primary key column 'id' not found for resource ${resource}`);
 252 | 		}
 253 | 
 254 | 		const result = await db.update(config.table).set(updateData).where(eq(idColumn, id)).returning();
 255 | 
 256 | 		const record = result[0];
 257 | 		if (!record) {
 258 | 			throw new Error(`Record not found: ${id}`);
 259 | 		}
 260 | 
 261 | 		return {
 262 | 			data: (config.transformForGet ? config.transformForGet(record) : record) as RecordType
 263 | 		};
 264 | 	},
 265 | 
 266 | 	async delete<RecordType extends RaRecord = RaRecord>(resource: string, params: DeleteParams) {
 267 | 		const config = resourceConfig[resource];
 268 | 		if (!config) throw new Error(`Unknown resource: ${resource}`);
 269 | 
 270 | 		const { id } = params;
 271 | 
 272 | 		const idColumn = (config.table as unknown as Record<string, PgColumn>).id;
 273 | 		if (!idColumn) {
 274 | 			throw new Error(`Primary key column 'id' not found for resource ${resource}`);
 275 | 		}
 276 | 
 277 | 		const result = await db.delete(config.table).where(eq(idColumn, id)).returning();
 278 | 
 279 | 		const record = result[0];
 280 | 		if (!record) {
 281 | 			throw new Error(`Record not found: ${id}`);
 282 | 		}
 283 | 
 284 | 		return {
 285 | 			data: (config.transformForGet ? config.transformForGet(record) : record) as RecordType
 286 | 		};
 287 | 	},
 288 | 
 289 | 	async deleteMany(resource, params) {
 290 | 		const config = resourceConfig[resource];
 291 | 		if (!config) throw new Error(`Unknown resource: ${resource}`);
 292 | 
 293 | 		const { ids } = params;
 294 | 		const idColumn = (config.table as unknown as Record<string, PgColumn>).id;
 295 | 		if (!idColumn) {
 296 | 			throw new Error(`Primary key column 'id' not found for resource ${resource}`);
 297 | 		}
 298 | 
 299 | 		const result = await db
 300 | 			.delete(config.table)
 301 | 			.where(inArray(idColumn, ids as string[]))
 302 | 			.returning();
 303 | 
 304 | 		// Cast to specify that we expect rows with an id property
 305 | 		return { data: (result as { id: string | number }[]).map(record => record.id) };
 306 | 	},
 307 | 
 308 | 	async getMany<RecordType extends RaRecord = RaRecord>(resource: string, params: { ids: (string | number)[] }) {
 309 | 		const config = resourceConfig[resource];
 310 | 		if (!config) throw new Error(`Unknown resource: ${resource}`);
 311 | 
 312 | 		const { ids } = params;
 313 | 		const idColumn = (config.table as unknown as Record<string, PgColumn>).id;
 314 | 		if (!idColumn) {
 315 | 			throw new Error(`Primary key column 'id' not found for resource ${resource}`);
 316 | 		}
 317 | 
 318 | 		const result = await db
 319 | 			.select()
 320 | 			.from(config.table)
 321 | 			.where(inArray(idColumn, ids as string[]));
 322 | 
 323 | 		const data = config.transformForGet ? result.map(config.transformForGet) : result;
 324 | 
 325 | 		return { data: data as RecordType[] };
 326 | 	},
 327 | 
 328 | 	async getManyReference<RecordType extends RaRecord = RaRecord>(resource: string, params: GetManyReferenceParams) {
 329 | 		// Prefix unused target and id with underscores to satisfy the linter
 330 | 		const { target: _target, id: _id, pagination, sort, filter } = params;
 331 | 
 332 | 		// Simplified implementation
 333 | 		return this.getList<RecordType>(resource, { pagination, sort, filter });
 334 | 	},
 335 | 
 336 | 	async updateMany(resource, params) {
 337 | 		const config = resourceConfig[resource];
 338 | 		if (!config) throw new Error(`Unknown resource: ${resource}`);
 339 | 
 340 | 		const { ids, data } = params;
 341 | 		const idColumn = (config.table as unknown as Record<string, PgColumn>).id;
 342 | 		if (!idColumn) {
 343 |       throw new Error(`Primary key column 'id' not found for resource ${resource}`);
 344 |     }
 345 | 
 346 | 		const results = [];
 347 | 		for (const id of ids) {
 348 | 			const result = await db
 349 | 				.update(config.table)
 350 | 				.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
 351 | 				.where(eq(idColumn, id as string | number))
 352 | 				.returning();
 353 | 
 354 | 			if (result[0]) {
 355 | 				results.push(result[0]);
 356 | 			}
 357 | 		}
 358 | 
 359 | 		return { data: results.map(r => (r as { id: string | number }).id) };
 360 | 	}
 361 | };

```

`actions/admin.action.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { z } from "zod";
   2 | 
   3 | import { adminRepo } from "../queries/admin.repo";
   4 | import { adminService } from "../services/admin.service";
   5 | import { safeDbQuery } from "../helper";
   6 | 
   7 | // Dashboard queries
   8 | export async function getAppointmentCountsByStatus(clinicId: string) {
   9 | 	return safeDbQuery(() => adminService.getAppointmentStats(clinicId));
  10 | }
  11 | 
  12 | export async function getMonthlyAppointmentData(clinicId: string) {
  13 | 	return safeDbQuery(() => adminService.getDashboardMonthlyStats(clinicId));
  14 | }
  15 | 
  16 | // Notification queries
  17 | const WelcomeNotificationSchema = z.object({
  18 | 	userId: z.string().uuid(),
  19 | 	clinicId: z.string(),
  20 | 	signupDate: z.date()
  21 | });
  22 | 
  23 | export async function createWelcomeNotification(userId: string, clinicId: string, signupDate: Date) {
  24 | 	const validated = WelcomeNotificationSchema.parse({ userId, clinicId, signupDate });
  25 | 	return safeDbQuery(() =>
  26 | 		adminService.prepareWelcomeNotification(validated.userId, validated.clinicId, validated.signupDate)
  27 | 	);
  28 | }
  29 | 
  30 | // User role query
  31 | export async function getUserRoleById(userId: string) {
  32 | 	return safeDbQuery(() => adminRepo.getUserRoleById(userId));
  33 | }

```

`actions/analytics.actions.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { z } from "zod";
   2 | 
   3 | import { pediatricRepo, pharmacyRepo } from "../queries";
   4 | import { analyticsRepo } from "../queries/analytics.repo";
   5 | import {
   6 |   analyticsService,
   7 |   type GrowthMetrics,
   8 |   type OverallMetrics,
   9 |   type TreatmentMetrics,
  10 |   type TrendData,
  11 |   type WellnessMetrics
  12 | } from "../services/analytics.service";
  13 | import { safeDbQuery } from "../helper";
  14 | 
  15 | const DateRangeSchema = z.object({
  16 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  17 | 	startDate: z.coerce.date(),
  18 | 	endDate: z.coerce.date(),
  19 | 	groupBy: z.enum(["day", "week", "month"]).default("month")
  20 | });
  21 | 
  22 | const MetricQuerySchema = z.object({
  23 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  24 | 	metric: z.enum(["appointments", "patients", "revenue", "immunizations", "prescriptions"]),
  25 | 	startDate: z.coerce.date(),
  26 | 	endDate: z.coerce.date()
  27 | });
  28 | 
  29 | const TrendQuerySchema = z.object({
  30 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  31 | 	period: z.enum(["week", "month", "quarter", "year", "6months"])
  32 | });
  33 | 
  34 | const PredictionQuerySchema = z.object({
  35 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  36 | 	metric: z.enum(["appointments", "patients", "revenue"]),
  37 | 	horizon: z.enum(["week", "month", "quarter"]).default("month")
  38 | });
  39 | 
  40 | const DemographicQuerySchema = z.object({
  41 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  42 | 	startDate: z.coerce.date(),
  43 | 	endDate: z.coerce.date()
  44 | });
  45 | 
  46 | // const BenchmarkQuerySchema = z.object({
  47 | // 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  48 | // 	metric: z.enum(["appointments", "patients", "revenue"])
  49 | // });
  50 | 
  51 | // ============================================================================
  52 | // Trend Actions
  53 | // ============================================================================
  54 | 
  55 | /**
  56 |  * Get appointment trends over a date range
  57 |  */
  58 | export async function getAppointmentTrendsAction(input: unknown) {
  59 | 	const validated = DateRangeSchema.parse(input);
  60 | 
  61 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
  62 | 		const appointments = await analyticsRepo.getAppointmentsInRange(
  63 | 			validated.clinicId,
  64 | 			validated.startDate,
  65 | 			validated.endDate
  66 | 		);
  67 | 
  68 | 		const trends = analyticsService.groupDataByDate(appointments, validated.groupBy, () => 1);
  69 | 
  70 | 		return trends;
  71 | 	});
  72 | }
  73 | 
  74 | /**
  75 |  * Get patient trends over a date range
  76 |  */
  77 | export async function getPatientTrendsAction(input: unknown) {
  78 | 	const validated = DateRangeSchema.parse(input);
  79 | 
  80 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
  81 | 		const patients = await analyticsRepo.getPatientsInDateRange(
  82 | 			validated.clinicId,
  83 | 			validated.startDate,
  84 | 			validated.endDate
  85 | 		);
  86 | 
  87 | 		const trends = analyticsService.groupDataByDate(patients, validated.groupBy, () => 1);
  88 | 
  89 | 		return trends;
  90 | 	});
  91 | }
  92 | 
  93 | /**
  94 |  * Get revenue trends over a date range
  95 |  */
  96 | export async function getRevenueTrendsAction(input: unknown) {
  97 | 	const validated = DateRangeSchema.parse(input);
  98 | 
  99 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 100 | 		const appointments = await analyticsRepo.getAppointmentsInRange(
 101 | 			validated.clinicId,
 102 | 			validated.startDate,
 103 | 			validated.endDate
 104 | 		);
 105 | 
 106 | 		const trends = analyticsService.groupDataByDate(
 107 | 			appointments,
 108 | 			validated.groupBy,
 109 | 			(apt: { appointmentPrice?: number | null }) => apt.appointmentPrice || 0
 110 | 		);
 111 | 
 112 | 		return trends;
 113 | 	});
 114 | }
 115 | 
 116 | /**
 117 |  * Get immunization trends over a date range
 118 |  */
 119 | export async function getImmunizationTrendsAction(clinicId: string, start: Date, end: Date, groupBy: "day" | "week" | "month") {
 120 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 121 | 		const immunizations = await pediatricRepo.getImmunizationsInRange(clinicId, start, end);
 122 | 		return analyticsService.groupDataByDate(immunizations, groupBy, () => 1);
 123 | 	});
 124 | }
 125 | 
 126 | /**
 127 |  * Get prescription trends over a date range
 128 |  */
 129 | export async function getPrescriptionTrendsAction(clinicId: string, start: Date, end: Date, groupBy: "day" | "week" | "month") {
 130 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 131 | 		const prescriptions = await pharmacyRepo.getPrescriptionsByDateRange(clinicId, start, end);
 132 | 		return analyticsService.groupDataByDate(prescriptions, groupBy, () => 1);
 133 | 	});
 134 | }
 135 | 
 136 | /**
 137 |  * Get growth measurement trends over a date range
 138 |  */
 139 | export async function getGrowthMeasurementTrendsAction(clinicId: string, start: Date, end: Date, groupBy: "day" | "week" | "month") {
 140 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 141 | 		const growthRecords = await pediatricRepo.getPatientGrowthRecords("", clinicId);
 142 | 		const filtered = growthRecords.filter(r => r.createdAt >= start && r.createdAt <= end);
 143 | 		return analyticsService.groupDataByDate(filtered, groupBy, () => 1);
 144 | 	});
 145 | }
 146 | 
 147 | export async function getTotalGrowthMeasurementsAction(clinicId: string, start: Date, end: Date) {
 148 | 	const trends = await getGrowthMeasurementTrendsAction(clinicId, start, end, "month");
 149 | 	return { data: trends.data?.reduce((acc, curr) => acc + curr.value, 0) ?? 0 };
 150 | }
 151 | 
 152 | /**
 153 |  * Get historical data for a specific metric
 154 |  */
 155 | export async function calculateDateRangeAction(input: unknown) {
 156 | 	const validated = TrendQuerySchema.extend({
 157 | 		metric: z.enum(["appointments", "patients", "revenue"])
 158 | 	}).parse(input);
 159 | 
 160 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 161 | 		const { start, end } = analyticsService.calculateDateRange(validated.period);
 162 | 
 163 | 		let data;
 164 | 		switch (validated.metric) {
 165 | 			case "appointments": {
 166 | 				const appointments = await analyticsRepo.getAppointmentsInRange(validated.clinicId, start, end);
 167 | 				data = analyticsService.groupDataByDate(appointments, "month", () => 1);
 168 | 				break;
 169 | 			}
 170 | 			case "patients": {
 171 | 				const patients = await analyticsRepo.getPatientsInDateRange(validated.clinicId, start, end);
 172 | 				data = analyticsService.groupDataByDate(patients, "month", () => 1);
 173 | 				break;
 174 | 			}
 175 | 			case "revenue": {
 176 | 				const revenueAppointments = await analyticsRepo.getAppointmentsInRange(validated.clinicId, start, end);
 177 | 				data = analyticsService.groupDataByDate(
 178 | 					revenueAppointments,
 179 | 					"month",
 180 | 					(apt: { appointmentPrice?: number | null }) => apt.appointmentPrice || 0
 181 | 				);
 182 | 				break;
 183 | 			}
 184 | 		}
 185 | 
 186 | 		return data || [];
 187 | 	});
 188 | }

 280 | // ============================================================================
 281 | // Prediction Actions
 282 | // ============================================================================
 283 | 
 284 | /**
 285 |  * Generate predictions for a metric
 286 |  */
 287 | export async function generatePredictionsAction(input: unknown) {
 288 | 	const validated = PredictionQuerySchema.parse(input);
 289 | 
 290 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 291 | 		const { start, end } = analyticsService.calculateDateRange("year");
 292 | 		const clinicId = validated.clinicId;
 293 | 		let historicalData: TrendData[] = [];
 294 | 
 295 | 		switch (validated.metric as string) {
 296 | 			case "appointments": {
 297 | 				const appointments = await analyticsRepo.getAppointmentsInRange(clinicId, start, end);
 298 | 				historicalData = analyticsService.groupDataByDate(appointments, "month", () => 1);
 299 | 				break;
 300 | 			}
 301 | 			case "patients": {
 302 | 				const patients = await analyticsRepo.getPatientsInDateRange(validated.clinicId, start, end);
 303 | 				historicalData = analyticsService.groupDataByDate(patients, "month", () => 1);
 304 | 				break;
 305 | 			}
 306 | 			case "revenue": {
 307 | 				const revenueAppointments = await analyticsRepo.getAppointmentsInRange(validated.clinicId, start, end);
 308 | 				historicalData = analyticsService.groupDataByDate(
 309 | 					revenueAppointments,
 310 | 					"month",
 311 | 					(apt: { appointmentPrice?: number | null }) => apt.appointmentPrice || 0
 312 | 				);
 313 | 				break;
 314 | 			}
 315 | 		}
 316 | 
 317 | 		const predictions = analyticsService.generatePredictions(historicalData, validated.horizon);
 318 | 		const insights = analyticsService.generateInsights(predictions, validated.metric);
 319 | 		const recommendations = analyticsService.generateRecommendations(predictions, validated.metric);
 320 | 		const expectedGrowth = analyticsService.calculateExpectedGrowth(historicalData, predictions);
 321 | 		const confidenceLevel = analyticsService.calculateConfidenceLevel(historicalData);
 322 | 		const peakPeriod = analyticsService.findPeakPeriod(predictions);
 323 | 		const riskFactors = analyticsService.identifyRiskFactors(predictions, validated.metric);
 324 | 
 325 | 		return {
 326 | 			metric: validated.metric,
 327 | 			horizon: validated.horizon,
 328 | 			historicalData,
 329 | 			predictions,
 330 | 			insights,
 331 | 			recommendations,
 332 | 			expectedGrowth,
 333 | 			confidenceLevel,
 334 | 			peakPeriod,
 335 | 			riskFactors
 336 | 		};
 337 | 	});
 338 | }
 339 | 
 340 | export async function calculateExpectedGrowthAction(historical: any[], predictions: any[]) {
 341 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => analyticsService.calculateExpectedGrowth(historical, predictions));
 342 | }

 344 | export async function calculateConfidenceLevelAction(historical: any[]) {
 345 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => analyticsService.calculateConfidenceLevel(historical));
 346 | }

 349 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => analyticsService.findPeakPeriod(predictions));
 350 | }

 353 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => analyticsService.identifyRiskFactors(predictions, metric));
 354 | }

 367 | 
 368 | /**
 369 |  * Get demographic data for patients
 370 |  */
 371 | export async function getDemographicDataAction(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, ageGroup: string) {
 372 | 	const validated = DemographicQuerySchema.parse({ clinicId, startDate, endDate });
 373 | 
 374 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 375 | 		const patients = await analyticsRepo.getPatientDemographics(
 376 | 			validated.clinicId,
 377 | 			validated.startDate,
 378 | 			validated.endDate
 379 | 		);
 380 | 
 381 | 		const ageGroups = [
 382 | 			{ group: "Infant (0-12m)", minMonths: 0, maxMonths: 12 },
 383 | 			{ group: "Toddler (1-3y)", minMonths: 12, maxMonths: 36 },
 384 | 			{ group: "Preschool (3-5y)", minMonths: 36, maxMonths: 60 },
 385 | 			{ group: "School Age (5-12y)", minMonths: 60, maxMonths: 144 },
 386 | 			{ group: "Adolescent (12-18y)", minMonths: 144, maxMonths: 216 }
 387 | 		];
 388 | 
 389 | 		let filteredPatients = patients;
 390 | 		if (ageGroup !== "all") {
 391 | 			// Logic to filter patients by ageGroup string if needed
 392 | 		}
 393 | 		const ageDistribution = analyticsService.calculateAgeDistribution(filteredPatients, ageGroups);
 394 | 
 395 | 		// Calculate gender distribution
 396 | 		const maleCount = patients.filter(p => p.gender === "MALE").length;
 397 | 		const femaleCount = patients.filter(p => p.gender === "FEMALE").length;
 398 | 		const total = patients.length;
 399 | 
 400 | 		return {
 401 | 			totalPatients: total,
 402 | 			ageDistribution,
 403 | 			genderDistribution: [
 404 | 				{ gender: "Male", count: maleCount, percentage: total > 0 ? (maleCount / total) * 100 : 0 },
 405 | 				{ gender: "Female", count: femaleCount, percentage: total > 0 ? (femaleCount / total) * 100 : 0 }
 406 | 			]
 407 | 		};
 408 | 	});
 409 | }

 513 |  * Get top conditions by prevalence

 515 | export async function getTopConditionsAction(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) {

 520 | 		return conditions.map(c => ({
 521 | 			...c,

 527 | /**
 528 |  * Get seasonal patterns
 529 |  */
 530 | export async function getSeasonalPatternsAction(clinicId: string, year: number) {
 531 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 532 | 		const seasonalData = await analyticsRepo.getSeasonalAppointmentData(clinicId, year);
 533 | 
 534 | 		// Transform to expected format
 535 | 		const patterns = [];
 536 | 		for (const season of seasonalData) {
 537 | 			const topConditions = Object.entries(season.conditions)
 538 | 				.sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
 539 | 				.slice(0, 3);
 540 | 
 541 | 			for (const [condition, incidence] of topConditions) {
 542 | 				patterns.push({
 543 | 					season: season.season,
 544 | 					condition,
 545 | 					incidence
 546 | 				});
 547 | 			}
 548 | 		}
 549 | 
 550 | 		return patterns;
 551 | 	});
 552 | }

 554 | // ============================================================================
 555 | // Benchmark Actions
 556 | // ============================================================================
 557 | 
 558 | /**
 559 |  * Get current metric value for benchmarking
 560 |  */
 561 | export async function getCurrentMetricValueAction(clinicId: string, metric: string) {
 562 | 	const result = await safeDbQuery(async () => {
 563 | 		const end = new Date();
 564 | 		const start = new Date();
 565 | 		start.setMonth(start.getMonth() - 1);
 566 | 
 567 | 		switch (metric) {
 568 | 			case "appointments": {
 569 | 				const appointments = await analyticsRepo.getAppointmentsInRange(clinicId, start, end);
 570 | 				return appointments.length;
 571 | 			}
 572 | 			case "patients": {
 573 | 				const count = await analyticsRepo.getNewPatientsCount(clinicId, start, end);
 574 | 				return count;
 575 | 			}
 576 | 			case "revenue": {
 577 | 				const result = await analyticsRepo.getClinicRevenue(clinicId, start, end);
 578 | 				return result[0]?.total ?? 0;
 579 | 			}
 580 | 			default:
 581 | 				return 0;
 582 | 		}
 583 | 	});
 584 | 	return result.data ?? 0;
 585 | }
 586 | 
 587 | /**
 588 |  * Get previous period metric value for benchmarking
 589 |  */
 590 | export async function getPreviousPeriodMetricValueAction(clinicId: string, metric: string) {
 591 | 	const result = await safeDbQuery(async () => {
 592 | 		const start = new Date();
 593 | 		start.setMonth(start.getMonth() - 2);
 594 | 		const prevEnd = new Date();
 595 | 		prevEnd.setMonth(prevEnd.getMonth() - 1);
 596 | 
 597 | 		switch (metric) {
 598 | 			case "appointments": {
 599 | 				const appointments = await analyticsRepo.getAppointmentsInRange(clinicId, start, prevEnd);
 600 | 				return appointments.length;
 601 | 			}
 602 | 			case "patients": {
 603 | 				const count = await analyticsRepo.getNewPatientsCount(clinicId, start, prevEnd);
 604 | 				return count;
 605 | 			}
 606 | 			case "revenue": {
 607 | 				const result = await analyticsRepo.getClinicRevenue(clinicId, start, prevEnd);
 608 | 				return result[0]?.total ?? 0;
 609 | 			}
 610 | 			default:
 611 | 				return 0;
 612 | 		}
 613 | 	});
 614 | 	return result.data ?? 0;
 615 | }
 616 | 
 617 | /**
 618 |  * Calculate trend for a metric
 619 |  */
 620 | export async function calculateTrendAction(clinicId: string, metric: string) {
 621 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 622 | 		const current = await getCurrentMetricValueAction(clinicId, metric);
 623 | 		const previous = await getPreviousPeriodMetricValueAction(clinicId, metric);
 624 | 		const trend = analyticsService.calculateTrend(current, previous);
 625 | 		return { trend, current, previous };
 626 | 	});
 627 | }
 628 | 
 629 | /**
 630 |  * Get benchmark data (national average, state average, target)
 631 |  */
 632 | export async function getBenchmarkDataAction(clinicId: string, metric: string) {
 633 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 634 | 		const current = await getCurrentMetricValueAction(clinicId, metric);
 635 | 		const nationalAvg = await getNationalAverageAction(metric);
 636 | 		const stateAvg = await getStateAverageAction(clinicId, metric);
 637 | 		const target = await getTargetValueAction(metric);
 638 | 
 639 | 		const status = current < nationalAvg ? "below" : current > nationalAvg ? "above" : "at";
 640 | 		const trend = await calculateTrendAction(clinicId, metric);
 641 | 		const recommendations = analyticsService.generateBenchmarkRecommendations(
 642 | 			metric,
 643 | 			status,
 644 | 			trend.data?.trend || "stable"
 645 | 		);
 646 | 
 647 | 		return {
 648 | 			current,
 649 | 			nationalAverage: nationalAvg,
 650 | 			stateAverage: stateAvg,
 651 | 			target,
 652 | 			status,
 653 | 			trend: trend.data?.trend || "stable",
 654 | 			recommendations
 655 | 		};
 656 | 	});
 657 | }

```

`actions/appointment.action.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/actions/appointment.actions.ts
   2 | // Thin Controller - Only validation and orchestration
   3 | 
   4 | import { z } from "zod";
   5 | 
   6 | import { appointmentRepo } from "../queries/appointment.repo";
   7 | import type { AppointmentStatus, ReminderMethod } from "../schema";
   8 | import type { NewDbAppointment } from "../schema/types";
   9 | import { appointmentService } from "../services";
  10 | import { safeDbQuery } from "../helper";
  11 | import { AppointmentCreateSchema } from "../zod";
  12 | 
  13 | // ============================================================================
  14 | // Validation Schemas
  15 | // ============================================================================
  16 | 
  17 | const AppointmentStatusSchema = z.enum(["PENDING", "CONFIRMED", "COMPLETED", "CANCELLED", "NO_SHOW"]);
  18 | 
  19 | const UpdateAppointmentSchema = AppointmentCreateSchema.partial().extend({
  20 | 	id: z.string().min(1),
  21 | 	status: AppointmentStatusSchema.optional()
  22 | });
  23 | 
  24 | const CancelAppointmentSchema = z.object({
  25 | 	id: z.string().min(1),
  26 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  27 | 	reason: z.string().optional()
  28 | });
  29 | 
  30 | const RescheduleAppointmentSchema = z.object({
  31 | 	id: z.string().min(1),
  32 | 	newDate: z.coerce.date(),
  33 | 	newTime: z.string().regex(/^([0-1]?[0-9]|2[0-3]):[0-5][0-9]$/, "Invalid time format"),
  34 | 	reason: z.string().optional()
  35 | });
  36 | 
  37 | const GetAppointmentsQuerySchema = z.object({
  38 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  39 | 	page: z.coerce.number().int().min(1).default(1),
  40 | 	limit: z.coerce.number().int().min(1).max(100).default(10),
  41 | 	status: AppointmentStatusSchema.optional(),
  42 | 	doctorId: z.string().optional(),
  43 | 	patientId: z.string().optional(),
  44 | 	fromDate: z.coerce.date().optional(),
  45 | 	toDate: z.coerce.date().optional(),
  46 | 	search: z.string().optional()
  47 | });
  48 | 
  49 | const BulkUpdateStatusSchema = z.object({
  50 | 	appointmentIds: z.array(z.string().min(1)).min(1),
  51 | 	status: AppointmentStatusSchema,
  52 | 	reason: z.string().optional()
  53 | });
  54 | 
  55 | // ============================================================================
  56 | // Action Functions
  57 | // ============================================================================
  58 | 
  59 | /**
  60 |  * Create a new appointment
  61 |  */
  62 | export async function createAppointmentAction(input: unknown) {
  63 | 	const validated = AppointmentCreateSchema.parse(input);
  64 | 
  65 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
  66 | 		// 1. Validate date is not in the past
  67 | 		const dateValidation = appointmentService.validateAppointmentDate(validated.appointmentDate);
  68 | 		if (!dateValidation.valid) {
  69 | 			throw new Error(dateValidation.error);
  70 | 		}
  71 | 
  72 | 		// 2. Check time slot availability
  73 | 		const availability = await appointmentService.validateTimeSlot(
  74 | 			validated.doctorId,
  75 | 			validated.appointmentDate,
  76 | 			validated.durationMinutes ?? 30,
  77 | 			validated.clinicId
  78 | 		);
  79 | 
  80 | 		if (!availability.available) {
  81 | 			throw new Error(availability.conflictReason);
  82 | 		}
  83 | 
  84 | 		// 3. Calculate final appointment price
  85 | 		const finalPrice = appointmentService.calculateAppointmentPrice(
  86 | 			validated.appointmentPrice,
  87 | 			undefined // Would fetch service price if serviceId provided
  88 | 		);
  89 | 
  90 | 		// 4. Create appointment data
  91 | 		const appointmentData: NewDbAppointment = {
  92 | 			...validated,
  93 | 			appointmentPrice: finalPrice,
  94 | 			status: "PENDING",
  95 | 			createdAt: new Date(),
  96 | 			updatedAt: new Date()
  97 | 		};
  98 | 
  99 | 		// 5. Persist via repository
 100 | 		const appointment = await appointmentRepo.createAppointment(appointmentData);
 101 | 
 102 | 		return appointment;
 103 | 	});
 104 | }
 105 | 
 106 | /**
 107 |  * Update existing appointment
 108 |  */
 109 | export async function updateAppointmentAction(input: unknown) {
 110 | 	const validated = UpdateAppointmentSchema.parse(input);
 111 | 
 112 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 113 | 		// Get existing appointment
 114 | 		const existing = await appointmentRepo.getAppointmentById(validated.id, validated.clinicId ?? "");
 115 | 		if (!existing) {
 116 | 			throw new Error("Appointment not found");
 117 | 		}
 118 | 
 119 | 		// Prepare update data
 120 | 		const updateData: Partial<NewDbAppointment> = { ...validated };
 121 | 		delete updateData.id;
 122 | 
 123 | 		// If status is being updated, validate transition
 124 | 		if (validated.status && validated.status !== existing.status) {
 125 | 			// Add any status transition business logic here
 126 | 			// e.g., cannot cancel already completed appointments
 127 | 			if (existing.status === "COMPLETED" && validated.status === "CANCELLED") {
 128 | 				throw new Error("Cannot cancel a completed appointment");
 129 | 			}
 130 | 		}
 131 | 
 132 | 		const updated = await appointmentRepo.updateAppointment(validated.id, updateData);
 133 | 
 134 | 		if (!updated) {
 135 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update appointment");
 136 | 		}
 137 | 
 138 | 		return updated;
 139 | 	});
 140 | }
 141 | 
 142 | /**
 143 |  * Update appointment status only
 144 |  */
 145 | export async function updateAppointmentStatusAction(id: string, status: AppointmentStatus, clinicId: string) {
 146 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 147 | 		const appointment = await appointmentRepo.getAppointmentById(id, clinicId);
 148 | 		if (!appointment) {
 149 | 			throw new Error("Appointment not found");
 150 | 		}
 151 | 
 152 | 		const updated = await appointmentRepo.updateAppointmentStatus(id, status);
 153 | 
 154 | 		if (!updated) {
 155 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update appointment status");
 156 | 		}
 157 | 
 158 | 		return updated;
 159 | 	});
 160 | }
 161 | 
 162 | /**
 163 |  * Cancel an appointment
 164 |  */
 165 | export async function cancelAppointmentAction(input: unknown) {
 166 | 	const validated = CancelAppointmentSchema.parse(input);
 167 | 
 168 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 169 | 		const appointment = await appointmentRepo.getAppointmentById(validated.id, validated.clinicId);
 170 | 		if (!appointment) {
 171 | 			throw new Error("Appointment not found");
 172 | 		}
 173 | 
 174 | 		// Business logic: cannot cancel completed appointments
 175 | 		if (appointment.status === "COMPLETED") {
 176 | 			throw new Error("Cannot cancel a completed appointment");
 177 | 		}
 178 | 
 179 | 		const cancelled = await appointmentRepo.cancelAppointment(
 180 | 			validated.id,
 181 | 			validated.clinicId,
 182 | 			validated.reason ?? "Cancelled by user"
 183 | 		);
 184 | 
 185 | 		if (!cancelled) {
 186 | 			throw new Error("Failed to cancel appointment");
 187 | 		}
 188 | 
 189 | 		return cancelled;
 190 | 	});
 191 | }
 192 | 
 193 | /**
 194 |  * Reschedule an appointment
 195 |  */
 196 | export async function rescheduleAppointmentAction(input: unknown) {
 197 | 	const validated = RescheduleAppointmentSchema.parse(input);
 198 | 
 199 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 200 | 		// Get existing appointment
 201 | 		const existing = await appointmentRepo.getAppointmentById(validated.id, "");
 202 | 		if (!existing) {
 203 | 			throw new Error("Appointment not found");
 204 | 		}
 205 | 
 206 | 		// Validate reschedule request
 207 | 		const rescheduleValidation = appointmentService.validateReschedule(
 208 | 			existing,
 209 | 			validated.newDate,
 210 | 			validated.newTime
 211 | 		);
 212 | 
 213 | 		if (!rescheduleValidation.valid) {
 214 | 			throw new Error(rescheduleValidation.error);
 215 | 		}
 216 | 
 217 | 		// Check new time slot availability
 218 | 		const availability = await appointmentService.validateTimeSlot(
 219 | 			existing.doctorId,
 220 | 			validated.newDate,
 221 | 			existing.durationMinutes ?? 30,
 222 | 			existing.clinicId,
 223 | 			validated.id // Exclude current appointment
 224 | 		);
 225 | 
 226 | 		if (!availability.available) {
 227 | 			throw new Error(availability.conflictReason);
 228 | 		}
 229 | 
 230 | 		// Perform reschedule
 231 | 		const rescheduled = await appointmentRepo.rescheduleAppointment(
 232 | 			validated.id,
 233 | 			validated.newDate,
 234 | 			validated.newTime,
 235 | 			validated.reason
 236 | 		);
 237 | 
 238 | 		if (!rescheduled) {
 239 | 			throw new Error("Failed to reschedule appointment");
 240 | 		}
 241 | 
 242 | 		return rescheduled;
 243 | 	});
 244 | }
 245 | 
 246 | /**
 247 |  * Cancel an existing appointment (Legacy/Direct wrapper)
 248 |  */
 249 | export async function cancelExistingAppointmentAction(id: string, clinicId: string, reason?: string) {
 250 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 251 | 		const cancelled = await appointmentRepo.cancelAppointment(id, clinicId, reason || "Cancelled by user");
 252 | 
 253 | 		if (!cancelled) {
 254 | 			throw new Error("Appointment not found");
 255 | 		}
 256 | 
 257 | 		return cancelled;
 258 | 	});
 259 | }

 262 |  * Reschedule an existing appointment (Legacy/Direct wrapper)
 263 |  */
 264 | export async function rescheduleExistingAppointmentAction(id: string, newDate: Date, newTime: string, reason?: string) {
 265 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 266 | 		const rescheduled = await appointmentRepo.rescheduleAppointment(id, newDate, newTime, reason);
 267 | 		if (!rescheduled) {
 268 | 			throw new Error("Failed to reschedule appointment");
 269 | 		}
 270 | 		return rescheduled;
 271 | 	});

 274 | /**
 275 |  * Get paginated appointments with filters

 277 | export async function getAppointmentsAction(input: unknown) {
 278 | 	const validated = GetAppointmentsQuerySchema.parse(input);
 279 | 
 280 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 281 | 		const result = await appointmentRepo.getAppointmentsWithPagination(
 282 | 			validated.clinicId,
 283 | 			{ page: validated.page, limit: validated.limit },
 284 | 			{
 285 | 				status: validated.status,
 286 | 				doctorId: validated.doctorId,
 287 | 				patientId: validated.patientId,
 288 | 				fromDate: validated.fromDate,
 289 | 				toDate: validated.toDate,
 290 | 				search: validated.search
 291 | 			}
 292 | 		);
 293 | 
 294 | 		return result;
 295 | 	});
 296 | }

 298 | /**
 299 |  * Search appointments using advanced filters
 300 |  */
 301 | export async function searchAppointmentsAction(
 302 | 	clinicId: string,
 303 | 	filters: Record<string, unknown>,
 304 | 	pagination: { page: number; limit: number }
 305 | ) {
 306 | 	const validated = GetAppointmentsQuerySchema.parse({
 307 | 		...filters,
 308 | 		clinicId,
 309 | 		page: pagination.page,
 310 | 		limit: pagination.limit
 311 | 	});
 312 | 
 313 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 314 | 		const result = await appointmentRepo.getAppointmentsWithPagination(
 315 | 			validated.clinicId,
 316 | 			{ page: validated.page, limit: validated.limit },
 317 | 			validated
 318 | 		);
 319 | 		return result;
 320 | 	});
 321 | }
 322 | 
 323 | /**
 324 |  * Get single appointment by ID
 325 |  */
 326 | export async function getAppointmentByIdAction(id: string, clinicId: string) {
 327 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 328 | 		const appointment = await appointmentRepo.getAppointmentById(id, clinicId);
 329 | 
 330 | 		if (!appointment) {
 331 | 			throw new Error("Appointment not found");
 332 | 		}
 333 | 
 334 | 		// Add business logic - determine if appointment is upcoming
 335 | 		const daysUntil = appointmentService.getDaysUntilAppointment(appointment.appointmentDate);
 336 | 		const isUpcoming = daysUntil > 0 && appointment.status !== "CANCELLED" && appointment.status !== "COMPLETED";
 337 | 
 338 | 		return {
 339 | 			...appointment,
 340 | 			metadata: {
 341 | 				isUpcoming,
 342 | 				daysUntil: daysUntil > 0 ? daysUntil : 0,
 343 | 				canCancel: appointment.status !== "COMPLETED" && appointment.status !== "CANCELLED" && daysUntil > 0,
 344 | 				canReschedule: appointment.status !== "COMPLETED" && appointment.status !== "CANCELLED" && daysUntil > 1
 345 | 			}
 346 | 		};
 347 | 	});
 348 | }

 369 | export async function bulkUpdateAppointmentsStatusAction(input: unknown) {

 371 | 
 372 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 373 | 		const updated = await appointmentRepo.bulkUpdateAppointmentStatus(validated.appointmentIds, validated.status);
 374 | 
 375 | 		if (!updated || updated.length === 0) {
 376 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update appointments");
 377 | 		}
 378 | 
 379 | 		return {
 380 | 			updatedCount: updated.length,
 381 | 			updatedAppointments: updated,
 382 | 			status: validated.status
 383 | 		};
 384 | 	});

 387 | /**
 388 |  * Get appointment statistics for dashboard
 389 |  */
 390 | export async function getAppointmentStatsAction(clinicId: string, startDate?: Date, endDate?: Date) {
 391 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 392 | 		const stats = await appointmentRepo.getAppointmentStats(clinicId, startDate, endDate);
 393 | 
 394 | 		// Add derived statistics via service
 395 | 		const completionRate = stats.total > 0 ? (stats.completed / stats.total) * 100 : 0;
 396 | 
 397 | 		return {
 398 | 			...stats,
 399 | 			completionRate: Math.round(completionRate * 10) / 10,
 400 | 			averageRevenuePerAppointment: stats.completed > 0 ? stats.totalRevenue / stats.completed : 0
 401 | 		};
 402 | 	});
 403 | }

 405 | /**
 406 |  * Get appointments for a patient
 407 |  */
 408 | export async function getPatientAppointmentsAction(
 409 | 	patientId: string,
 410 | 	clinicId: string,
 411 | 	page = 1,
 412 | 	limit = 10,
 413 | 	status?: AppointmentStatus
 414 | ) {
 415 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 416 | 		const result = await appointmentRepo.getPatientAppointments(patientId, clinicId, { page, limit }, status);
 417 | 
 418 | 		return {
 419 | 			...result,
 420 | 			page,
 421 | 			limit,
 422 | 			totalPages: Math.ceil(result.total / limit)
 423 | 		};
 424 | 	});
 425 | }
 426 | 
 427 | /**
 428 |  * Get doctor's schedule for a specific date
 429 |  */
 430 | export async function getDoctorScheduleAction(doctorId: string, date: Date) {
 431 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 432 | 		const startOfDay = new Date(date);
 433 | 		startOfDay.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
 434 | 		const endOfDay = new Date(date);
 435 | 		endOfDay.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
 436 | 
 437 | 		const appointments = await appointmentRepo.getDoctorAppointmentsInRange(doctorId, startOfDay, endOfDay);
 438 | 
 439 | 		const bookedSlots = appointments.map(apt => ({
 440 | 			start: apt.appointmentDate,
 441 | 			duration: apt.durationMinutes ?? 30
 442 | 		}));
 443 | 
 444 | 		return {
 445 | 			date,
 446 | 			appointments,
 447 | 			bookedSlots,
 448 | 			appointmentCount: appointments.length
 449 | 		};
 450 | 	});
 451 | }
 452 | 
 453 | /**
 454 |  * Get doctor availability for a specific date
 455 |  */
 456 | export async function getDoctorAvailabilityAction(doctorId: string, date: Date) {
 457 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 458 | 		const availability = await appointmentRepo.getDoctorAvailability(doctorId, date);
 459 | 		return availability;
 460 | 	});
 461 | }
 462 | 
 463 | /**
 464 |  * Create appointment with reminder
 465 |  */
 466 | export async function createAppointmentWithReminderAction(
 467 | 	appointmentData: NewDbAppointment,
 468 | 	reminderData?: { method: ReminderMethod; sentAt?: Date }
 469 | ) {
 470 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 471 | 		// Validate date
 472 | 		const dateValidation = appointmentService.validateAppointmentDate(appointmentData.appointmentDate);
 473 | 		if (!dateValidation.valid) {
 474 | 			throw new Error(dateValidation.error);
 475 | 		}
 476 | 
 477 | 		// Check availability
 478 | 		const availability = await appointmentService.validateTimeSlot(
 479 | 			appointmentData.doctorId,
 480 | 			appointmentData.appointmentDate,
 481 | 			appointmentData.durationMinutes ?? 30,
 482 | 			appointmentData.clinicId
 483 | 		);
 484 | 
 485 | 		if (!availability.available) {
 486 | 			throw new Error(availability.conflictReason);
 487 | 		}
 488 | 
 489 | 		const reminder = reminderData
 490 | 			? {
 491 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 492 | 					appointmentId: appointmentData.id,
 493 | 					method: reminderData.method,
 494 | 					sentAt: reminderData.sentAt ?? new Date(),
 495 | 					status: "PENDING" as const
 496 | 				}
 497 | 			: undefined;
 498 | 
 499 | 		const appointment = await appointmentRepo.createAppointmentWithReminder(appointmentData, reminder);
 500 | 
 501 | 		return appointment;
 502 | 	});
 503 | }

```

`actions/auth.actions.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/actions/auth.actions.ts
   2 | // Thin Controller - Only validation and orchestration

   4 | import { z } from "zod";
   5 |

   8 | import { roleEnum } from "../schema";

  19 | });

  23 | 	role: z.enum(["admin", "doctor", "staff", "patient"]),

  25 | });

  29 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),

 142 | /**
 143 |  * Create a new clinic
 144 |  */
 145 | export async function createClinicAction(input: unknown) {
 146 | 	const validated = ClinicCreateSchema.parse(input);
 147 | 
 148 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 149 | 		const clinicValidation = authService.validateClinicData(
 150 | 			validated.name,
 151 | 			validated.address ?? "",
 152 | 			validated.email ?? ""
 153 | 		);
 154 | 		if (!clinicValidation.valid) {
 155 | 			throw new Error(clinicValidation.error);
 156 | 		}
 157 | 
 158 | 		const clinicId = await adminRepo.createClinicWithDetails({
 159 | 			id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 160 | 			name: validated.name,
 161 | 			address: validated.address ?? "",
 162 | 			email: validated.email ?? undefined,
 163 | 			timezone: validated.timezone ?? "Africa/Cairo"
 164 | 		});
 165 | 
 166 | 		if (!clinicId) {
 167 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create clinic");
 168 | 		}
 169 |

 171 | 	});

 187 | /**
 188 |  * Get clinic by ID
 189 |  */
 190 | export async function getClinicByIdAction(clinicId: string) {
 191 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 192 | 		const clinic = await clinicRepo.getClinicById(clinicId);
 193 | 		if (!clinic) {
 194 | 			throw new Error("Clinic not found");
 195 | 		}
 196 | 		return clinic;
 197 | 	});
 198 | }

 202 |  */

 206 | 		return clinic;
 207 | 	});
 208 | }

 210 | /**
 211 |  * Create clinic with full details (for admin seeding)
 212 |  */
 213 | export async function createClinicWithDetailsAction(input: unknown) {
 214 | 	const validated = ClinicCreateSchema.extend({
 215 | 		id: z.string().optional(),
 216 | 		phone: z.string().optional(),
 217 | 		isDeleted: z.boolean().optional()
 218 | 	}).parse(input);
 219 | 
 220 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 221 | 		const clinicValidation = authService.validateClinicData(
 222 | 			validated.name,
 223 | 			validated.address ?? "",
 224 | 			validated.email ?? ""
 225 | 		);
 226 | 		if (!clinicValidation.valid) {
 227 | 			throw new Error(clinicValidation.error);
 228 | 		}
 229 | 
 230 | 		const clinic = await adminRepo.createClinicWithDetails({
 231 | 			id: validated.id || crypto.randomUUID(),
 232 | 			name: validated.name,
 233 | 			address: validated.address ?? "",
 234 | 			phone: validated.phone,
 235 | 			email: validated.email ?? undefined,
 236 | 			timezone: validated.timezone ?? "Africa/Cairo",
 237 | 			isDeleted: validated.isDeleted
 238 | 		});
 239 | 
 240 | 		return clinic;
 241 | 	});
 242 | }

 257 | 		return { success: true };
```

`actions/calendar.actions.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/actions/calendar.actions.ts
   2 | // Thin Controller - Only validation and orchestration
   3 | 
   4 | import { z } from "zod";
   5 | 
   6 | import { calendarRepo } from "../queries/calendar.repo";
   7 | import { calendarService } from "../services/calendar.service";
   8 | import { safeDbQuery } from "../helper";
   9 | 
  10 | // ============================================================================
  11 | // Validation Schemas
  12 | // ============================================================================
  13 | 
  14 | const DoctorScheduleSchema = z.object({
  15 | 	doctorId: z.string().min(1),
  16 | 	date: z.coerce.date()
  17 | });
  18 | 
  19 | const SlotAvailabilitySchema = z.object({
  20 | 	doctorId: z.string().min(1),
  21 | 	start: z.coerce.date(),
  22 | 	end: z.coerce.date(),
  23 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  24 | 	excludeId: z.string().optional()
  25 | });
  26 | 
  27 | const AvailableSlotsSchema = z.object({
  28 | 	doctorId: z.string().min(1),
  29 | 	date: z.coerce.date(),
  30 | 	durationMinutes: z.number().int().min(15).max(240).default(30)
  31 | });
  32 | 
  33 | const ReminderSchema = z.object({
  34 | 	appointmentId: z.string().min(1),
  35 | 	appointmentDate: z.coerce.date(),
  36 | 	reminderHours: z.array(z.number()).default([24, 2])
  37 | });
  38 | 
  39 | // ============================================================================
  40 | // Color & Formatting Actions (Pure service calls)
  41 | // ============================================================================
  42 | 
  43 | export function getEventColorAction(type: string): string {
  44 | 	return calendarService.getEventColor(type);
  45 | }
  46 | 
  47 | export function getStatusColorAction(status: string): string {
  48 | 	return calendarService.getStatusColor(status);
  49 | }
  50 | 
  51 | export function formatEventTypeAction(type: string): string {
  52 | 	return calendarService.formatEventType(type);
  53 | }
  54 | 
  55 | export function mapEventTypeToAppointmentTypeAction(type: string): string {
  56 | 	return calendarService.mapEventTypeToAppointmentType(type);
  57 | }
  58 | 
  59 | export function mapAppointmentTypeToEventTypeAction(type: string | null): string {
  60 | 	return calendarService.mapAppointmentTypeToEventType(type);
  61 | }
  62 | 
  63 | // ============================================================================
  64 | // Working Hours Actions
  65 | // ============================================================================
  66 | 
  67 | /**
  68 |  * Get doctor's working hours for a specific date
  69 |  */
  70 | export async function getDoctorWorkingHoursAction(input: unknown) {
  71 | 	const validated = DoctorScheduleSchema.parse(input);
  72 | 
  73 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
  74 | 		const hours = await calendarRepo.getDoctorWorkingHours(validated.doctorId, validated.date);
  75 | 		return hours;
  76 | 	});
  77 | }
  78 | 
  79 | /**
  80 |  * Get doctor's weekly schedule
  81 |  */
  82 | export async function getDoctorWeeklyScheduleAction(doctorId: string, startDate: Date) {
  83 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
  84 | 		const schedule = await calendarRepo.getDoctorWeeklySchedule(doctorId, startDate);
  85 | 
  86 | 		const events = schedule.appointments.map(apt => {
  87 | 			// Ensure status and type are strings for the service
  88 | 			const status = apt.status || "SCHEDULED";
  89 | 			return calendarService.appointmentToCalendarEvent({ ...apt, status });
  90 | 		});
  91 | 
  92 | 		return {
  93 | 			workingDays: schedule.workingDays,
  94 | 			appointments: schedule.appointments,
  95 | 			events
  96 | 		};
  97 | 	});
  98 | }
  99 | // ============================================================================
 100 | // Slot Availability Actions
 101 | // ============================================================================
 102 | 
 103 | /**
 104 |  * Check if a time slot is available
 105 |  */
 106 | export async function checkSlotAvailabilityAction(input: unknown) {
 107 | 	const validated = SlotAvailabilitySchema.parse(input);
 108 | 
 109 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 110 | 		const isAvailable = await calendarRepo.checkSlotAvailability(
 111 | 			validated.doctorId,
 112 | 			validated.start,
 113 | 			validated.end,
 114 | 			validated.clinicId,
 115 | 			validated.excludeId
 116 | 		);
 117 | 		return { available: isAvailable };
 118 | 	});
 119 | }
 120 | 
 121 | /**
 122 |  * Get available time slots for a doctor on a specific date
 123 |  */
 124 | export async function getAvailableTimeSlotsAction(input: unknown) {
 125 | 	const validated = AvailableSlotsSchema.parse(input);
 126 | 
 127 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 128 | 		// Get working hours
 129 | 		const workingHours = await calendarRepo.getDoctorWorkingHours(validated.doctorId, validated.date);
 130 | 
 131 | 		if (!workingHours) {
 132 | 			return { slots: [], message: "Doctor not working on this day" };
 133 | 		}
 134 | 
 135 | 		// Get booked slots
 136 | 		const bookedSlots = await calendarRepo.getBookedSlotsForDoctor(validated.doctorId, validated.date);
 137 | 
 138 | 		// Calculate available slots
 139 | 		const availableSlots = calendarService.calculateAvailableSlots(
 140 | 			workingHours.start,
 141 | 			workingHours.end,
 142 | 			validated.durationMinutes,
 143 | 			bookedSlots
 144 | 		);
 145 | 
 146 | 		// Get formatted time strings for easy display
 147 | 		const timeStrings = calendarService.getAvailableTimeStrings(
 148 | 			workingHours.start,
 149 | 			workingHours.end,
 150 | 			validated.durationMinutes,
 151 | 			bookedSlots
 152 | 		);
 153 | 
 154 | 		return {
 155 | 			workingHours,
 156 | 			bookedSlots,
 157 | 			availableSlots,
 158 | 			timeStrings,
 159 | 			durationMinutes: validated.durationMinutes
 160 | 		};
 161 | 	});
 162 | }
 163 | 
 164 | /**
 165 |  * Check multiple time slots for availability
 166 |  */
 167 | export async function checkMultipleSlotsAvailabilityAction(
 168 | 	slots: Array<{
 169 | 		doctorId: string;
 170 | 		start: Date;
 171 | 		end: Date;
 172 | 		clinicId: string;
 173 | 	}>
 174 | ) {
 175 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 176 | 		const results = await Promise.all(
 177 | 			slots.map(async slot => {
 178 | 				const isAvailable = await calendarRepo.checkSlotAvailability(
 179 | 					slot.doctorId,
 180 | 					slot.start,
 181 | 					slot.end,
 182 | 					slot.clinicId
 183 | 				);
 184 | 				return { ...slot, available: isAvailable };
 185 | 			})
 186 | 		);
 187 | 		return results;
 188 | 	});
 189 | }
 190 | 
 191 | // ============================================================================
 192 | // Reminder Actions
 193 | // ============================================================================
 194 | 
 195 | /**
 196 |  * Create appointment reminders
 197 |  */
 198 | export async function createAppointmentRemindersAction(input: unknown) {
 199 | 	const validated = ReminderSchema.parse(input);
 200 | 
 201 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 202 | 		const reminders = await calendarRepo.createAppointmentReminders(
 203 | 			validated.appointmentId,
 204 | 			validated.appointmentDate,
 205 | 			validated.reminderHours
 206 | 		);
 207 | 		return reminders;
 208 | 	});
 209 | }
 210 | 
 211 | /**
 212 |  * Create appointment reminders with custom method
 213 |  */
 214 | export async function createCustomRemindersAction(
 215 | 	appointmentId: string,
 216 | 	appointmentDate: Date,
 217 | 	reminderHours: number[] = [24, 2]
 218 | ) {
 219 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 220 | 		const reminders = [];
 221 | 		for (const hoursBefore of reminderHours) {
 222 | 			const reminderTime = new Date(appointmentDate);
 223 | 			reminderTime.setHours(reminderTime.getHours() - hoursBefore);
 224 | 
 225 | 			const [reminder] = await calendarRepo.createAppointmentReminders(
 226 | 				appointmentId,
 227 | 				appointmentDate,
 228 | 				[hoursBefore],
 229 | 				undefined // tx
 230 | 			);
 231 | 			reminders.push(reminder);
 232 | 		}
 233 | 		return reminders;
 234 | 	});
 235 | }
 236 | 
 237 | // ============================================================================
 238 | // Calendar Event Actions
 239 | // ============================================================================
 240 | 
 241 | /**
 242 |  * Get calendar events for a date range
 243 |  */
 244 | export async function getCalendarEventsAction(doctorId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) {
 245 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 246 | 		const appointments = await calendarRepo.getBookedSlotsForDoctor(doctorId, startDate);
 247 | 
 248 | 		// This would need a more comprehensive query to get full appointment details
 249 | 		// For now, returning basic structure
 250 | 		const events = appointments.map((slot: { start: Date; duration: number }) => ({
 251 | 			id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 252 | 			title: "Appointment",
 253 | 			start: slot.start,
 254 | 			end: new Date(slot.start.getTime() + slot.duration * 60000) ?? endDate,
 255 | 			allDay: false
 256 | 		}));
 257 | 
 258 | 		return events;
 259 | 	});
 260 | }
 261 | 
 262 | // ============================================================================
 263 | // Utility Actions
 264 | // ============================================================================
 265 | 
 266 | /**
 267 |  * Generate time slots for a day
 268 |  */
 269 | export function generateTimeSlotsAction(startTime: string, endTime: string, slotDurationMinutes = 30): string[] {
 270 | 	return calendarService.generateTimeSlots(startTime, endTime, slotDurationMinutes);
 271 | }
 272 | 
 273 | /**
 274 |  * Check if time is within working hours
 275 |  */
 276 | export function isWithinWorkingHoursAction(time: string, workingStart: string, workingEnd: string): boolean {
 277 | 	return calendarService.isWithinWorkingHours(time, workingStart, workingEnd);
 278 | }
 279 | 
 280 | /**
 281 |  * Format date for calendar
 282 |  */
 283 | export function formatCalendarDateAction(date: Date): string {
 284 | 	return calendarService.formatCalendarDate(date);
 285 | }
 286 | 
 287 | /**
 288 |  * Get week days array
 289 |  */
 290 | export function getWeekDaysAction(startDate: Date): Date[] {
 291 | 	return calendarService.getWeekDays(startDate);
 292 | }
 293 | 
 294 | /**
 295 |  * Convert appointment to calendar event
 296 |  */
 297 | export function appointmentToCalendarEventAction(appointment: {
 298 | 	id: string;
 299 | 	appointmentDate: Date;
 300 | 	time?: string | null;
 301 | 	type: string;
 302 | 	status: string;
 303 | 	durationMinutes?: number | null;
 304 | 	patient?: { firstName: string; lastName: string } | null;
 305 | 	doctor?: { name: string } | null;
 306 | }) {
 307 | 	return calendarService.appointmentToCalendarEvent(appointment);
 308 | }
```

`actions/config.action.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/actions/config.actions.ts
   2 | // Thin Controller - Only validation and orchestration
   3 | 
   4 | import { z } from "zod";
   5 | 
   6 | import { systemRepo } from "../queries";
   7 | import { type AppSettings, configService } from "../services/config.service";
   8 | import { safeDbQuery } from "../helper";
   9 | 
  10 | // ============================================================================
  11 | // Validation Schemas
  12 | // ============================================================================
  13 | 
  14 | const GetConfigSchema = z.object({
  15 | 	key: z.string().min(1)
  16 | });
  17 | 
  18 | const SetConfigSchema = z.object({
  19 | 	key: z.string().min(1),
  20 | 	value: z.union([z.string(), z.number(), z.boolean()])
  21 | });
  22 | 
  23 | const SetMultipleConfigsSchema = z.object({
  24 | 	configs: z.array(
  25 | 		z.object({
  26 | 			key: z.string().min(1),
  27 | 			value: z.union([z.string(), z.number(), z.boolean()])
  28 | 		})
  29 | 	)
  30 | });
  31 | 
  32 | const ValidateExtensionSchema = z.object({
  33 | 	filename: z.string().min(1)
  34 | });
  35 | 
  36 | const ValidateFileSizeSchema = z.object({
  37 | 	size: z.number().min(0),
  38 | 	maxSize: z.number().optional(),
  39 | 	chunkSize: z.number().optional()
  40 | });
  41 | 
  42 | // ============================================================================
  43 | // Settings Actions
  44 | // ============================================================================
  45 | 
  46 | /**
  47 |  * Get all application settings
  48 |  */
  49 | export async function getSettingsAction() {
  50 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
  51 | 		// Get all config rows from database
  52 | 		const rows = await systemRepo.getAllConfigs();
  53 | 
  54 | 		// Transform rows to config object
  55 | 		const configValues = configService.rowsToConfig(rows);
  56 | 
  57 | 		// Get all keys that should exist
  58 | 		const allKeys = configService.getConfigKeys();
  59 | 
  60 | 		// Initialize missing configs
  61 | 		const existingKeys = rows.map(r => r.key);
  62 | 		const missingConfigs = configService.getMissingKeys(existingKeys, allKeys);
  63 | 
  64 | 		if (missingConfigs.length > 0) {
  65 | 			await systemRepo.initializeMissingConfigs(missingConfigs);
  66 | 		}
  67 | 
  68 | 		// Return full AppSettings with environment variables
  69 | 		return configService.getAppSettingsWithEnv(configValues);
  70 | 	});
  71 | }
  72 | 
  73 | /**
  74 |  * Get a single config value
  75 |  */
  76 | export async function getConfigAction(key: string) {
  77 | 	const validated = GetConfigSchema.parse({ key });
  78 | 
  79 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
  80 | 		const config = await systemRepo.getConfig(validated.key);
  81 | 
  82 | 		if (!config) {
  83 | 			// Return default value if not found
  84 | 			const definition = configService.getConfigDefinition(validated.key);
  85 | 			if (definition) {
  86 | 				return { key: validated.key, value: definition.defaultValue };
  87 | 			}
  88 | 			throw new Error(`Config key not found: ${validated.key}`);
  89 | 		}
  90 | 
  91 | 		// Parse value according to schema
  92 | 		const schema = configService.getConfigDefinition(validated.key)?.schema;
  93 | 		const parsedValue = schema ? configService.parseValue(config.value, schema) : config.value;
  94 | 
  95 | 		return {
  96 | 			key: validated.key,
  97 | 			value: parsedValue
  98 | 		};
  99 | 	});
 100 | }
 101 | 
 102 | /**
 103 |  * Get multiple config values
 104 |  */
 105 | export async function getConfigsAction(keys: string[]) {
 106 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 107 | 		const results = await systemRepo.getConfigs(keys);
 108 | 		const typedResults: Record<string, unknown> = {};
 109 | 
 110 | 		for (const key of keys) {
 111 | 			const definition = configService.getConfigDefinition(key);
 112 | 			if (definition) {
 113 | 				typedResults[key] = configService.parseValue(results[key], definition.schema);
 114 | 			} else {
 115 | 				typedResults[key] = results[key];
 116 | 			}
 117 | 		}
 118 | 
 119 | 		return typedResults;
 120 | 	});
 121 | }
 122 | 
 123 | /**
 124 |  * Set a config value
 125 |  */
 126 | export async function setConfigAction(key: string, value: unknown) {
 127 | 	const validated = SetConfigSchema.parse({ key, value });
 128 | 
 129 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 130 | 		// Validate against schema
 131 | 		const validation = configService.validateConfigValue(validated.key, validated.value);
 132 | 		if (!validation.valid) {
 133 | 			throw new Error(validation.error);
 134 | 		}
 135 | 
 136 | 		// Serialize for storage
 137 | 		const serialized = configService.serializeValue(validated.key, validated.value);
 138 | 
 139 | 		await systemRepo.setConfig(validated.key, serialized);
 140 | 
 141 | 		return {
 142 | 			key: validated.key,
 143 | 			value: validated.value
 144 | 		};
 145 | 	});
 146 | }
 147 | 
 148 | /**
 149 |  * Set multiple config values
 150 |  */
 151 | export async function setMultipleConfigsAction(input: unknown) {
 152 | 	const validated = SetMultipleConfigsSchema.parse(input);
 153 | 
 154 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 155 | 		const results = [];
 156 | 
 157 | 		for (const config of validated.configs) {
 158 | 			// Validate each config
 159 | 			const validation = configService.validateConfigValue(config.key, config.value);
 160 | 			if (!validation.valid) {
 161 | 				throw new Error(`Invalid config for ${config.key}: ${validation.error}`);
 162 | 			}
 163 | 
 164 | 			const serialized = configService.serializeValue(config.key, config.value);
 165 | 			results.push({ key: config.key, value: serialized });
 166 | 		}
 167 | 
 168 | 		const serializedConfigs = validated.configs.map(config => ({
 169 | 			key: config.key,
 170 | 			value: configService.serializeValue(config.key, config.value)
 171 | 		}));
 172 | 
 173 | 		await systemRepo.setConfigs(serializedConfigs);
 174 | 
 175 | 		return { updated: results.length, configs: results };
 176 | 	});
 177 | }
 178 | 
 179 | /**
 180 |  * Delete a config key (reset to default)
 181 |  */
 182 | export async function deleteConfigAction(key: string) {
 183 | 	const validated = GetConfigSchema.parse({ key });
 184 | 
 185 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 186 | 		await systemRepo.deleteConfig(validated.key);
 187 | 		return { key: validated.key, deleted: true };
 188 | 	});
 189 | }
 190 | 
 191 | // ============================================================================
 192 | // Configuration Actions (type-safe)
 193 | // ============================================================================
 194 | 
 195 | /**
 196 |  * Get typed config value with proper TypeScript inference
 197 |  */
 198 | export async function getTypedConfigAction<T>(key: string): Promise<T | undefined> {
 199 | 	const result = await getConfigAction(key);
 200 | 	if (!result.data) return undefined;
 201 | 	return (result.data as { value: T }).value;
 202 | }
 203 | 
 204 | /**
 205 |  * Check if sign-up is enabled
 206 |  */
 207 | export async function isSignUpEnabledAction(): Promise<boolean> {
 208 | 	const settings = await getSettingsAction();
 209 | 	if (!settings.data) return true;
 210 | 	return (settings.data as AppSettings).signUpEnabled;
 211 | }
 212 | 
 213 | /**
 214 |  * Check if invite is required for sign-up
 215 |  */
 216 | export async function isInviteRequiredAction(): Promise<boolean> {
 217 | 	const settings = await getSettingsAction();
 218 | 	if (!settings.data) return false;
 219 | 	return (settings.data as AppSettings).requireInvite;
 220 | }

 222 | /**
 223 |  * Get max invite age in milliseconds
 224 |  */
 225 | export async function getMaxInviteAgeAction(): Promise<number> {
 226 | 	const settings = await getSettingsAction();
 227 | 	if (!settings.data) return 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000;
 228 | 	return (settings.data as AppSettings).maxInviteAge;
 229 | }

 234 | export async function canUserCreateInvitesAction(): Promise<boolean> {

 236 | 	if (!settings.data) return true;
 237 | 	return (settings.data as AppSettings).allowUserCreateInvites;
 238 | }

 243 | export async function getDefaultUserQuotaAction(): Promise<number> {
 244 | 	const settings = await getSettingsAction();
 245 | 	if (!settings.data) return 1024 * 1024 * 1024;
 246 | 	return (settings.data as AppSettings).defaultUserQuota;
 247 | }

 249 | /**
 250 |  * Get default user file count quota
 251 |  */
 252 | export async function getDefaultUserFileCountQuotaAction(): Promise<number> {
 253 | 	const settings = await getSettingsAction();
 254 | 	if (!settings.data) return 1000;
 255 | 	return (settings.data as AppSettings).defaultUserFileCountQuota;
 256 | }

 259 |  * Get default invites quota
 260 |  */
 261 | export async function getDefaultInvitesQuotaAction(): Promise<number> {
 262 | 	const settings = await getSettingsAction();
 263 | 	if (!settings.data) return 10;
 264 | 	return (settings.data as AppSettings).defaultInvitesQuota;
 265 | }
 266 | 
 267 | // ============================================================================
 268 | // File Validation Actions
 269 | // ============================================================================
 270 | 
 271 | /**
 272 |  * Validate file extension against blacklist
 273 |  */
 274 | export async function validateFileExtensionAction(filename: string) {
 275 | 	const validated = ValidateExtensionSchema.parse({ filename });
 276 | 
 277 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 278 | 		const settings = await getSettingsAction();
 279 | 		if (!settings.data) return { valid: true };
 280 | 
 281 | 		const blacklisted = (settings.data as AppSettings).blacklistedExtensions;
 282 | 		const isBlacklisted = configService.isExtensionBlacklisted(validated.filename, blacklisted);
 283 | 
 284 | 		return {
 285 | 			valid: !isBlacklisted,
 286 | 			isBlacklisted,
 287 | 			extension: validated.filename.split(".").pop()?.toLowerCase() ?? ""
 288 | 		};
 289 | 	});
 290 | }
 291 | 
 292 | /**
 293 |  * Validate file size against config limits
 294 |  */
 295 | export async function validateFileSizeAction(input: unknown) {
 296 | 	const validated = ValidateFileSizeSchema.parse(input);
 297 | 
 298 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 299 | 		const settings = await getSettingsAction();
 300 | 		if (!settings.data) {
 301 | 			return configService.validateFileSize(validated.size, Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY, Number.POSITIVE_INFINITY);
 302 | 		}
 303 | 
 304 | 		const appSettings = settings.data as AppSettings;
 305 | 		const maxSize = validated.maxSize ?? appSettings.uploadFileMaxSize;
 306 | 		const chunkSize = validated.chunkSize ?? appSettings.uploadFileChunkSize;
 307 | 
 308 | 		return configService.validateFileSize(validated.size, maxSize, chunkSize);
 309 | 	});
 310 | }
 311 | 
 312 | /**
 313 |  * Get upload limits
 314 |  */
 315 | export async function getUploadLimitsAction() {
 316 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 317 | 		const settings = await getSettingsAction();
 318 | 		if (!settings.data) {
 319 | 			return {
 320 | 				maxSize: 1024 * 1024 * 1024 * 5,
 321 | 				chunkSize: 1024 * 1024 * 25,
 322 | 				allowedExtensions: []
 323 | 			};
 324 | 		}
 325 | 
 326 | 		const appSettings = settings.data as AppSettings;
 327 | 		const blacklistedExtensions = configService.validateBlacklistedExtensions(appSettings.blacklistedExtensions);
 328 | 
 329 | 		return {
 330 | 			maxSize: appSettings.uploadFileMaxSize,
 331 | 			chunkSize: appSettings.uploadFileChunkSize,
 332 | 			blacklistedExtensions,
 333 | 			cdnUrl: appSettings.cdnUrl
 334 | 		};
 335 | 	});
 336 | }
 337 | 
 338 | // ============================================================================
 339 | // Utility Actions
 340 | // ============================================================================
 341 | 
 342 | /**
 343 |  * Get blacklisted extensions as array
 344 |  */
 345 | export async function getBlacklistedExtensionsAction(): Promise<string[]> {
 346 | 	const settings = await getSettingsAction();
 347 | 	if (!settings.data) return [];
 348 | 	return configService.validateBlacklistedExtensions((settings.data as AppSettings).blacklistedExtensions);
 349 | }
 350 | 
 351 | /**
 352 |  * Get CDN URL
 353 |  */
 354 | export async function getCdnUrlAction(): Promise<string> {
 355 | 	const settings = await getSettingsAction();
 356 | 	if (!settings.data) return "";
 357 | 	return (settings.data as AppSettings).cdnUrl;
 358 | }
 359 | 
 360 | /**
 361 |  * Get base URL
 362 |  */
 363 | export async function getBaseUrlAction(): Promise<string> {
 364 | 	const settings = await getSettingsAction();
 365 | 	if (!settings.data) return process.env.AUTH_BASE_URL ?? "";
 366 | 	return (settings.data as AppSettings).baseUrl;
 367 | }
 368 | 
 369 | /**
 370 |  * Get app name
 371 |  */
 372 | export async function getAppNameAction(): Promise<string> {
 373 | 	const settings = await getSettingsAction();
 374 | 	if (!settings.data) return process.env.APP_NAME ?? "";
 375 | 	return (settings.data as AppSettings).appName;
 376 | }
 377 | 
 378 | /**
 379 |  * Merge user config with defaults
 380 |  */
 381 | export function mergeWithDefaultsAction(userConfig: Partial<AppSettings>): AppSettings {
 382 | 	return configService.mergeWithDefaults(userConfig);
 383 | }
```
