`actions/patient.action.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/actions/patient.action.ts
   2 | // Thin Controller - Only validation and orchestration for patient operations
   3 | 
   4 | import { z } from "zod";
   5 | 
   6 | import { patientRepo } from "../queries/patient.repo";
   7 | import { safeDbQuery } from "../helper";
   8 | import { PatientCreateSchema, PatientUpdateSchema } from "../zod";
   9 | 
  10 | // ============================================================================
  11 | // Validation Schemas
  12 | // ============================================================================
  13 | 
  14 | const GetPatientQuerySchema = z.object({
  15 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  16 | 	patientId: z.string().min(1)
  17 | });
  18 | 
  19 | const ListPatientsQuerySchema = z.object({
  20 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  21 | 	page: z.coerce.number().int().min(1).default(1),
  22 | 	limit: z.coerce.number().int().min(1).max(100).default(10),
  23 | 	search: z.string().optional(),
  24 | 	status: z.enum(["ACTIVE", "INACTIVE", "PENDING", "SUSPENDED"]).optional(),
  25 | 	gender: z.enum(["MALE", "FEMALE", "OTHER"]).optional(),
  26 | 	bloodGroup: z
  27 | 		.enum([
  28 | 			"A_POSITIVE",
  29 | 			"A_NEGATIVE",
  30 | 			"B_POSITIVE",
  31 | 			"B_NEGATIVE",
  32 | 			"O_POSITIVE",
  33 | 			"O_NEGATIVE",
  34 | 			"AB_POSITIVE",
  35 | 			"AB_NEGATIVE"
  36 | 		])
  37 | 		.optional(),
  38 | 	isActive: z.boolean().optional()
  39 | });
  40 | 
  41 | const CreatePatientGuardianSchema = z.object({
  42 | 	patient: PatientCreateSchema,
  43 | 	guardian: z
  44 | 		.object({
  45 | 			id: z.string().uuid().optional(),
  46 | 			userId: z.string().uuid(),
  47 | 			relation: z.string().min(1),
  48 | 			isPrimary: z.boolean().default(true),
  49 | 			phone: z.string().optional(),
  50 | 			email: z.string().email().optional()
  51 | 		})
  52 | 		.optional()
  53 | });
  54 | 
  55 | const BulkPatientUpdateSchema = z.object({
  56 | 	patientIds: z.array(z.string().min(1)).min(1),
  57 | 	updates: z.object({
  58 | 		status: z.enum(["ACTIVE", "INACTIVE", "PENDING", "SUSPENDED"]).optional(),
  59 | 		isActive: z.boolean().optional()
  60 | 	})
  61 | });
  62 | 
  63 | const PatientStatsQuerySchema = z.object({
  64 | 	clinicId: z.string().min(1),
  65 | 	startDate: z.coerce.date().optional(),
  66 | 	endDate: z.coerce.date().optional()
  67 | });
  68 | 
  69 | // ============================================================================
  70 | // Action Functions
  71 | // ============================================================================
  72 | 
  73 | /**
  74 |  * Create a new patient
  75 |  */
  76 | export async function createPatientAction(input: unknown) {
  77 | 	const validated = PatientCreateSchema.parse(input);
  78 | 
  79 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
  80 | 		// Validate patient data
  81 | 		const validation = patientRepo.validatePatientData(validated);
  82 | 		if (!validation.valid) {
  83 | 			throw new Error(validation.error);
  84 | 		}
  85 | 
  86 | 		// Check for duplicate MRN if provided
  87 | 		if (validated.mrn) {
  88 | 			const existing = await patientRepo.getPatientByMRN(validated.mrn, validated.clinicId);
  89 | 			if (existing) {
  90 | 				throw new Error("Patient with this MRN already exists");
  91 | 			}
  92 | 		}
  93 | 
  94 | 		// Generate MRN if not provided
  95 | 		const mrn = validated.mrn || (await patientRepo.generateMRN(validated.clinicId));
  96 | 
  97 | 		const patient = await patientRepo.createPatient({
  98 | 			...validated,
  99 | 			mrn,
 100 | 			createdAt: new Date(),
 101 | 			updatedAt: new Date()
 102 | 		});
 103 | 
 104 | 		return patient;
 105 | 	});
 106 | }
 107 | 
 108 | /**
 109 |  * Create patient with guardian in one transaction
 110 |  */
 111 | export async function createPatientWithGuardianAction(input: unknown) {
 112 | 	const validated = CreatePatientGuardianSchema.parse(input);
 113 | 
 114 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 115 | 		const guardianData = validated.guardian
 116 | 			? {
 117 | 					...validated.guardian,
 118 | 					id: validated.guardian.id || crypto.randomUUID()
 119 | 				}
 120 | 			: undefined;
 121 | 
 122 | 		const patient = await patientRepo.createPatientWithGuardian(validated.patient, guardianData);
 123 | 		return patient;
 124 | 	});
 125 | }
 126 | 
 127 | /**
 128 |  * Update existing patient
 129 |  */
 130 | export async function updatePatientAction(input: unknown) {
 131 | 	const validated = PatientUpdateSchema.parse(input);
 132 | 
 133 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 134 | 		const existing = await patientRepo.getPatientById(validated.id ?? "", validated.clinicId ?? "");
 135 | 		if (!existing) {
 136 | 			throw new Error("Patient not found");
 137 | 		}
 138 | 
 139 | 		const updated = await patientRepo.updatePatient(validated.id ?? "", validated);
 140 | 		if (!updated) {
 141 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update patient");
 142 | 		}
 143 | 
 144 | 		return updated;
 145 | 	});
 146 | }
 147 | 
 148 | /**
 149 |  * Delete (soft delete) a patient
 150 |  */
 151 | export async function deletePatientAction(patientId: string, clinicId: string) {
 152 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 153 | 		const deleted = await patientRepo.softDeletePatient(patientId, clinicId);
 154 | 		if (!deleted) {
 155 | 			throw new Error("Patient not found");
 156 | 		}
 157 | 		return { success: true, patientId };
 158 | 	});
 159 | }
 160 | 
 161 | /**
 162 |  * Get patient by ID with full history
 163 |  */
 164 | export async function getPatientByIdAction(patientId: string, clinicId: string) {
 165 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 166 | 		const patient = await patientRepo.getPatientById(patientId, clinicId);
 167 | 		if (!patient) {
 168 | 			throw new Error("Patient not found");
 169 | 		}
 170 | 		return patient;
 171 | 	});
 172 | }
 173 | 
 174 | /**
 175 |  * Get patient with full medical history
 176 |  */
 177 | export async function getPatientWithFullHistoryAction(patientId: string, clinicId: string) {
 178 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 179 | 		const patient = await patientRepo.getPatientWithFullHistory(patientId, clinicId);
 180 | 		if (!patient) {
 181 | 			throw new Error("Patient not found");
 182 | 		}
 183 | 		return patient;
 184 | 	});
 185 | }
 186 | 
 187 | /**
 188 |  * List patients with pagination and filters
 189 |  */
 190 | export async function listPatientsAction(input: unknown) {
 191 | 	const validated = ListPatientsQuerySchema.parse(input);
 192 | 
 193 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 194 | 		const offset = (validated.page - 1) * validated.limit;
 195 | 
 196 | 		const result = await patientRepo.listPatients({
 197 | 			clinicId: validated.clinicId,
 198 | 			limit: validated.limit,
 199 | 			offset,
 200 | 			search: validated.search,
 201 | 			status: validated.status,
 202 | 			isActive: validated.isActive,
 203 | 			gender: validated.gender,
 204 | 			bloodGroup: validated.bloodGroup
 205 | 		});
 206 | 
 207 | 		return {
 208 | 			...result,
 209 | 			page: validated.page,
 210 | 			limit: validated.limit,
 211 | 			totalPages: Math.ceil(result.total / validated.limit)
 212 | 		};
 213 | 	});
 214 | }
 215 | 
 216 | /**
 217 |  * Get patient statistics
 218 |  */
 219 | export async function getPatientStatsAction(input: unknown) {
 220 | 	const validated = PatientStatsQuerySchema.parse(input);
 221 | 
 222 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 223 | 		const stats = await patientRepo.getPatientStats(validated.clinicId);
 224 | 		return stats;
 225 | 	});
 226 | }
 227 | 
 228 | /**
 229 |  * Get patient by MRN
 230 |  */
 231 | export async function getPatientByMRNAction(mrn: string, clinicId: string) {
 232 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 233 | 		const patient = await patientRepo.getPatientByMRN(mrn, clinicId);
 234 | 		if (!patient) {
 235 | 			throw new Error("Patient not found with this MRN");
 236 | 		}
 237 | 		return patient;
 238 | 	});
 239 | }
 240 | 
 241 | /**
 242 |  * Bulk update patient statuses
 243 |  */
 244 | export async function bulkUpdatePatientStatusAction(input: unknown) {
 245 | 	const validated = BulkPatientUpdateSchema.parse(input);
 246 | 
 247 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 248 | 		const updated = await patientRepo.bulkUpdatePatientStatus(
 249 | 			validated.patientIds,
 250 | 			validated.updates.status || "ACTIVE"
 251 | 		);
 252 | 
 253 | 		return {
 254 | 			updatedCount: updated.length,
 255 | 			updatedPatients: updated
 256 | 		};
 257 | 	});
 258 | }
 259 | 
 260 | /**
 261 |  * Get patient upcoming appointments
 262 |  */
 263 | export async function getPatientUpcomingAppointmentsAction(patientId: string, clinicId: string) {
 264 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 265 | 		const appointments = await patientRepo.getPatientUpcomingAppointments(patientId, clinicId);
 266 | 		return appointments;
 267 | 	});
 268 | }
 269 | 
 270 | /**
 271 |  * Search patients across clinic
 272 |  */
 273 | export async function searchPatientsAction(clinicId: string, searchTerm: string, limit = 20) {
 274 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 275 | 		const patients = await patientRepo.searchPatients(clinicId, searchTerm);
 276 | 		return patients.slice(0, limit);
 277 | 	});
 278 | }
 279 | 
 280 | /**
 281 |  * Get patients by age range
 282 |  */
 283 | export async function getPatientsByAgeRangeAction(clinicId: string, minAgeMonths: number, maxAgeMonths: number) {
 284 | 	return safeDbQuery(async () => {
 285 | 		const patients = await patientRepo.getPatientsByAgeRange(clinicId, minAgeMonths, maxAgeMonths);
 286 | 		return patients;
 287 | 	});
 288 | }

```

`client.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { env } from "@clinic/env/server";
   2 | 
   3 | 
   4 | import path from "node:path";
   5 | 
   6 | import { sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   7 | import { drizzle } from "drizzle-orm/postgres-js";
   8 | import { migrate } from "drizzle-orm/postgres-js/migrator";
   9 | import postgres from "postgres";
  10 | 
  11 | 
  12 | import { relations } from "./schema/relations";
  13 | 
  14 | // Simple Logger Helper
  15 | const logger = {
  16 |   info: (msg: string, ...args: unknown[]) => console.log(`[DB-INFO] ${msg}`, ...args),
  17 |   warn: (msg: string, ...args: unknown[]) => console.warn(`[DB-WARN] ${msg}`, ...args),
  18 |   error: (msg: string, ...args: unknown[]) => console.error(`[DB-ERROR] ${msg}`, ...args),
  19 |   debug: (msg: string, ...args: unknown[]) =>
  20 |     env.NODE_ENV !== "production" && console.debug(`[DB-DEBUG] ${msg}`, ...args)
  21 | };
  22 | 
  23 | const globalForDb = globalThis as unknown as {
  24 |   client: postgres.Sql | undefined;
  25 | };
  26 | 
  27 | const client =
  28 |   globalForDb.client ??
  29 |   postgres(env.DATABASE_URL, {
  30 |     max: 10,
  31 |     idle_timeout: 20,
  32 |     connect_timeout: 10,
  33 |     max_lifetime: 1800
  34 |   });
  35 | 
  36 | if (env.NODE_ENV !== "production") globalForDb.client = client;
  37 | 
  38 | export const db = drizzle({
  39 |   client,
  40 |   relations,
  41 |   logger: env.NODE_ENV === "development"
  42 | });
  43 | 
  44 | export function createDb() {
  45 |   return drizzle({
  46 |     client: postgres(env.DATABASE_URL),
  47 |     relations
  48 |   });
  49 | }
  50 | 
  51 | export async function checkIsDbReady(): Promise<boolean> {
  52 |   try {
  53 |     await db.execute(sql`SELECT 1`);
  54 |     logger.debug("Database connection check successful");
  55 |     return true;
  56 |   } catch (error) {
  57 |     logger.error("Database connection check failed", error);
  58 |     return false;
  59 |   }
  60 | }
  61 | 
  62 | let migrationFnCalled = false;
  63 | 
  64 | export async function runMigrations(): Promise<void> {
  65 |   const fnName = "runMigrations";
  66 | 
  67 |   if (migrationFnCalled) {
  68 |     logger.debug(`[${fnName}] Skipping migration (already called)`);
  69 |     return;
  70 |   }
  71 | 
  72 |   migrationFnCalled = true;
  73 | 
  74 |   if (env.IS_BUILD) {
  75 |     logger.info(`[${fnName}] Skipping migrations during build process (NODE_ENV: ${env.NODE_ENV})`);
  76 |     return;
  77 |   }
  78 | 
  79 |   // Note: Usually you WANT to run migrations in production.
  80 |   // If you strictly want to skip them, keep this, but ensure your CI/CD handles it.
  81 |   if (env.NODE_ENV !== "production") {
  82 |     logger.info(`[${fnName}] Running in ${env.NODE_ENV}, applying migrations...`);
  83 |   } else {
  84 |     logger.info(`[${fnName}] Applying migrations for production...`);
  85 |   }
  86 | 
  87 |   const migrationsFolder = path.join(process.cwd(), "packages/db/src/migrations");
  88 | 
  89 |   try {
  90 |     logger.info(`[${fnName}] Starting migration process...`);
  91 |     await migrate(db, { migrationsFolder });
  92 |     logger.info(`[${fnName}] ✅ Database migration completed successfully`);
  93 |   } catch (error) {
  94 |     logger.error(`[${fnName}] ❌ Database migration failed`, error);
  95 |     throw error;
  96 |   }
  97 | }
  98 | 
  99 | export type DB = typeof db;
 100 | export type DBType = Parameters<Parameters<typeof db.transaction>[0]>[0];
 101 | export type DBorTx = DB | DBType;

```

`helper.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import type { AnyColumn } from "drizzle-orm";
   2 | import { sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | import { pgTableCreator, text, timestamp } from "drizzle-orm/pg-core";
   4 | 
   5 | import type { DbPrescribedItem } from "./schema/types";
   6 | import type { AdherenceItem, PrescriptionWithItems } from "./zod";
   7 | 
   8 | type AdherenceRecommendation = {
   9 | 	action: string;
  10 | 	message: string;
  11 | 	type: "adherence" | "positive";
  12 | };
  13 | 
  14 | type AdherenceDataPoint = {
  15 | 	adherenceRate: number;
  16 | 	drugId: string;
  17 | };
  18 | 
  19 | export function parseFrequency(frequency: string): number {
  20 | 	// Parse frequency string (e.g., "BID" = 2, "TID" = 3, "QD" = 1, "Q4H" = 6)
  21 | 	const frequencyMap: Record<string, number> = {
  22 | 		QD: 1,
  23 | 		BID: 2,
  24 | 		TID: 3,
  25 | 		QID: 4,
  26 | 		Q4H: 6,
  27 | 		Q6H: 4,
  28 | 		Q8H: 3,
  29 | 		Q12H: 2,
  30 | 		PRN: 2
  31 | 	};
  32 | 	return frequencyMap[frequency.toUpperCase()] ?? 2;
  33 | }
  34 | export function getAdherenceStatus(rate: number): string {
  35 | 	if (rate >= 80) return "good";
  36 | 	if (rate >= 50) return "moderate";
  37 | 	return "poor";
  38 | }
  39 | 
  40 | export function generateAdherenceRecommendations(adherenceData: AdherenceDataPoint[]) {
  41 | 	const recommendations: AdherenceRecommendation[] = [];
  42 | 	const poorAdherence = adherenceData.filter(d => d.adherenceRate < 50);
  43 | 
  44 | 	if (poorAdherence.length > 0) {
  45 | 		recommendations.push({
  46 | 			type: "adherence",
  47 | 			message: `Poor adherence detected for ${poorAdherence.length} medication(s)`,
  48 | 			action: "Schedule medication counseling session"
  49 | 		});
  50 | 	}
  51 | 
  52 | 	const highAdherence = adherenceData.filter(d => d.adherenceRate >= 80);
  53 | 	if (highAdherence.length > 0) {
  54 | 		recommendations.push({
  55 | 			type: "positive",
  56 | 			message: `Good adherence for ${highAdherence.length} medication(s)`,
  57 | 			action: "Continue current regimen"
  58 | 		});
  59 | 	}
  60 | 
  61 | 	return recommendations;
  62 | }
  63 | 
  64 | export function groupByMonth(prescriptions: PrescriptionWithItems[]) {
  65 | 	const monthMap = new Map();
  66 | 
  67 | 	for (const prescription of prescriptions) {
  68 | 		const month = prescription.issuedDate.toISOString().slice(0, 7);
  69 | 		if (!monthMap.has(month)) {
  70 | 			monthMap.set(month, {
  71 | 				month,
  72 | 				prescriptionCount: 0,
  73 | 				totalItems: 0
  74 | 			});
  75 | 		}
  76 | 
  77 | 		const stats = monthMap.get(month);
  78 | 		stats.prescriptionCount++;
  79 | 		stats.totalItems += prescription.prescribedItems.length;
  80 | 	}
  81 | 
  82 | 	return Array.from(monthMap.entries())
  83 | 		.map(([_, stats]) => stats)
  84 | 		.sort((a, b) => a.month.localeCompare(b.month));
  85 | }
  86 | 
  87 | export function calculateDaysSupply(item: DbPrescribedItem): number {
  88 | 	const quantity = item.dosageValue || 0;
  89 | 	const dosagePerDay = (item.dosageValue || 0) * parseFrequency(item.frequency);
  90 | 	return dosagePerDay > 0 ? Math.floor(quantity / dosagePerDay) : 0;
  91 | }
  92 | 
  93 | export function calculateRefillInterval(item: DbPrescribedItem): number {
  94 | 	// Calculate when next refill is due (typically 80% of days supply)
  95 | 	const daysSupply = calculateDaysSupply(item);
  96 | 	return Math.floor(daysSupply * 0.8);
  97 | }
  98 | 
  99 | type DoctorStats = {
 100 | 	doctorName: string | undefined;
 101 | 	prescriptionCount: number;
 102 | 	uniquePatients: Set<string>;
 103 | 	totalItems: number;
 104 | };
 105 | 
 106 | export function groupByDoctor(
 107 | 	prescriptions: (PrescriptionWithItems & {
 108 | 		doctor?: { name: string } | null;
 109 | 	})[]
 110 | ) {
 111 | 	const doctorMap = new Map<string, DoctorStats>();
 112 | 
 113 | 	for (const prescription of prescriptions) {
 114 | 		const doctorId = prescription.doctorId;
 115 | 		if (!doctorMap.has(doctorId ?? "")) {
 116 | 			doctorMap.set(doctorId ?? "", {
 117 | 				doctorName: prescription.doctor?.name,
 118 | 				prescriptionCount: 0,
 119 | 				uniquePatients: new Set(),
 120 | 				totalItems: 0
 121 | 			});
 122 | 		}
 123 | 
 124 | 		const stats = doctorMap.get(doctorId ?? "");
 125 | 		if (!stats) continue;
 126 | 		stats.prescriptionCount++;
 127 | 		stats.uniquePatients.add(prescription.patientId);
 128 | 		stats.totalItems += prescription.prescribedItems.length;
 129 | 	}
 130 | 
 131 | 	return Array.from(doctorMap.entries()).map(([id, stats]) => {
 132 | 		return {
 133 | 			doctorId: id,
 134 | 			...stats,
 135 | 			uniquePatients: stats.uniquePatients.size
 136 | 		};
 137 | 	});
 138 | }
 139 | 
 140 | export function groupByDrug(prescriptions: PrescriptionWithItems[]) {
 141 | 	const drugMap = new Map<
 142 | 		string,
 143 | 		{
 144 | 			drugName: string | undefined;
 145 | 			prescriptionCount: number;
 146 | 			totalDoses: number;
 147 | 			totalQuantity: number;
 148 | 		}
 149 | 	>();
 150 | 
 151 | 	for (const prescription of prescriptions) {
 152 | 		for (const item of prescription.prescribedItems) {
 153 | 			const drugId = item.drugId;
 154 | 			if (!drugMap.has(drugId)) {
 155 | 				drugMap.set(drugId, {
 156 | 					drugName: item.drug?.name,
 157 | 					prescriptionCount: 0,
 158 | 					totalDoses: 0,
 159 | 					totalQuantity: 0
 160 | 				});
 161 | 			}
 162 | 
 163 | 			const stats = drugMap.get(drugId);
 164 | 			if (!stats) continue;
 165 | 			stats.prescriptionCount++;
 166 | 			stats.totalDoses += item.dosageValue || 0;
 167 | 			// Note: prescribedItem doesn't have a 'quantity' field, using dosageValue as total quantity
 168 | 			stats.totalQuantity += item.dosageValue || 0;
 169 | 		}
 170 | 	}
 171 | 
 172 | 	return Array.from(drugMap.entries())
 173 | 		.map(([id, stats]) => {
 174 | 			return {
 175 | 				drugId: id,
 176 | 				...stats
 177 | 			};
 178 | 		})
 179 | 		.sort((a, b) => b.prescriptionCount - a.prescriptionCount);
 180 | }
 181 | 
 182 | export const createTable = pgTableCreator(name => `${name}`);
 183 | 
 184 | export const timestamps = {
 185 | 	deletedAt: timestamp("deleted_at", {
 186 | 		withTimezone: true,
 187 | 		mode: "string"
 188 | 	}),
 189 | 	createdAt: timestamp("created_at", {
 190 | 		withTimezone: true,
 191 | 		mode: "string"
 192 | 	})
 193 | 		.defaultNow()
 194 | 		.notNull(),
 195 | 	updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at", {
 196 | 		withTimezone: true,
 197 | 		mode: "string"
 198 | 	}).defaultNow()
 199 | };

 201 | /**
 202 |  * Allows a single database instance for multiple projects.
 203 |  * @see https://orm.drizzle.team/docs/goodies#multi-project-schema
 204 |  */
 205 | 
 206 | export function takeFirstOrNull<TData>(data: Array<TData>) {
 207 | 	return data[0] ?? null;
 208 | }
 209 | 
 210 | export function takeFirstOrThrow<TData>(data: Array<TData>, errorMessage?: string) {
 211 | 	const first = takeFirstOrNull(data);
 212 | 
 213 | 	if (!first) {
 214 | 		throw new Error(errorMessage ?? "Item not found");
 215 | 	}
 216 | 
 217 | 	return first;
 218 | }
 219 | 
 220 | export function isEmpty<TColumn extends AnyColumn>(column: TColumn) {
 221 | 	return sql<boolean>`
 222 |     case
 223 |       when ${column} is null then true
 224 |       when ${column} = '' then true
 225 |       when ${column}::text = '[]' then true
 226 |       when ${column}::text = '{}' then true
 227 |       else false
 228 |     end
 229 |   `;
 230 | }
 231 | 
 232 | /**
 233 |  * Converts camelCase to snake_case
 234 |  * @param str - The camelCase string to convert
 235 |  * @returns The snake_case version of the string
 236 |  */
 237 | function toSnakeCase(str: string): string {
 238 | 	return str.replace(/[A-Z]/g, letter => `_${letter.toLowerCase()}`);
 239 | }
 240 | 
 241 | /**
 242 |  * Creates a key-value for file upload columns
 243 |  * @param columnPrefix - The prefix for the column names in camelCase (e.g., 'offeringDocument', 'profilePicture')
 244 |  * @returns Object with only url column
 245 |  */
 246 | export function createFileUrlColumn<T extends string>(columnPrefix: T) {
 247 | 	const snakeCase = toSnakeCase(columnPrefix);
 248 | 	return {
 249 | 		[`${columnPrefix}Url`]: text(`${snakeCase}_url`)
 250 | 	} as Record<`${T}Url`, ReturnType<typeof text>>;
 251 | }
 252 | 
 253 | /**
 254 |  * Creates a key-value for NOT NULL file upload columns
 255 |  * @param columnPrefix - The prefix for the column names in camelCase (e.g., 'offeringDocument', 'profilePicture')
 256 |  * @returns Object with only NOT NULL url column
 257 |  */
 258 | export function createRequiredFileUrlColumn<T extends string>(columnPrefix: T) {
 259 | 	const snakeCase = toSnakeCase(columnPrefix);
 260 | 	return {
 261 | 		[`${columnPrefix}Url`]: text(`${snakeCase}_url`).notNull()
 262 | 	} as Record<`${T}Url`, ReturnType<ReturnType<typeof text>["notNull"]>>;
 263 | }
 264 | 
 265 | /**
 266 |  * Creates a pair of columns for file uploads (fileName and url)
 267 |  * @param columnPrefix - The prefix for the column names in camelCase (e.g., 'offeringDocument', 'profilePicture')
 268 |  * @returns Object with fileName and url columns
 269 |  */
 270 | export function createFileColumns<T extends string>(columnPrefix: T) {
 271 | 	const snakeCase = toSnakeCase(columnPrefix);
 272 | 	return {
 273 | 		[`${columnPrefix}FileName`]: text(`${snakeCase}_file_name`),
 274 | 		[`${columnPrefix}Url`]: text(`${snakeCase}_url`)
 275 | 	} as Record<`${T}FileName` | `${T}Url`, ReturnType<typeof text>>;
 276 | }
 277 | 
 278 | /** * Creates a pair of NOT NULL columns for file uploads (fileName and url)
 279 |  * @param columnPrefix - The prefix for the column names in camelCase (e.g., 'offeringDocument', 'profilePicture')
 280 |  * @returns Object with NOT NULL fileName and url columns
 281 |  */
 282 | export function createRequiredFileColumns<T extends string>(columnPrefix: T) {
 283 | 	const snakeCase = toSnakeCase(columnPrefix);
 284 | 	return {
 285 | 		[`${columnPrefix}FileName`]: text(`${snakeCase}_file_name`).notNull(),
 286 | 		[`${columnPrefix}Url`]: text(`${snakeCase}_url`).notNull()
 287 | 	} as Record<`${T}FileName` | `${T}Url`, ReturnType<ReturnType<typeof text>["notNull"]>>;
 288 | }
 289 | 
 290 | // Helper functions
 291 | export function calculateAdherenceMetrics(prescribedItems: AdherenceItem[]) {
 292 | 	let totalAdherence = 0;
 293 | 	let count = 0;
 294 | 
 295 | 	for (const item of prescribedItems) {
 296 | 		const expectedDoses = calculateExpectedDoses(
 297 | 			item,
 298 | 			item.prescription?.issuedDate ?? new Date(),
 299 | 			item.prescription?.validUntil ?? new Date()
 300 | 		);
 301 | 		const dispensedDoses =
 302 | 			item.dispenses?.reduce(
 303 | 				(sum: number, dispense: { quantityDispensed: number }) =>
 304 | 					sum + dispense.quantityDispensed / (item.dosageValue || 1),
 305 | 				0
 306 | 			) ?? 0;
 307 | 
 308 | 		const adherence = expectedDoses > 0 ? (dispensedDoses / expectedDoses) * 100 : 0;
 309 | 		totalAdherence += adherence;
 310 | 		count++;
 311 | 	}
 312 | 
 313 | 	return {
 314 | 		overallAdherence: count > 0 ? totalAdherence / count : 0,
 315 | 		status: getAdherenceStatus(totalAdherence / count)
 316 | 	};
 317 | }
 318 | 
 319 | export function calculateExpectedDoses(item: AdherenceItem, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) {
 320 | 	const days = Math.ceil((endDate.getTime() - startDate.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
 321 | 	const frequencyPerDay = parseFrequency(item.frequency);
 322 | 	return days * frequencyPerDay * (item.dosageValue || 1);
 323 | }
 324 | 
 325 | /**
 326 |  * Standardized Database Result Wrapper
 327 |  */
 328 | export async function safeDbQuery<T>(queryFn: () => Promise<T>): Promise<{ data: T | null; error: string | null }> {
 329 | 	try {
 330 | 		const result = await queryFn();
 331 | 		return { data: result, error: null };
 332 | 	} catch (err) {
 333 | 		console.error("[DATABASE_ERROR]:", err);
 334 | 		return {
 335 | 			data: null,
 336 | 			error: err instanceof Error ? err.message : "An unexpected database error occurred"
 337 | 		};
 338 | 	}
 339 | }
```

`index.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // 1. Export the database client and types from your client setup
   2 | export * from "./client";
   3 | 
   4 | // 2. Import everything from your new schema directory
   5 | // This provides access to all table definitions for queries/actions
   6 | import * as schema from "./schema";
   7 | 
   8 | // 4. Optionally re-export specific types if you use them frequently
   9 | export * from "./schema/types";
  10 | 
  11 | // 3. Export the schema object for use in Drizzle queries (e.g., db.query.user...)
  12 | export { schema };

```

`queries/admin.repo.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { and, eq, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   2 | 
   3 | import { type DBorTx, db } from "../client";
   4 | import type { AppointmentStatus, DbAppointment, Role } from "../schema";
   5 | import * as schema from "../schema";
   6 | 
   7 | export const adminRepo = {
   8 | 	/**
   9 | 	 * Get raw counts of appointments grouped by status for a specific clinic.
  10 | 	 */
  11 | 	async getAppointmentCountsByStatus(clinicId: string) {
  12 | 		return await db
  13 | 			.select({
  14 | 				status: schema.appointment.status,
  15 | 				count: sql<number>`count(*)::int`
  16 | 			})
  17 | 			.from(schema.appointment)
  18 | 			.where(eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId))
  19 | 			.groupBy(schema.appointment.status);
  20 | 	},
  21 | 	async setDefaultClinic(clinicId: string) {
  22 | 		// First, unset any existing default clinic
  23 | 		await db.update(schema.clinic).set({ isDefault: false }).where(eq(schema.clinic.isDefault, true));
  24 | 		// Then, set the new default clinic
  25 | 		const [updatedClinic] = await db
  26 | 			.update(schema.clinic)
  27 | 			.set({ isDefault: true })
  28 | 			.where(eq(schema.clinic.id, clinicId))
  29 | 			.returning();
  30 | 		return updatedClinic;
  31 | 	},
  32 | 	async getConfigValue(key: string) {
  33 | 		const result = await db.query.configStore.findFirst({
  34 | 			where: { key }
  35 | 		});
  36 | 		return result?.value || null;
  37 | 	},
  38 | 	async bulkUpdateAppointmentsStatus(appointmentIds: string[], status: AppointmentStatus, reason?: string) {
  39 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
  40 | 			const updatedAppointments = await tx
  41 | 				.update(schema.appointment)
  42 | 				.set({
  43 | 					status,
  44 | 					reason,
  45 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
  46 | 				})
  47 | 				.where(sql`${schema.appointment.id} IN (${appointmentIds.map(id => sql`${id}`).join(", ")})`)
  48 | 				.returning();
  49 | 
  50 | 			// Optionally, you could also log these changes in an audit table here
  51 | 
  52 | 			return updatedAppointments;
  53 | 		});
  54 | 	},
  55 | 	async cancelExistingAppointment(appointmentId: string, clinicId: string, reason?: string) {
  56 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
  57 | 			const [updatedAppointment] = await tx
  58 | 				.update(schema.appointment)
  59 | 				.set({
  60 | 					status: "CANCELLED",
  61 | 					reason,
  62 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
  63 | 				})
  64 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.id, appointmentId), eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId)))
  65 | 				.returning();
  66 | 
  67 | 			if (!updatedAppointment) {
  68 | 				throw new Error("Appointment not found or already cancelled");
  69 | 			}
  70 | 
  71 | 			// Optionally, you could also log this cancellation in an audit table here
  72 | 
  73 | 			return updatedAppointment;
  74 | 		});
  75 | 	},
  76 | 	async updateExistingAppointment(id: string, data: Partial<DbAppointment> & { id: string; clinicId: string }) {
  77 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
  78 | 			const [updatedAppointment] = await tx
  79 | 				.update(schema.appointment)
  80 | 				.set({
  81 | 					...data,
  82 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
  83 | 				})
  84 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.id, id), eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, data.clinicId)))
  85 | 				.returning();
  86 | 
  87 | 			if (!updatedAppointment) {
  88 | 				throw new Error("Appointment not found or update failed");
  89 | 			}
  90 | 
  91 | 			// Optionally, you could also log this update in an audit table here
  92 | 
  93 | 			return updatedAppointment;
  94 | 		});
  95 | 	},
  96 | 	async rescheduleExistingAppointment(id: string, newDate: Date, clinicId: string) {
  97 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
  98 | 			const [updatedAppointment] = await tx
  99 | 				.update(schema.appointment)
 100 | 				.set({
 101 | 					appointmentDate: newDate,
 102 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 103 | 				})
 104 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.id, id), eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId)))
 105 | 				.returning();
 106 | 
 107 | 			if (!updatedAppointment) {
 108 | 				throw new Error("Appointment not found or reschedule failed");
 109 | 			}
 110 | 
 111 | 			// Optionally, you could also log this rescheduling in an audit table here
 112 | 
 113 | 			return updatedAppointment;
 114 | 		});
 115 | 	},
 116 | 	async getMonthlyAppointmentData(clinicId: string) {
 117 | 		return await db
 118 | 			.select({
 119 | 				month: sql<string>`to_char(${schema.appointment.appointmentDate}, 'Mon')`,
 120 | 				appointments: sql<number>`count(*)::int`,
 121 | 				monthOrder: sql<Date>`date_trunc('month', ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate})`
 122 | 			})
 123 | 			.from(schema.appointment)
 124 | 			.where(
 125 | 				and(
 126 | 					eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
 127 | 					sql`${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} >= date_trunc('year', CURRENT_DATE)`
 128 | 				)
 129 | 			)
 130 | 			.groupBy(
 131 | 				sql`date_trunc('month', ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate})`,
 132 | 				sql`to_char(${schema.appointment.appointmentDate}, 'Mon')`
 133 | 			)
 134 | 			.orderBy(sql`date_trunc('month', ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate})`);
 135 | 	},
```

`queries/analytics.repo.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { and, count, eq, gte, lte, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   2 | 
   3 | import { type DBorTx, db } from "../client";
   4 | 
   5 | import * as schema from "../schema";
   6 | export const analyticsRepo = {
   7 | 	async getAppointmentsInRange(clinicId: string, start: Date, end: Date) {
   8 | 		return await db.query.appointment.findMany({
   9 | 			where: {
  10 | 				clinicId: clinicId,
  11 | 				appointmentDate: {
  12 | 					gte: start,
  13 | 					lte: end
  14 | 				}
  15 | 			}
  16 | 		});
  17 | 	},
  18 | 
  19 | 	async getClinicRevenue(clinicId: string, start: Date, end: Date) {
  20 | 		// Assuming a reporting view or standard aggregation
  21 | 		return await db
  22 | 			.select({ total: sql<number>`SUM(price)` })
  23 | 			.from(schema.appointment)
  24 | 			.where(
  25 | 				and(
  26 | 					eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
  27 | 					gte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, start),
  28 | 					lte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, end)
  29 | 				)
  30 | 			);
  31 | 	},
  32 | 	/**
  33 | 	 * Get appointments grouped by status counts
  34 | 	 */
  35 | 	async getAppointmentCountsByStatus(clinicId: string, startDate?: Date, endDate?: Date, tx?: DBorTx) {
  36 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  37 | 		const conditions = [eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false)];
  38 | 
  39 | 		if (startDate) conditions.push(gte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, startDate));
  40 | 		if (endDate) conditions.push(lte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, endDate));
  41 | 
  42 | 		const results = await client
  43 | 			.select({
  44 | 				status: schema.appointment.status,
  45 | 				count: count()
  46 | 			})
  47 | 			.from(schema.appointment)
  48 | 			.where(and(...conditions))
  49 | 			.groupBy(schema.appointment.status);
  50 | 
  51 | 		return results.reduce(
  52 | 			(acc, curr) => {
  53 | 				if (curr.status) acc[curr.status] = Number(curr.count);
  54 | 				return acc;
  55 | 			},
  56 | 			{} as Record<string, number>
  57 | 		);
  58 | 	},
  59 | 
  60 | 	/**
  61 | 	 * Get monthly appointment data for a clinic
  62 | 	 */
  63 | 	async getMonthlyAppointmentData(clinicId: string, year: number, tx?: DBorTx) {
  64 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  65 | 		return client
  66 | 			.select({
  67 | 				month: sql<number>`EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate})`,
  68 | 				count: count(),
  69 | 				totalRevenue: sql<number>`SUM(${schema.appointment.appointmentPrice})`
  70 | 			})
  71 | 			.from(schema.appointment)
  72 | 			.where(
  73 | 				and(
  74 | 					eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
  75 | 					eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false),
  76 | 					sql`EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate}) = ${year}`
  77 | 				)
  78 | 			)
  79 | 			.groupBy(sql`EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate})`)
  80 | 			.orderBy(sql`EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate})`);
  81 | 	},
  82 | 
  83 | 	/**
  84 | 	 * Get new patients count for a date range
  85 | 	 */
  86 | 	async getNewPatientsCount(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, tx?: DBorTx) {
  87 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  88 | 		return client.$count(
  89 | 			schema.patient,
  90 | 			and(
  91 | 				eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId),
  92 | 				eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false),
  93 | 				gte(schema.patient.createdAt, startDate),
  94 | 				lte(schema.patient.createdAt, endDate)
  95 | 			)
  96 | 		);
  97 | 	},
  98 | 
  99 | 	/**
 100 | 	 * Get patients with their creation dates
 101 | 	 */
 102 | 	async getPatientsInDateRange(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, tx?: DBorTx) {
 103 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 104 | 		return client.query.patient.findMany({
 105 | 			where: {
 106 | 				clinicId,
 107 | 				isDeleted: false,
 108 | 				createdAt: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 109 | 			},
 110 | 			columns: {
 111 | 				id: true,
 112 | 				createdAt: true,
 113 | 				firstName: true,
 114 | 				lastName: true
 115 | 			}
 116 | 		});
 117 | 	},
 118 | 
 119 | 	/**
 120 | 	 * Get demographic data for patients
 121 | 	 */
 122 | 	async getPatientDemographics(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, tx?: DBorTx) {
 123 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 124 | 		return client.query.patient.findMany({
 125 | 			where: {
 126 | 				clinicId,
 127 | 				isDeleted: false,
 128 | 				createdAt: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 129 | 			},
 130 | 			columns: {
 131 | 				id: true,
 132 | 				gender: true,
 133 | 				dateOfBirth: true,
 134 | 				createdAt: true
 135 | 			}
 136 | 		});
 137 | 	},
 138 | 
 139 | 	/**
 140 | 	 * Get vaccine inventory status for immunization metrics
 141 | 	 */
 142 | 	async getVaccineInventoryStatus(clinicId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 143 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 144 | 		const inventory = await client.query.vaccineInventory.findMany({
 145 | 			where: { clinicId },
 146 | 			orderBy: { expirationDate: "asc" }
 147 | 		});
 148 | 
 149 | 		const now = new Date();
 150 | 		const expiringSoon = inventory.filter(v => {
 151 | 			const daysUntilExpiry = Math.ceil(
 152 | 				((v.expirationDate?.getTime() ?? now.getTime()) - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
 153 | 			);
 154 | 			return daysUntilExpiry <= 30 && daysUntilExpiry > 0;
 155 | 		});
 156 | 
 157 | 		const expired = inventory.filter(v => v.expirationDate && v.expirationDate < now);
 158 | 		const lowStock = inventory.filter(v => v.quantity < 10);
 159 | 
 160 | 		return {
 161 | 			totalVaccines: inventory.length,
 162 | 			totalDoses: inventory.reduce((sum, v) => sum + (v.quantity ?? 0), 0),
 163 | 			expiringSoon,
 164 | 			expired,
 165 | 			lowStock,
 166 | 			inventoryByVaccine: inventory
 167 | 		};
 168 | 	},
 169 | 
 170 | 	/**
 171 | 	 * Get overdue immunizations
 172 | 	 */
 173 | 	async getOverdueImmunizations(clinicId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 174 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 175 | 		return client.query.immunization.findMany({
 176 | 			where: {
 177 | 				clinicId,
 178 | 				isDeleted: false,
 179 | 				status: "OVERDUE"
 180 | 			},
 181 | 			with: {
 182 | 				patient: {
 183 | 					with: {
 184 | 						guardians: true
 185 | 					}
 186 | 				}
 187 | 			},
 188 | 			orderBy: { date: "asc" }
 189 | 		});
 190 | 	},
 191 | 
 192 | 	/**
 193 | 	 * Get prescriptions for analytics
 194 | 	 */
 195 | 	async getPrescriptionsForAnalytics(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, tx?: DBorTx) {
 196 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 197 | 		return client.query.prescription.findMany({
 198 | 			where: {
 199 | 				clinicId,
 200 | 				issuedDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 201 | 			},
 202 | 			with: {
 203 | 				prescribedItems: {
 204 | 					with: {
 205 | 						drug: true
 206 | 					}
 207 | 				},
 208 | 				doctor: true
 209 | 			}
 210 | 		});
 211 | 	},
 212 | 
 213 | 	/**
 214 | 	 * Get top conditions by prevalence
 215 | 	 */
 216 | 	async getTopConditions(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, limit = 10, tx?: DBorTx) {
 217 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 218 | 		const diagnoses = await client.query.diagnosis.findMany({
 219 | 			where: {
 220 | 				clinicId,
 221 | 				date: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate },
 222 | 				isDeleted: false
 223 | 			},
 224 | 			columns: {
 225 | 				diagnosis: true
 226 | 			}
 227 | 		});
 228 | 
 229 | 		// Count occurrences of each diagnosis
 230 | 		const conditionCounts = new Map<string, number>();
 231 | 		for (const d of diagnoses) {
 232 | 			if (d.diagnosis) {
 233 | 				const count = conditionCounts.get(d.diagnosis) || 0;
 234 | 				conditionCounts.set(d.diagnosis, count + 1);
 235 | 			}
 236 | 		}
 237 | 
 238 | 		const totalPatients = await this.getNewPatientsCount(clinicId, startDate, endDate, tx);
 239 | 
 240 | 		return Array.from(conditionCounts.entries())
 241 | 			.map(([condition, count]) => ({
 242 | 				condition,
 243 | 				prevalence: totalPatients > 0 ? (count / totalPatients) * 100 : 0,
 244 | 				affectedPatients: count
 245 | 			}))
 246 | 			.sort((a, b) => b.prevalence - a.prevalence)
 247 | 			.slice(0, limit);
 248 | 	},
 249 | 
 250 | 	/**
 251 | 	 * Get seasonal pattern data
 252 | 	 */
 253 | 	async getSeasonalAppointmentData(clinicId: string, year: number, tx?: DBorTx) {
 254 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 255 | 		const seasons = [
 256 | 			{ name: "Winter", months: [12, 1, 2] },
 257 | 			{ name: "Spring", months: [3, 4, 5] },
 258 | 			{ name: "Summer", months: [6, 7, 8] },
 259 | 			{ name: "Fall", months: [9, 10, 11] }
 260 | 		];
 261 | 
 262 | 		const seasonData = [];
 263 | 		for (const season of seasons) {
 264 | 			const appointments = await client.query.appointment.findMany({
 265 | 				where: {
 266 | 					clinicId,
 267 | 					isDeleted: false,
 268 | 					appointmentDate: {
 269 | 						gte: new Date(year, season.months[0] ?? 0 - 1, 1),
 270 | 						lte: new Date(year, season.months[season.months.length - 1] ?? 0, 31)
 271 | 					}
 272 | 				},
 273 | 				with: {
 274 | 					encounters: true
 275 | 				}
 276 | 			});
 277 | 
 278 | 			seasonData.push({
 279 | 				season: season.name,
 280 | 				totalAppointments: appointments.length,
 281 | 				conditions: appointments
 282 | 					.flatMap(
 283 | 						a =>
 284 | 							a.encounters?.flatMap(
 285 | 								mr =>
 286 | 									(
 287 | 										mr as unknown as schema.DbMedicalRecord & {
 288 | 											diagnoses?: { diagnosis: string | null }[];
 289 | 										}
 290 | 									).diagnoses || []
 291 | 							) || []
 292 | 					)
 293 | 					.reduce(
 294 | 						(acc: Record<string, number>, diag: { diagnosis: string | null }) => {
 295 | 							if (diag?.diagnosis) acc[diag.diagnosis] = (acc[diag.diagnosis] || 0) + 1;
 296 | 							return acc;
 297 | 						},
 298 | 						{} as Record<string, number>
 299 | 					)
 300 | 			});
 301 | 		}
 302 | 
 303 | 		return seasonData;
 304 | 	}
 305 | };
 306 | 
 307 | export type AnalyticsRepo = typeof analyticsRepo;

```

`queries/appointment.repo.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/appointment.repo.ts
   2 | import { and, count, eq, gte, ilike, inArray, lte, ne, or, type SQL, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | 
   4 | import { type DBorTx, db } from "../client";
   5 | import * as schema from "../schema";
   6 | import type { AppointmentCreateInput, AppointmentUpdateInput, ReminderCreateInput } from "../zod";
   7 | export const appointmentRepo = {
   8 | 	// CRUD
   9 | 	async getAppointmentById(id: string, clinicId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {

  12 | 			where: { id, clinicId, isDeleted: false },

  14 | 				patient: true,
  15 | 				doctor: true,
  16 | 				service: true,
  17 | 				clinic: true
  18 | 			}
  19 | 		});
  20 | 	},

  25 | 		return result;
  26 | 	},

  31 | 			.update(schema.appointment)
  32 | 			.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
  33 | 			.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, id))

  59 | 		const conditions: Record<string, unknown> = {
  60 | 			clinicId,
  61 | 			isDeleted: false,
  62 | 			appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
  63 | 		};
  64 | 		if (doctorId) conditions.doctorId = doctorId;
  65 |

  67 | 			where: conditions,

  71 | 			},

  73 | 		});

  97 | 	async getAppointmentCountsByStatus(clinicId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {

 100 | 			.select({
 101 | 				status: schema.appointment.status,
 102 | 				count: count()
 103 | 			})
 104 | 			.from(schema.appointment)
 105 | 			.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false)))
 106 | 			.groupBy(schema.appointment.status);
 107 | 
 108 | 		return results.reduce(

 110 | 				if (curr.status) acc[curr.status] = Number(curr.count);
 111 | 				return acc;
 112 | 			},
 113 | 			{} as Record<string, number>
 114 | 		);

 117 | 	async getDoctorAvailability(doctorId: string, date: Date) {
 118 | 		const [workingDays, appointments] = await Promise.all([
 119 | 			db.query.workingDay.findMany({
 120 | 				where: { doctorId }
 121 | 			}),
 122 | 
 123 | 			db.query.appointment.findMany({
 124 | 				where: {
 125 | 					doctorId,
 126 | 					appointmentDate: {
 127 | 						gte: new Date(date.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)),
 128 | 						lte: new Date(date.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999))
 129 | 					},
 130 | 					isDeleted: false
 131 | 				}
 132 | 			})
 133 | 		]);
 134 | 		return { workingDays, appointments };
 135 | 	},
 136 | 
 137 | 	async getAvailableTimeSlots(doctorId: string, date: Date, durationMinutes = 30) {
 138 | 		const workingDay = await db.query.workingDay.findFirst({
 139 | 			where: {
 140 | 				doctorId: doctorId,
 141 | 				day: date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "long" }).toUpperCase() as schema.Day
 142 | 			}
 143 | 		});
 144 | 
 145 | 		if (!workingDay) {
 146 | 			return [];
 147 | 		}
 148 | 
 149 | 		const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 150 | 			where: {
 151 | 				doctorId,
 152 | 				appointmentDate: {
 153 | 					gte: new Date(date.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)),
 154 | 					lte: new Date(date.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999))
 155 | 				},
 156 | 				isDeleted: false,
 157 | 				status: {
 158 | 					notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"]
 159 | 				}
 160 | 			}
 161 | 		});
 162 | 
 163 | 		// Generate time slots
 164 | 		const startHour = Number.parseInt(workingDay.startTime.split(":")[0] ?? "", 10);
 165 | 		const startMinute = Number.parseInt(workingDay.startTime.split(":")[1] ?? "", 10);
 166 | 		const endHour = Number.parseInt(workingDay.endTime.split(":")[0] ?? "", 10);
 167 | 		const endMinute = Number.parseInt(workingDay.endTime.split(":")[1] ?? "", 10);
 168 | 
 169 | 		const slots = [];
 170 | 		const currentTime = new Date(date);
 171 | 		currentTime.setHours(startHour, startMinute, 0, 0);
 172 | 		const endTime = new Date(date);
 173 | 		endTime.setHours(endHour, endMinute, 0, 0);
 174 | 
 175 | 		while (currentTime < endTime) {
 176 | 			const slotEnd = new Date(currentTime);
 177 | 			slotEnd.setMinutes(slotEnd.getMinutes() + durationMinutes);
 178 | 
 179 | 			// Check if slot is available
 180 | 			const isBooked = appointments.some(apt => {
 181 | 				const aptTime = new Date(apt.appointmentDate);
 182 | 				return (
 183 | 					aptTime.getHours() === currentTime.getHours() && aptTime.getMinutes() === currentTime.getMinutes()
 184 | 				);
 185 | 			});
 186 | 
 187 | 			if (!isBooked) {
 188 | 				slots.push({
 189 | 					startTime: currentTime.toLocaleTimeString([], {
 190 | 						hour: "2-digit",
 191 | 						minute: "2-digit",
 192 | 						hour12: false
 193 | 					}),
 194 | 					endTime: slotEnd.toLocaleTimeString([], { hour: "2-digit", minute: "2-digit", hour12: false }),
 195 | 					available: true
 196 | 				});
 197 | 			}
 198 | 
 199 | 			currentTime.setMinutes(currentTime.getMinutes() + durationMinutes);
 200 | 		}
 201 | 
 202 | 		return slots;
 203 | 	},
 204 | 
 205 | 	async getMonthlyAppointmentData(clinicId: string, year: number) {
 206 | 		return await db
 207 | 			.select({
 208 | 				month: sql<number>`EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate})`,
 209 | 				count: count()
 210 | 			})
 211 | 			.from(schema.appointment)
 212 | 			.where(
 213 | 				and(
 214 | 					eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
 215 | 					eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false),
 216 | 					sql`EXTRACT(YEAR FROM ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate}) = ${year}`
 217 | 				)
 218 | 			)
 219 | 			.groupBy(sql`EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate})`)
 220 | 			.orderBy(sql`EXTRACT(MONTH FROM ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate})`);
 221 | 	},
 222 | 
 223 | 	async getAppointmentsWithFilters(
 224 | 		clinicId: string,
 225 | 		filters: {
 226 | 			status?: schema.AppointmentStatus;
 227 | 			startDate?: Date;
 228 | 			endDate?: Date;
 229 | 			doctorId?: string;
 230 | 			patientId?: string;
 231 | 			type?: string;
 232 | 			search?: string;
 233 | 		},
 234 | 		pagination: { limit: number; offset: number },
 235 | 		tx?: DBorTx
 236 | 	) {
 237 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 238 | 		const conditions: SQL[] = [eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false)];
 239 | 
 240 | 		if (filters.status) conditions.push(eq(schema.appointment.status, filters.status));
 241 | 		if (filters.doctorId) conditions.push(eq(schema.appointment.doctorId, filters.doctorId));
 242 | 		if (filters.patientId) conditions.push(eq(schema.appointment.patientId, filters.patientId));
 243 | 		if (filters.type) conditions.push(eq(schema.appointment.type, filters.type));
 244 | 		if (filters.startDate) conditions.push(gte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, filters.startDate));
 245 | 		if (filters.endDate) conditions.push(lte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, filters.endDate));
 246 | 		if (filters.search) {
 247 | 			conditions.push(
 248 | 				or(
 249 | 					ilike(schema.appointment.reason, `%${filters.search}%`),
 250 | 					ilike(schema.appointment.type, `%${filters.search}%`)
 251 | 				) as SQL
 252 | 			);
 253 | 		}
 254 | 
 255 | 		const [appointments, total] = await Promise.all([
 256 | 			client.query.appointment.findMany({
 257 | 				where: { AND: conditions.map(c => ({ RAW: () => c })) },
 258 | 				with: { patient: true, doctor: true },
 259 | 				limit: pagination.limit,
 260 | 				offset: pagination.offset,
 261 | 				orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" }
 262 | 			}),
 263 | 			client
 264 | 				.select({ count: count() })
 265 | 				.from(schema.appointment)
 266 | 				.where(and(...conditions))
 267 | 		]);
 268 | 
 269 | 		return {
 270 | 			appointments,
 271 | 			total: total[0]?.count ?? 0
 272 | 		};
 273 | 	},
 274 | 
 275 | 	// Availability check
 276 | 	async checkTimeSlotAvailability(
 277 | 		doctorId: string,
 278 | 		appointmentDate: Date,
 279 | 		durationMinutes: number,
 280 | 		clinicId: string,
 281 | 		excludeId?: string,
 282 | 		tx?: DBorTx
 283 | 	): Promise<boolean> {
 284 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 285 | 		const appointmentEnd = sql`${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} + (${durationMinutes} || ' minutes')::interval`;
 286 | 
 287 | 		const conditions = [
 288 | 			eq(schema.appointment.doctorId, doctorId),
 289 | 			eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
 290 | 			eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false),
 291 | 			sql`${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} < ${appointmentEnd}`,
 292 | 			sql`${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} + (${schema.appointment.durationMinutes} || ' minutes')::interval > ${appointmentDate}`
 293 | 		];
 294 | 
 295 | 		if (excludeId) {
 296 | 			conditions.push(ne(schema.appointment.id, excludeId));
 297 | 		}
 298 | 
 299 | 		const overlapping = await client
 300 | 			.select()
 301 | 			.from(schema.appointment)
 302 | 			.where(and(...conditions))
 303 | 			.limit(1);
 304 | 
 305 | 		return overlapping.length === 0;
 306 | 	},
 307 |

 310 | 			where: {
 311 | 				id: appointmentId,
 312 | 				isDeleted: false,
 313 | 				status: { notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"] }
 314 | 			}
 315 | 		});

 318 | 	async cancelAppointment(appointmentId: string, clinicId: string, reason: string) {
 319 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 320 | 			const [appointment] = await tx
 321 | 				.update(schema.appointment)
 322 | 				.set({
 323 | 					status: "CANCELLED",
 324 | 					note: reason,
 325 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 326 | 				})
 327 | 				.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, appointmentId))
 328 | 				.returning();
 329 | 
 330 | 			// Create notification
 331 | 			if (appointment) {
 332 | 				await tx.insert(schema.notification).values({
 333 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 334 | 					userId: appointment.patientId,
 335 | 					clinicId,
 336 | 					title: "Appointment Cancelled",
 337 | 					body: `Your appointment has been cancelled. Reason: ${reason}`,
 338 | 					type: "appointment_cancelled",
 339 | 					priority: "high"
 340 | 				});
 341 | 			}
 342 | 
 343 | 			return appointment;
 344 | 		});

 355 | 	async getAppointmentsFallbackPaginated(
 356 | 		clinicId: string,
 357 | 		page: number,
 358 | 		limit: number,
 359 | 		status?: schema.AppointmentStatus,
 360 | 		doctorId?: string,
 361 | 		patientId?: string

 371 | 				]
 372 | 			},
 373 | 			with: {
 374 | 				patient: true,
 375 | 				doctor: true,
 376 | 				service: true
 377 | 			},
 378 | 			orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" }
 379 | 		});
 380 | 		const paginated = result.slice((page - 1) * limit, page * limit);
 381 |

 383 | 			appointments: paginated,
 384 | 			total: result.length
 385 | 		};

 426 | 	async createAppointmentWithReminder(
 427 | 		data: AppointmentCreateInput,
 428 | 		reminderData?: Omit<ReminderCreateInput, "appointmentId">
 429 | 	) {
 430 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 431 | 			// Check for conflicts
 432 | 			const existingAppointment = await tx.query.appointment.findFirst({
 433 | 				where: {
 434 | 					doctorId: data.doctorId,
 435 | 					time: data.time ?? "",
 436 | 					isDeleted: false,
 437 | 					appointmentDate: { gte: data.appointmentDate },
 438 | 					status: {
 439 | 						notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"]
 440 | 					}
 441 | 				}
 442 | 			});
 443 | 
 444 | 			if (existingAppointment) {
 445 | 				throw new Error("Time slot already booked");
 446 | 			}
 447 | 
 448 | 			// Create appointment
 449 | 			const [appointment] = await tx
 450 | 				.insert(schema.appointment)
 451 | 				.values({
 452 | 					...data,
 453 | 					id: data.id ?? crypto.randomUUID()
 454 | 				})
 455 | 				.returning();
 456 | 
 457 | 			// Create reminder if requested
 458 | 			if (reminderData && appointment) {
 459 | 				await tx.insert(schema.reminder).values({
 460 | 					...reminderData,
 461 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 462 | 					appointmentId: appointment.id,
 463 | 					status: "PENDING"
 464 | 				});
 465 | 			}
 466 | 
 467 | 			// Create notification for patient
 468 | 			const patient = await tx.query.patient.findFirst({
 469 | 				where: { id: data.patientId },
 470 | 				with: { user: true }
 471 | 			});
 472 | 
 473 | 			if (patient?.userId) {
 474 | 				await tx.insert(schema.notification).values({
 475 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 476 | 					userId: patient.userId,
 477 | 					clinicId: data.clinicId,
 478 | 					title: "Appointment Scheduled",
 479 | 					body: `Your appointment has been scheduled for ${new Date(data.appointmentDate).toLocaleDateString()} at ${data.time}`,
 480 | 					type: "appointment_scheduled",
 481 | 					priority: "high"
 482 | 				});
 483 | 			}
 484 | 
 485 | 			return appointment;
 486 | 		});
 487 | 	},
 488 | 	async createMedicalRecordWithEncounter(data: {
 489 | 		patientId: string;
 490 | 		doctorId: string;
 491 | 		clinicId: string;
 492 | 		appointmentId: string;
 493 | 		diagnosis: string;
 494 | 		symptoms: string;
 495 | 		treatmentPlan: string;
 496 | 		vitalSigns?: typeof schema.vitalSign.$inferInsert;
 497 | 		prescriptions?: Array<{
 498 | 			medicationName: string;
 499 | 			dosageValue: number;
 500 | 			dosageUnit: string;
 501 | 			frequency: string;
 502 | 			duration: string;
 503 | 		}>;
 504 | 	}) {
 505 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 506 | 			// Create medical record
 507 | 			const [medicalRecord] = await tx
 508 | 				.insert(schema.medicalRecord)
 509 | 				.values({
 510 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 511 | 					patientId: data.patientId,
 512 | 
 513 | 					doctorId: data.doctorId,
 514 | 					clinicId: data.clinicId,
 515 | 					appointmentId: data.appointmentId,
 516 | 					diagnosis: data.diagnosis,
 517 | 					symptoms: data.symptoms,
 518 | 					treatmentPlan: data.treatmentPlan,
 519 | 					status: "ACTIVE"
 520 | 				})
 521 | 				.returning();
 522 | 
 523 | 			// Create diagnosis record
 524 | 			const [diagnosis] = await tx
 525 | 				.insert(schema.diagnosis)
 526 | 				.values({
 527 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 528 | 					patientId: data.patientId,
 529 | 					doctorId: data.doctorId,
 530 | 					clinicId: data.clinicId,
 531 | 					appointmentId: data.appointmentId,
 532 | 					medicalId: medicalRecord?.id ?? "",
 533 | 					diagnosis: data.diagnosis,
 534 | 					symptoms: data.symptoms,
 535 | 					status: "CONFIRMED" as schema.Status
 536 | 				})
 537 | 				.returning();
 538 | 
 539 | 			// Create vital signs if provided
 540 | 			if (data.vitalSigns) {
 541 | 				await tx.insert(schema.vitalSign).values({
 542 | 					...data.vitalSigns,
 543 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 544 | 					medicalId: medicalRecord?.id ?? "",
 545 | 					clinicId: data.clinicId
 546 | 				});
 547 | 			}
 548 | 
 549 | 			// Create prescriptions if provided
 550 | 			if (data.prescriptions && data.prescriptions.length > 0) {
 551 | 				const [prescription] = await tx
 552 | 					.insert(schema.prescription)
 553 | 					.values({
 554 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 555 | 						medicalRecordId: medicalRecord?.id ?? "",
 556 | 						patientId: data.patientId,
 557 | 						doctorId: data.doctorId,
 558 | 						clinicId: data.clinicId,
 559 | 						encounterId: data.appointmentId,
 560 | 						status: "active",
 561 | 						issuedDate: new Date()
 562 | 					})
 563 | 					.returning();
 564 | 
 565 | 				for (const med of data.prescriptions) {
 566 | 					// Find or create drug
 567 | 					let drug = await tx.query.drug.findFirst({
 568 | 						where: { name: med.medicationName }
 569 | 					});
 570 | 
 571 | 					if (!drug) {
 572 | 						[drug] = await tx
 573 | 							.insert(schema.drug)
 574 | 							.values({
 575 | 								id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 576 | 								name: med.medicationName
 577 | 							})
 578 | 							.returning();
 579 | 					}
 580 | 
 581 | 					await tx.insert(schema.prescribedItem).values({
 582 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 583 | 						prescriptionId: prescription?.id ?? "",
 584 | 						clinicId: data.clinicId,
 585 | 						drugId: drug?.id ?? "",
 586 | 						dosageValue: med.dosageValue,
 587 | 						dosageUnit: med.dosageUnit,
 588 | 						frequency: med.frequency as schema.Frequency,
 589 | 						duration: med.duration
 590 | 					});
 591 | 				}
 592 | 			}
 593 | 
 594 | 			// Update appointment status
 595 | 			await tx
 596 | 				.update(schema.appointment)
 597 | 				.set({ status: "COMPLETED" })
 598 | 				.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, data.appointmentId));
 599 | 
 600 | 			return { medicalRecord, diagnosis };
 601 | 		});
 602 | 	},
 603 | 	async rescheduleAppointment(appointmentId: string, newDate: Date, newTime: string, reason?: string) {
 604 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 605 | 			const appointment = await tx.query.appointment.findFirst({
 606 | 				where: { id: appointmentId }
 607 | 			});
 608 | 
 609 | 			if (!appointment) {
 610 | 				throw new Error("Appointment not found");
 611 | 			}
 612 | 
 613 | 			// Check new time slot availability
 614 | 			const conflict = await tx.query.appointment.findFirst({
 615 | 				// FIX: Use the relational operators callback configuration
 616 | 
 617 | 				where: {
 618 | 					doctorId: appointment.doctorId,
 619 | 					time: appointment.time ?? "",
 620 | 					isDeleted: false,
 621 | 					appointmentDate: { gte: appointment.appointmentDate },
 622 | 					status: {
 623 | 						notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"]
 624 | 					}
 625 | 				}
 626 | 			});
 627 | 
 628 | 			if (conflict) {
 629 | 				throw new Error("New time slot is already booked");
 630 | 			}
 631 | 
 632 | 			// Update appointment
 633 | 			const [updated] = await tx
 634 | 				.update(schema.appointment)
 635 | 				.set({
 636 | 					appointmentDate: newDate,
 637 | 					time: newTime,
 638 | 					note: reason ? `${appointment.note || ""}\nRescheduled: ${reason}` : appointment.note,
 639 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 640 | 				})
 641 | 				// Core API update blocks DO use global operators like `eq()`
 642 | 				.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, appointmentId))
 643 | 				.returning();
 644 | 
 645 | 			// Notify patient
 646 | 			const patient = await tx.query.patient.findFirst({
 647 | 				where: { id: appointment.patientId },
 648 | 				with: { user: true }
 649 | 			});
 650 | 
 651 | 			if (patient?.userId) {
 652 | 				await tx.insert(schema.notification).values({
 653 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 654 | 					userId: patient.userId,
 655 | 					clinicId: appointment.clinicId,
 656 | 					title: "Appointment Rescheduled",
 657 | 					body: `Your appointment has been rescheduled to ${newDate.toLocaleDateString()} at ${newTime}`,
 658 | 					type: "appointment_rescheduled",
 659 | 					priority: "high"
 660 | 				});
 661 | 			}
 662 | 
 663 | 			return updated;
 664 | 		});
 665 | 	},
 666 | 	async restoreAppointment(id: string) {
 667 | 		const [result] = await db
 668 | 			.update(schema.appointment)
 669 | 			.set({ deletedAt: null })
 670 | 			.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, id))
 671 | 			.returning();
 672 | 		return result;
 673 | 	},
 674 | 
 675 | 	async getAppointmentsWithPagination(
 676 | 		clinicId: string,
 677 | 		pagination: { page: number; limit: number },
 678 | 		filters?: {
 679 | 			status?: schema.AppointmentStatus;
 680 | 			fromDate?: Date;
 681 | 			toDate?: Date;
 682 | 			patientId?: string;
 683 | 			doctorId?: string;
 684 | 			search?: string;
 685 | 		},
 686 | 		tx?: DBorTx
 687 | 	) {
 688 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 689 | 		const { page, limit } = pagination;
 690 | 		const offset = (page - 1) * limit;
 691 | 
 692 | 		// Build conditions as an array of SQL conditions to avoid type issues with Record<string, unknown>
 693 | 		const conditions: SQL[] = [eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false)];
 694 | 
 695 | 		// Add optional filters
 696 | 		if (filters?.status) {
 697 | 			conditions.push(eq(schema.appointment.status, filters.status));
 698 | 		}
 699 | 		if (filters?.doctorId) {
 700 | 			conditions.push(eq(schema.appointment.doctorId, filters.doctorId));
 701 | 		}
 702 | 		if (filters?.patientId) {
 703 | 			conditions.push(eq(schema.appointment.patientId, filters.patientId));
 704 | 		}
 705 | 		if (filters?.fromDate) {
 706 | 			conditions.push(gte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, filters.fromDate));
 707 | 		}
 708 | 		if (filters?.toDate) {
 709 | 			conditions.push(lte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, filters.toDate));
 710 | 		}
 711 | 
 712 | 		if (filters?.search) {
 713 | 			conditions.push(
 714 | 				or(
 715 | 					ilike(schema.appointment.reason, `%${filters.search}%`),
 716 | 					ilike(schema.appointment.type, `%${filters.search}%`)
 717 | 				) as SQL
 718 | 			);
 719 | 		}
 720 | 
 721 | 		const whereClause = and(...conditions);
 722 | 
 723 | 		// Fetch data with relations - Drizzle v2 syntax
 724 | 		const appointments = await client.query.appointment.findMany({
 725 | 			where: { AND: conditions.map(c => ({ RAW: () => c })) },
 726 | 			with: {
 727 | 				patient: {
 728 | 					columns: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true, email: true, phone: true }
 729 | 				},
 730 | 				doctor: {
 731 | 					columns: { id: true, name: true, specialty: true, email: true }
 732 | 				},
 733 | 				service: {
 734 | 					columns: { id: true, serviceName: true, price: true, duration: true }
 735 | 				},
 736 | 				clinic: {
 737 | 					columns: { id: true, name: true, address: true, phone: true }
 738 | 				}
 739 | 			},
 740 | 			limit: limit,
 741 | 			offset: offset,
 742 | 			orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" }
 743 | 		});
 744 | 
 745 | 		// Get total count - using Drizzle v2 count syntax
 746 | 		const totalResult = await client.select({ count: count() }).from(schema.appointment).where(whereClause);
 747 | 
 748 | 		const total = totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0;
 749 | 
 750 | 		return {
 751 | 			appointments,
 752 | 			total,
 753 | 			page,
 754 | 			limit,
 755 | 			totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit)
 756 | 		};
 757 | 	},
 758 | 
 759 | 	/**
 760 | 	 * Get appointments by patient with pagination - Drizzle v2
 761 | 	 */
 762 | 	async getPatientAppointments(
 763 | 		patientId: string,
 764 | 		clinicId: string,
 765 | 		pagination: { page: number; limit: number },
 766 | 		status?: schema.AppointmentStatus,
 767 | 		tx?: DBorTx
 768 | 	) {
 769 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 770 | 		const { page, limit } = pagination;
 771 | 		const offset = (page - 1) * limit;
 772 | 
 773 | 		// Build conditions as an array of SQL conditions
 774 | 		const conditions: SQL[] = [
 775 | 			eq(schema.appointment.patientId, patientId),
 776 | 			eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
 777 | 			eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false)
 778 | 		];
 779 | 
 780 | 		if (status) {
 781 | 			conditions.push(eq(schema.appointment.status, status));
 782 | 		}
 783 | 
 784 | 		const whereClause = conditions.length > 0 ? and(...conditions) : undefined;
 785 | 
 786 | 		// Fetch data and count concurrently
 787 | 		const [appointments, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
 788 | 			client.query.appointment.findMany({
 789 | 				where: { AND: conditions.map(c => ({ RAW: () => c })) },
 790 | 				with: {
 791 | 					doctor: true,
 792 | 					service: true,
 793 | 					clinic: true
 794 | 				},
 795 | 				limit,
 796 | 				offset,
 797 | 				orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" }
 798 | 			}),
 799 | 			client
 800 | 				.select({ count: sql<number>`count(*)` })
 801 | 				.from(schema.appointment)
 802 | 				.where(whereClause ?? sql`1=1`)
 803 | 		]);
 804 | 
 805 | 		const total = totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0;
 806 | 
 807 | 		return {
 808 | 			appointments,
 809 | 			total,
 810 | 			page: page,
 811 | 			limit: limit,
 812 | 			totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit)
 813 | 		};
 814 | 	},
 815 | 	/**
 816 | 	 * Get appointments by doctor with date range
 817 | 	 */
 818 | 	async getDoctorAppointmentsInRange(doctorId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, tx?: DBorTx) {
 819 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 820 | 		return client.query.appointment.findMany({
 821 | 			where: {
 822 | 				doctorId,
 823 | 				isDeleted: false,
 824 | 				appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 825 | 			},
 826 | 			with: { patient: true, service: true },
 827 | 			orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" }
 828 | 		});
 829 | 	},
 830 | 
 831 | 	/**
 832 | 	 * Get appointment statistics for dashboard
 833 | 	 */
 834 | 	async getAppointmentStats(clinicId: string, startDate?: Date, endDate?: Date, tx?: DBorTx) {
 835 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 836 | 		const dateConditions =
 837 | 			startDate && endDate
 838 | 				? and(
 839 | 						gte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, startDate),
 840 | 						lte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, endDate)
 841 | 					)
 842 | 				: undefined;
 843 | 
 844 | 		const whereClause = and(
 845 | 			eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
 846 | 			eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false),
 847 | 			dateConditions
 848 | 		);
 849 | 
 850 | 		const [stats, byStatus, upcomingCount] = await Promise.all([
 851 | 			client
 852 | 				.select({
 853 | 					total: count(),
 854 | 					completed: sql<number>`sum(case when ${schema.appointment.status} = 'COMPLETED' then 1 else 0 end)`,
 855 | 					cancelled: sql<number>`sum(case when ${schema.appointment.status} = 'CANCELLED' then 1 else 0 end)`,
 856 | 					noShow: sql<number>`sum(case when ${schema.appointment.status} = 'NO_SHOW' then 1 else 0 end)`,
 857 | 					totalRevenue: sql<number>`sum(${schema.appointment.appointmentPrice})`
 858 | 				})
 859 | 				.from(schema.appointment)
 860 | 				.where(whereClause),
 861 | 
 862 | 			client
 863 | 				.select({
 864 | 					status: schema.appointment.status,
 865 | 					count: count()
 866 | 				})
 867 | 				.from(schema.appointment)
 868 | 				.where(whereClause)
 869 | 				.groupBy(schema.appointment.status),
 870 | 
 871 | 			client.$count(
 872 | 				schema.appointment,
 873 | 				and(
 874 | 					eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
 875 | 					eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false),
 876 | 					gte(schema.appointment.appointmentDate, new Date()),
 877 | 					eq(schema.appointment.status, "CONFIRMED")
 878 | 				)
 879 | 			)
 880 | 		]);
 881 | 
 882 | 		const statusMap = stats[0] ?? { total: 0, completed: 0, cancelled: 0, noShow: 0, totalRevenue: 0 };
 883 | 
 884 | 		return {
 885 | 			...statusMap,
 886 | 			upcomingCount,
 887 | 			byStatus: byStatus.reduce(
 888 | 				(acc, curr) => {
 889 | 					if (curr.status) {
 890 | 						acc[curr.status] = Number(curr.count);
 891 | 					}
 892 | 					return acc;
 893 | 				},
 894 | 				{} as Record<string, number>
 895 | 			)
 896 | 		};
 897 | 	},
 898 | 
 899 | 	/**
 900 | 	 * Get available time slots for a doctor on a specific date
 901 | 	 * (Helper method used by calendar functionality)
 902 | 	 */
 903 | 	async getBookedSlotsForDoctor(
 904 | 		doctorId: string,
 905 | 		date: Date,
 906 | 		tx?: DBorTx
 907 | 	): Promise<Array<{ start: Date; duration: number }>> {
 908 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 909 | 		const startOfDay = new Date(date);
 910 | 		startOfDay.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
 911 | 		const endOfDay = new Date(date);
 912 | 		endOfDay.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
 913 | 
 914 | 		const appointments = await client.query.appointment.findMany({
 915 | 			where: {
 916 | 				doctorId,
 917 | 				isDeleted: false,
 918 | 				appointmentDate: { gte: startOfDay, lte: endOfDay },
 919 | 				status: { notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"] }
 920 | 			},
 921 | 			columns: { appointmentDate: true, durationMinutes: true }
 922 | 		});
 923 | 
 924 | 		return appointments.map(apt => ({
 925 | 			start: apt.appointmentDate,
 926 | 			duration: apt.durationMinutes ?? 30
 927 | 		}));
 928 | 	},
 929 | 
 930 | 	/**
 931 | 	 * Update appointment with note (for cancellation reasons)
 932 | 	 */
 933 | 	async updateAppointmentWithNote(id: string, status: schema.AppointmentStatus, note?: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 934 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 935 | 		const [result] = await client
 936 | 			.update(schema.appointment)
 937 | 			.set({
 938 | 				status,
 939 | 				note: note ? sql`${schema.appointment.note} || '\n' || ${note}` : undefined,
 940 | 				updatedAt: new Date()
 941 | 			})
 942 | 			.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, id))
 943 | 			.returning();
 944 | 		return result;
 945 | 	}
 946 | };
 947 | 
 948 | export type AppointmentRepo = typeof appointmentRepo;

```

```ts
 161 | 			.update(schema.userQuota)
 162 | 			.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
 163 | 			.where(eq(schema.userQuota.userId, userId))
 164 | 			.returning();
 165 | 		return result;
 166 | 	},
 167 | 
 168 | 	async getOrCreateUserQuota(userId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 169 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 170 | 		let quota = await this.getUserQuota(userId, client);
 171 | 
 172 | 		if (!quota) {
 173 | 			quota = await this.createUserQuota(
 174 | 				{
 175 | 					userId,
 176 | 					quota: 100,
 177 | 					usedQuota: 0,
 178 | 					fileCount: 0,
 179 | 					fileCountQuota: 1000,
 180 | 					inviteCount: 0,
 181 | 					inviteQuota: 10,
 182 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 183 | 				},
 184 | 				client
 185 | 			);
 186 | 		}
 187 | 
 188 | 		return quota;
 189 | 	},
 190 | 	async getUserWithAllRelations(userId: string) {
 191 | 		return await db.query.user.findFirst({
 192 | 			where: { id: userId },
 193 | 			with: {
 194 | 				folders: {
 195 | 					where: { parentId: undefined } // Get root folders only
 196 | 				},
 197 | 				clinicMemberships: {
 198 | 					where: {
 199 | 						userId
 200 | 					}
 201 | 				},
 202 | 				doctorProfile: true,
 203 | 				staffProfile: true,
 204 | 				patientProfile: {
 205 | 					with: {
 206 | 						appointments: {
 207 | 							where: { isDeleted: false },
 208 | 							orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" },
 209 | 							limit: 5
 210 | 						}
 211 | 					}
 212 | 				},
 213 | 				notifications: {
 214 | 					where: { status: "unread" },
 215 | 					orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }
 216 | 				}
 217 | 			}
 218 | 		});
 219 | 	},
```
