`queries/calendar.repo.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/querries/calendar.repo.ts
   2 | import { and, eq, ne, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | 
   4 | import { type DBorTx, db } from "../client";
   5 | import type { Weekday } from "../schema";
   6 | import * as schema from "../schema";
   7 | 
   8 | export const calendarRepo = {
   9 | 	/**
  10 | 	 * Get doctor's working hours for a specific date
  11 | 	 */
  12 | 	async getDoctorWorkingHours(doctorId: string, date: Date, tx?: DBorTx) {
  13 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  14 | 		const dayOfWeek = date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "long" }).toUpperCase();
  15 | 
  16 | 		const result = await client.query.workingDay.findFirst({
  17 | 			where: {
  18 | 				doctorId,
  19 | 				day: dayOfWeek as Weekday,
  20 | 				isActive: true
  21 | 			}
  22 | 		});
  23 | 
  24 | 		if (!result) {
  25 | 			return null;
  26 | 		}
  27 | 
  28 | 		return {
  29 | 			start: result.startTime,
  30 | 			end: result.endTime
  31 | 		};
  32 | 	},
  33 | 
  34 | 	/**
  35 | 	 * Check if a time slot is available for a doctor
  36 | 	 */
  37 | 	async checkSlotAvailability(
  38 | 		doctorId: string,
  39 | 		start: Date,
  40 | 		end: Date,
  41 | 		clinicId: string,
  42 | 		excludeId?: string,
  43 | 		tx?: DBorTx
  44 | 	): Promise<boolean> {
  45 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  46 | 		const conditions = [
  47 | 			eq(schema.appointment.doctorId, doctorId),
  48 | 			eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId),
  49 | 			eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false),
  50 | 			sql`${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} < ${end}`,
  51 | 			sql`${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} + (${schema.appointment.durationMinutes} || ' minutes')::interval > ${start}`
  52 | 		];
  53 | 
  54 | 		if (excludeId) {
  55 | 			conditions.push(ne(schema.appointment.id, excludeId));
  56 | 		}
  57 | 
  58 | 		const overlapping = await client
  59 | 			.select()
  60 | 			.from(schema.appointment)
  61 | 			.where(and(...conditions))
  62 | 			.limit(1);
  63 | 
  64 | 		return overlapping.length === 0;
  65 | 	},
  66 | 
  67 | 	/**
  68 | 	 * Get booked slots for a doctor on a specific date
  69 | 	 */
  70 | 	async getBookedSlotsForDoctor(
  71 | 		doctorId: string,
  72 | 		date: Date,
  73 | 		tx?: DBorTx
  74 | 	): Promise<Array<{ start: Date; duration: number }>> {
  75 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  76 | 		const startOfDay = new Date(date);
  77 | 		startOfDay.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
  78 | 		const endOfDay = new Date(date);
  79 | 		endOfDay.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999);
  80 | 
  81 | 		const appointments = await client.query.appointment.findMany({
  82 | 			where: {
  83 | 				doctorId,
  84 | 				isDeleted: false,
  85 | 				appointmentDate: { gte: startOfDay, lte: endOfDay },
  86 | 				status: { notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"] }
  87 | 			},
  88 | 			columns: { appointmentDate: true, durationMinutes: true }
  89 | 		});
  90 | 
  91 | 		return appointments.map(apt => ({
  92 | 			start: apt.appointmentDate,
  93 | 			duration: apt.durationMinutes ?? 30
  94 | 		}));
  95 | 	},
  96 | 
  97 | 	/**
  98 | 	 * Create appointment reminders
  99 | 	 */
 100 | 	async createAppointmentReminders(
 101 | 		appointmentId: string,
 102 | 		appointmentDate: Date,
 103 | 		reminderTimes: number[] = [24, 2],
 104 | 		tx?: DBorTx
 105 | 	) {
 106 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 107 | 		const reminders = [];
 108 | 
 109 | 		for (const hoursBefore of reminderTimes) {
 110 | 			const reminderTime = new Date(appointmentDate);
 111 | 			reminderTime.setHours(reminderTime.getHours() - hoursBefore);
 112 | 
 113 | 			const [reminder] = await client
 114 | 				.insert(schema.reminder)
 115 | 				.values({
 116 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 117 | 					appointmentId,
 118 | 					method: "EMAIL",
 119 | 					status: "PENDING",
 120 | 					sentAt: reminderTime
 121 | 				})
 122 | 				.returning();
 123 | 
 124 | 			reminders.push(reminder);
 125 | 		}
 126 | 
 127 | 		return reminders;
 128 | 	},
 129 | 
 130 | 	/**
 131 | 	 * Get doctor's working days for a week
 132 | 	 */
 133 | 	async getDoctorWeeklySchedule(doctorId: string, startDate: Date, tx?: DBorTx) {
 134 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 135 | 		const endDate = new Date(startDate);
 136 | 		endDate.setDate(endDate.getDate() + 6);
 137 | 
 138 | 		const workingDays = await client.query.workingDay.findMany({
 139 | 			where: {
 140 | 				doctorId,
 141 | 				isActive: true
 142 | 			}
 143 | 		});
 144 | 
 145 | 		const appointments = await client.query.appointment.findMany({
 146 | 			where: {
 147 | 				doctorId,
 148 | 				isDeleted: false,
 149 | 				appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate },
 150 | 				status: { notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"] }
 151 | 			},
 152 | 			with: {
 153 | 				patient: {
 154 | 					columns: { id: true, firstName: true, lastName: true }
 155 | 				}
 156 | 			},
 157 | 			orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" }
 158 | 		});
 159 | 
 160 | 		return { workingDays, appointments };
 161 | 	}
 162 | };
 163 | 
 164 | export type CalendarRepo = typeof calendarRepo;
 165 | // In your calendar.repo.ts (or wherever the repo is)
 166 | export type DoctorSchedule = Awaited<ReturnType<typeof calendarRepo.getDoctorWeeklySchedule>>;

```

`queries/clinic.repo.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/clinic.repo.ts
   2 | import { and, eq, inArray, like, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | 
   4 | import { type DBorTx, db } from "../client";
   5 | import * as schema from "../schema";
   6 | import type {
   7 | 	ClinicCreateInput,
   8 | 	ClinicMemberCreateInput,
   9 | 	ClinicMemberUpdateInput,
  10 | 	ClinicUpdateInput,
  11 | 	RatingCreateInput,
  12 | 	RatingUpdateInput,
  13 | 	ServiceCreateInput,
  14 | 	ServiceUpdateInput
  15 | } from "../zod";
  16 | 
  17 | export const clinicRepo = {
  18 | 	// Clinic queries
  19 | 	async getClinicById(id: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
  20 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  21 | 		return client.query.clinic.findFirst({
  22 | 			where: { id, isDeleted: false }
  23 | 		});
  24 | 	},
  25 | 
  26 | 	async getClinicByName(name: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
  27 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  28 | 		return client.query.clinic.findFirst({
  29 | 			where: { name, isDeleted: false }
  30 | 		});
  31 | 	},
  32 | 
  33 | 	async createClinic(data: schema.NewDbClinic, tx?: DBorTx) {
  34 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  35 | 		const [result] = await client.insert(schema.clinic).values(data).returning();
  36 | 		return result;
  37 | 	},
  38 | 
  39 | 	async updateClinic(id: string, data: Partial<schema.NewDbClinic>, tx?: DBorTx) {
  40 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  41 | 		const [result] = await client
  42 | 			.update(schema.clinic)
  43 | 			.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
  44 | 			.where(eq(schema.clinic.id, id))
  45 | 			.returning();
  46 | 		return result;
  47 | 	},
  48 | 
  49 | 	async softDeleteClinic(id: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
  50 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  51 | 		const [result] = await client
  52 | 			.update(schema.clinic)
  53 | 			.set({ deletedAt: new Date(), isDeleted: true })
  54 | 			.where(eq(schema.clinic.id, id))
  55 | 			.returning();
  56 | 		return result;
  57 | 	},
  58 | 
  59 | 	async getDefaultClinic(tx?: DBorTx) {
  60 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  61 | 		return client.query.clinic.findFirst({
  62 | 			where: { name: "Default Clinic", isDeleted: false }
  63 | 		});
  64 | 	},
  65 | 
  66 | 	// Clinic member queries
  67 | 	async addUserToClinic(userId: string, clinicId: string, role: schema.Role, tx?: DBorTx) {
  68 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  69 | 		return client.insert(schema.clinicMember).values({
  70 | 			userId,
  71 | 			clinicId,
  72 | 			role: role as "admin" | "doctor" | "staff" | "patient",
  73 | 			createdAt: new Date(),
  74 | 			updatedAt: new Date()
  75 | 		});
  76 | 	},
  77 | 
  78 | 	async upsertClinicMember(userId: string, clinicId: string, role: schema.Role, tx?: DBorTx) {
  79 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  80 | 		return client
  81 | 			.insert(schema.clinicMember)
  82 | 			.values({
  83 | 				userId,
  84 | 				clinicId,
  85 | 				role: role as "admin" | "doctor" | "staff" | "patient",
  86 | 				createdAt: new Date(),
  87 | 				updatedAt: new Date()
  88 | 			})
  89 | 			.onConflictDoUpdate({
  90 | 				target: schema.clinicMember.userId,
  91 | 				set: {
  92 | 					clinicId,
  93 | 					role: role as "admin" | "doctor" | "staff" | "patient",
  94 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
  95 | 				}
  96 | 			});
  97 | 	},
  98 | 
  99 | 	async getUserClinics(userId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 100 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 101 | 		return client
 102 | 			.select({
 103 | 				id: schema.clinic.id,
 104 | 				name: schema.clinic.name,
 105 | 				email: schema.clinic.email,
 106 | 				role: schema.clinicMember.role,
 107 | 				createdAt: schema.clinicMember.createdAt
 108 | 			})
 109 | 			.from(schema.clinicMember)
 110 | 			.innerJoin(schema.clinic, eq(schema.clinicMember.clinicId, schema.clinic.id))
 111 | 			.where(eq(schema.clinicMember.userId, userId));
 112 | 	},
 113 | 
 114 | 	async removeUserFromClinic(userId: string, clinicId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 115 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 116 | 		return client
 117 | 			.delete(schema.clinicMember)
 118 | 			.where(and(eq(schema.clinicMember.userId, userId), eq(schema.clinicMember.clinicId, clinicId)));
 119 | 	},
 120 | 
 121 | 	// Clinic stats
 122 | 	async getClinicStatistics(clinicId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 123 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 124 | 		const [doctors, patients, appointments, revenue] = await Promise.all([
 125 | 			client
 126 | 				.select({ count: sql<number>`count(*)` })
 127 | 				.from(schema.doctor)
 128 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.doctor.isDeleted, false))),
 129 | 			client
 130 | 				.select({ count: sql<number>`count(*)` })
 131 | 				.from(schema.patient)
 132 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false))),
 133 | 			client
 134 | 				.select({ count: sql<number>`count(*)` })
 135 | 				.from(schema.appointment)
 136 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false))),
 137 | 			client
 138 | 				.select({ total: sql<number>`sum(${schema.payment.amount})` })
 139 | 				.from(schema.payment)
 140 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.payment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.payment.status, "PAID")))
 141 | 		]);
 142 | 
 143 | 		return {
 144 | 			doctors: doctors[0]?.count ?? 0,
 145 | 			patients: patients[0]?.count ?? 0,
 146 | 			appointments: appointments[0]?.count ?? 0,
 147 | 			revenue: revenue[0]?.total ?? 0
 148 | 		};
 149 | 	},
 150 | 
 151 | 	// Clinic setting
 152 | 	async getClinicSetting(clinicId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 153 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 154 | 		return client.query.clinicSetting.findFirst({
 155 | 			where: { clinicId }
 156 | 		});
 157 | 	},
 158 | 
 159 | 	async upsertClinicSetting(data: schema.NewDbClinicSetting, tx?: DBorTx) {
 160 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 161 | 		const [result] = await client
 162 | 			.insert(schema.clinicSetting)
 163 | 			.values(data)
 164 | 			.onConflictDoUpdate({
 165 | 				target: schema.clinicSetting.clinicId,
 166 | 				set: { ...data, updatedAt: new Date() }
 167 | 			})
 168 | 			.returning();
 169 | 		return result;
 170 | 	},
 171 | 
 172 | 	// Config store
 173 | 	async getConfigValue(key: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 174 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 175 | 		return client.query.configStore.findFirst({
 176 | 			where: { key }
 177 | 		});
 178 | 	},
 179 | 
 180 | 	async setConfigValue(key: string, value: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 181 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 182 | 		return client.insert(schema.configStore).values({ key, value }).onConflictDoUpdate({
 183 | 			target: schema.configStore.key,
 184 | 			set: { value }
 185 | 		});
 186 | 	},
 187 | 	async getClinicDashboard(clinicId: string) {
 188 | 		const [clinic, stats, recentAppointments, topDoctors] = await Promise.all([
 189 | 			db.query.clinic.findFirst({
 190 | 				where: { id: clinicId, isDeleted: false }
 191 | 				// with: {
 192 | 				// 	setting: true,
 193 | 				// 	members: {
 194 | 				// 		with: {
 195 | 				// 			user: true
 196 | 				// 		}
 197 | 				// 	}
 198 | 				// }
 199 | 			}),
 200 | 
 201 | 			// Get clinic statistics
 202 | 			db.transaction(async tx => {
 203 | 				const [doctorCount, patientCount, appointmentCount, revenue] = await Promise.all([
 204 | 					tx
 205 | 						.select({ count: sql<number>`count(*)` })
 206 | 						.from(schema.doctor)
 207 | 						.where(and(eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.doctor.isDeleted, false))),
 208 | 
 209 | 					tx
 210 | 						.select({ count: sql<number>`count(*)` })
 211 | 						.from(schema.patient)
 212 | 						.where(and(eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false))),
 213 | 
 214 | 					tx
 215 | 						.select({ count: sql<number>`count(*)` })
 216 | 						.from(schema.appointment)
 217 | 						.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false))),
 218 | 
 219 | 					tx
 220 | 						.select({ total: sql<number>`sum(${schema.payment.amount})` })
 221 | 						.from(schema.payment)
 222 | 						.where(and(eq(schema.payment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.payment.status, "PAID")))
 223 | 				]);
 224 | 
 225 | 				return {
 226 | 					doctors: doctorCount[0]?.count ?? 0,
 227 | 					patients: patientCount[0]?.count ?? 0,
 228 | 					appointments: appointmentCount[0]?.count ?? 0,
 229 | 					revenue: revenue[0]?.total ?? 0
 230 | 				};
 231 | 			}),
 232 | 
 233 | 			// Recent appointments
 234 | 			db.query.appointment.findMany({
 235 | 				where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 236 | 				with: {
 237 | 					patient: true,
 238 | 					doctor: true
 239 | 				},
 240 | 				orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" },
 241 | 				limit: 10
 242 | 			}),
 243 | 
 244 | 			// Top doctors by appointment count
 245 | 			db.query.doctor.findMany({
 246 | 				where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 247 | 				with: {
 248 | 					appointments: {
 249 | 						where: { isDeleted: false }
 250 | 					}
 251 | 				},
 252 | 				limit: 5
 253 | 			})
 254 | 		]);
 255 | 
 256 | 		return { clinic, stats, recentAppointments, topDoctors };
 257 | 	},
 258 | 
 259 | 	// Get clinic with all related data
 260 | 	async getFullClinic(clinicId: string) {
 261 | 		return await db.query.clinic.findFirst({
 262 | 			where: { id: clinicId, isDeleted: false }
 263 | 			// Relations for 'clinics' are currently commented out in relations.ts
 264 | 			// with: {
 265 | 			// 	setting: true
 266 | 			// }
 267 | 		});
 268 | 	},
 269 | 	async listServices(params: {
 270 | 		clinicId: string;
 271 | 		search?: string;
 272 | 		category?: string;
 273 | 		page: number;
 274 | 		pageSize: number;
 275 | 	}) {
 276 | 		const { clinicId, search, category, page, pageSize } = params;
 277 | 		const rqbWhere = {
 278 | 			clinicId,
 279 | 			isDeleted: false,
 280 | 			...(category && { category }),
 281 | 			...(search && {
 282 | 				OR: [{ serviceName: { ilike: `%${search}%` } }, { description: { ilike: `%${search}%` } }]
 283 | 			})
 284 | 		};
 285 | 
 286 | 		const [services, total] = await Promise.all([
 287 | 			db.query.service.findMany({
 288 | 				where: rqbWhere,
 289 | 				limit: pageSize,
 290 | 				offset: (page - 1) * pageSize,
 291 | 				orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }
 292 | 			}),
 293 | 			db.$count(
 294 | 				schema.service,
 295 | 				and(
 296 | 					eq(schema.service.isDeleted, false),
 297 | 					eq(schema.service.clinicId, clinicId),
 298 | 					category ? eq(schema.service.category, category) : undefined,
 299 | 					search ? like(schema.service.serviceName, `%${search}%`) : undefined
 300 | 				)
 301 | 			)
 302 | 		]);
 303 | 
 304 | 		return {
 305 | 			services,
 306 | 			total,
 307 | 			page,
 308 | 			totalPages: Math.ceil(total / pageSize)
 309 | 		};
 310 | 	},

 316 | 				clinicId,
 317 | 				...(includeDeleted ? {} : { isDeleted: false })
 318 | 			},
 319 | 			orderBy: { serviceName: "asc" }
 320 | 		});
 321 | 	},

 328 | 				isAvailable: true,
 329 | 				isDeleted: false
 330 | 			},

 335 | 	// Get service by ID with related data
 336 | 	async getServiceById(serviceId: string, clinicId?: string) {
 337 | 		const whereClause: Record<string, unknown> = {
 338 | 			id: serviceId,
 339 | 			isDeleted: false
 340 | 		};
 341 | 		if (clinicId) {
 342 | 			whereClause.clinicId = clinicId;
 343 | 		}
 344 | 
 345 | 		return await db.query.service.findFirst({
 346 | 			where: whereClause,
 347 | 			with: {
 348 | 				appointments: {
 349 | 					where: { isDeleted: false },
 350 | 					limit: 10,
 351 | 					orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" }
 352 | 				},
 353 | 				labTests: {
 354 | 					limit: 10,
 355 | 					orderBy: { testDate: "desc" }
 356 | 				}
 357 | 			}
 358 | 		});
 359 | 	},

 373 | 	// Get service categories (distinct categories)
 374 | 	async getServiceCategories(clinicId: string) {
 375 | 		const services = await db.query.service.findMany({
 376 | 			where: {
 377 | 				clinicId,
 378 | 				isDeleted: false
 379 | 			},
 380 | 			columns: { category: true }
 381 | 		});
 382 | 
 383 | 		const categories = [...new Set(services.map(s => s.category).filter(Boolean))];
 384 | 		return categories;
 385 | 	},

 387 | 	// Search services
 388 | 	async searchServices(clinicId: string, searchTerm: string) {
 389 | 		return await db.query.service.findMany({
 390 | 			where: {
 391 | 				clinicId,
 392 | 				isDeleted: false,
 393 | 				OR: [
 394 | 					{ serviceName: { ilike: `%${searchTerm}%` } },
 395 | 					{ description: { ilike: `%${searchTerm}%` } },
 396 | 					{ category: { ilike: `%${searchTerm}%` } }
 397 | 				]
 398 | 			},
 399 | 			orderBy: { serviceName: "asc" }
 400 | 		});
 401 | 	},
 402 | 
 403 | 	// Get service statistics
 404 | 	async getServiceStatistics(clinicId: string, startDate?: Date, endDate?: Date) {
 405 | 		const services = await db.query.service.findMany({
 406 | 			where: {
 407 | 				clinicId,
 408 | 				isDeleted: false
 409 | 			},
 410 | 			with: {
 411 | 				appointments: {
 412 | 					where: {
 413 | 						isDeleted: false,
 414 | 						...(startDate &&
 415 | 							endDate && {
 416 | 								appointmentDate: {
 417 | 									gte: startDate,
 418 | 									lte: endDate
 419 | 								}
 420 | 							})
 421 | 					}
 422 | 				},
 423 | 				labTests: {
 424 | 					where:
 425 | 						startDate && endDate
 426 | 							? {
 427 | 									testDate: {
 428 | 										gte: startDate,
 429 | 										lte: endDate
 430 | 									}
 431 | 								}
 432 | 							: undefined
 433 | 				}
 434 | 			}
 435 | 		});
 436 | 
 437 | 		return services.map(service => ({
 438 | 			id: service.id,
 439 | 			name: service.serviceName,
 440 | 			category: service.category,
 441 | 			price: service.price,
 442 | 			duration: service.duration,
 443 | 			isAvailable: service.isAvailable,
 444 | 			appointmentCount: service.appointments.length,
 445 | 			labTestCount: service.labTests.length,
 446 | 			totalUsage: service.appointments.length + service.labTests.length,
 447 | 			estimatedRevenue: service.appointments.length * (service.price ?? 0)
 448 | 		}));
 449 | 	},
 450 | 
 451 | 	// Get popular services
 452 | 	async getPopularServices(clinicId: string, limit = 10, startDate?: Date, endDate?: Date) {
 453 | 		const stats = await this.getServiceStatistics(clinicId, startDate, endDate);
 454 | 		return stats.sort((a, b) => b.totalUsage - a.totalUsage).slice(0, limit);
 455 | 	},
 456 | 
 457 | 	// Get services with low usage
 458 | 	async getLowUsageServices(clinicId: string, threshold = 5, days = 30) {
 459 | 		const endDate = new Date();
 460 | 		const startDate = new Date();
 461 | 		startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - days);
 462 | 
 463 | 		const stats = await this.getServiceStatistics(clinicId, startDate, endDate);
 464 | 		return stats.filter(service => service.totalUsage < threshold);
 465 | 	},
 466 | 
 467 | 	// Get service revenue report
 468 | 	async getServiceRevenueReport(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) {
 469 | 		const services = await db.query.service.findMany({
 470 | 			where: {
 471 | 				clinicId,
 472 | 				isDeleted: false
 473 | 			},
 474 | 			with: {
 475 | 				appointments: {
 476 | 					where: {
 477 | 						isDeleted: false,
 478 | 						status: "COMPLETED",
 479 | 						appointmentDate: {
 480 | 							gte: startDate,
 481 | 							lte: endDate
 482 | 						}
 483 | 					}
 484 | 				}
 485 | 			}
 486 | 		});
 487 | 
 488 | 		const report = {
 489 | 			period: { startDate, endDate },
 490 | 			totalRevenue: 0,
 491 | 			services: [] as Array<{
 492 | 				id: string;
 493 | 				name: string;
 494 | 				category: string | null;
 495 | 				appointmentCount: number;
 496 | 				revenue: number;
 497 | 				averagePrice: number;
 498 | 			}>
 499 | 		};
 500 | 
 501 | 		for (const service of services) {
 502 | 			const appointmentCount = service.appointments.length;
 503 | 			const revenue = appointmentCount * (service.price ?? 0);
 504 | 			report.totalRevenue += revenue;
 505 | 			report.services.push({
 506 | 				id: service.id,
 507 | 				name: service.serviceName,
 508 | 				category: service.category,
 509 | 				appointmentCount,
 510 | 				revenue,
 511 | 				averagePrice: service.price ?? 0
 512 | 			});
 513 | 		}
 514 | 
 515 | 		return report;
 516 | 	},
 517 | 
 518 | 	// Check if service can be deleted (no dependencies)
 519 | 	async canDeleteService(serviceId: string) {
 520 | 		const service = await db.query.service.findFirst({
 521 | 			where: { id: serviceId },
 522 | 			with: {
 523 | 				appointments: {
 524 | 					where: {
 525 | 						isDeleted: false,
 526 | 						status: { notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"] }
 527 | 					},
 528 | 					limit: 1
 529 | 				},
 530 | 				labTests: {
 531 | 					limit: 1
 532 | 				}
 533 | 			}
 534 | 		});
 535 | 
 536 | 		if (!service) {
 537 | 			return { canDelete: false, reason: "Service not found" };
 538 | 		}
 539 | 
 540 | 		if (service.appointments.length > 0) {
 541 | 			return { canDelete: false, reason: "Service has upcoming appointments" };
 542 | 		}
 543 | 
 544 | 		if (service.labTests.length > 0) {
 545 | 			return { canDelete: false, reason: "Service has associated lab tests" };
 546 | 		}
 547 | 
 548 | 		return { canDelete: true };
 549 | 	},
 550 | 
 551 | 	// Get service usage trends
 552 | 	async getServiceUsageTrends(clinicId: string, serviceId: string, months = 6) {
 553 | 		const trends = [];
 554 | 		const now = new Date();
 555 | 
 556 | 		for (let i = months - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
 557 | 			const startDate = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() - i, 1);
 558 | 			const endDate = new Date(now.getFullYear(), now.getMonth() - i + 1, 0);
 559 | 
 560 | 			const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 561 | 				where: {
 562 | 					clinicId,
 563 | 					serviceId,
 564 | 					isDeleted: false,
 565 | 					status: "COMPLETED",
 566 | 					appointmentDate: {
 567 | 						gte: startDate,
 568 | 						lte: endDate
 569 | 					}
 570 | 				}
 571 | 			});
 572 | 
 573 | 			trends.push({
 574 | 				month: startDate.toLocaleString("default", {
 575 | 					month: "long",
 576 | 					year: "numeric"
 577 | 				}),
 578 | 				appointmentCount: appointments.length,
 579 | 				revenue: appointments.length * ((await this.getServiceById(serviceId))?.price ?? 0)
 580 | 			});
 581 | 		}
 582 | 
 583 | 		return trends;
 584 | 	},
 585 | 	// Get doctor performance report
 586 | 	async getDoctorPerformanceReport(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) {
 587 | 		const doctors = await db.query.doctor.findMany({
 588 | 			where: {
 589 | 				clinicId,
 590 | 				isDeleted: false
 591 | 			},
 592 | 			with: {
 593 | 				appointments: {
 594 | 					where: {
 595 | 						appointmentDate: {
 596 | 							gte: startDate,
 597 | 							lte: endDate
 598 | 						},
 599 | 						isDeleted: false
 600 | 					}
 601 | 				},
 602 | 				ratings: {
 603 | 					where: {
 604 | 						createdAt: {
 605 | 							gte: startDate,
 606 | 							lte: endDate
 607 | 						}
 608 | 					}
 609 | 				},
 610 | 				prescriptions: {
 611 | 					where: {
 612 | 						issuedDate: {
 613 | 							gte: startDate,
 614 | 							lte: endDate
 615 | 						}
 616 | 					}
 617 | 				}
 618 | 			}
 619 | 		});
 620 | 
 621 | 		return doctors.map(doctor => {
 622 | 			const completedAppointments = doctor.appointments.filter(a => a.status === "COMPLETED");
 623 | 			const cancelledAppointments = doctor.appointments.filter(a => a.status === "CANCELLED");
 624 | 			const averageRating =
 625 | 				doctor.ratings.length > 0
 626 | 					? doctor.ratings.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.rating ?? 0), 0) / doctor.ratings.length
 627 | 					: 0;
 628 | 
 629 | 			return {
 630 | 				id: doctor.id,
 631 | 				name: doctor.name,
 632 | 				specialty: doctor.specialty,
 633 | 				totalAppointments: doctor.appointments.length,
 634 | 				completedAppointments: completedAppointments.length,
 635 | 				cancelledAppointments: cancelledAppointments.length,
 636 | 				completionRate:
 637 | 					doctor.appointments.length > 0
 638 | 						? (completedAppointments.length / doctor.appointments.length) * 100
 639 | 						: 0,
 640 | 				totalPrescriptions: doctor.prescriptions.length,
 641 | 				averageRating,
 642 | 				revenue: completedAppointments.reduce((sum, a) => sum + (a.appointmentPrice ?? 0), 0)
 643 | 			};
 644 | 		});
 645 | 	},

 726 | 	async createServiceWithCategory(data: ServiceCreateInput, categoryId?: string) {
 727 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 728 | 			// Check if service with same name exists in clinic
 729 | 			const existing = await tx.query.service.findFirst({
 730 | 				where: {
 731 | 					clinicId: data.clinicId ?? "",
 732 | 					serviceName: data.serviceName,
 733 | 					isDeleted: false
 734 | 				}
 735 | 			});
 736 | 
 737 | 			if (existing) {
 738 | 				throw new Error("Service with this name already exists in the clinic");
 739 | 			}
 740 | 
 741 | 			// Create service
 742 | 			const [service] = await tx
 743 | 				.insert(schema.service)
 744 | 				.values({
 745 | 					...data,
 746 | 					id: data.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
 747 | 					isAvailable: data.isAvailable ?? true
 748 | 				})
 749 | 				.returning();
 750 | 
 751 | 			// If category is provided, you could link it to a category table
 752 | 			// This assumes you have a service_categories table
 753 | 			if (categoryId && service) {
 754 | 				// await tx.insert(schema.serviceCategory).values({
 755 | 				// 	serviceId: service.id,
 756 | 				// 	categoryId
 757 | 				// });
 758 | 			}
 759 | 
 760 | 			return service;
 761 | 		});
 762 | 	},
 763 | 
 764 | 	async cloneService(serviceId: string, newClinicId?: string) {
 765 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 766 | 			const originalService = await tx.query.service.findFirst({
 767 | 				where: { id: serviceId, isDeleted: false }
 768 | 			});
 769 | 
 770 | 			if (!originalService) {
 771 | 				throw new Error("Original service not found");
 772 | 			}
 773 | 
 774 | 			// Clone service with new ID
 775 | 			const [clonedService] = await tx
 776 | 				.insert(schema.service)
 777 | 				.values({
 778 | 					...originalService,
 779 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 780 | 					clinicId: newClinicId ?? originalService.clinicId,
 781 | 					serviceName: `${originalService.serviceName} (Copy)`,
 782 | 					createdAt: new Date(),
 783 | 					updatedAt: new Date(),
 784 | 					deletedAt: null,
 785 | 					isDeleted: false
 786 | 				})
 787 | 				.returning();
 788 | 
 789 | 			return clonedService;
 790 | 		});
 791 | 	},
 792 | 
 793 | 	async batchUpdateServicePrices(updates: Array<{ id: string; price: number }>) {
 794 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 795 | 			const results = [];
 796 | 			for (const update of updates) {
 797 | 				const [updated] = await tx
 798 | 					.update(schema.service)
 799 | 					.set({
 800 | 						price: update.price,
 801 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
 802 | 					})
 803 | 					.where(eq(schema.service.id, update.id))
 804 | 					.returning();
 805 | 				results.push(updated);
 806 | 			}
 807 | 			return results;
 808 | 		});
 809 | 	},

 848 | 	async createService(data: ServiceCreateInput) {
 849 | 		const [result] = await db.insert(schema.service).values(data).returning();
 850 | 		return result;
 851 | 	},
 852 | 
 853 | 	async createManyServices(data: ServiceCreateInput[]) {
 854 | 		return await db.insert(schema.service).values(data).returning();
 855 | 	},
 856 | 
 857 | 	async updateService(id: string, data: ServiceUpdateInput) {
 858 | 		const updateData = { ...data };
 859 | 		updateData.updatedAt = new Date();
 860 | 		const [result] = await db.update(schema.service).set(updateData).where(eq(schema.service.id, id)).returning();
 861 | 		return result;
 862 | 	},
 863 | 
 864 | 	async updateManyServices(ids: string[], data: ServiceUpdateInput) {
 865 | 		const updateData = { ...data };
 866 | 		updateData.updatedAt = new Date();
 867 | 		return await db.update(schema.service).set(updateData).where(inArray(schema.service.id, ids)).returning();
 868 | 	},
 869 | 
 870 | 	async deleteService(id: string) {
 871 | 		const [result] = await db.delete(schema.service).where(eq(schema.service.id, id)).returning();
 872 | 		return result;
 873 | 	},
 874 | 
 875 | 	async softDeleteService(id: string) {
 876 | 		const [result] = await db
 877 | 			.update(schema.service)
 878 | 			.set({ deletedAt: new Date() })
 879 | 			.where(eq(schema.service.id, id))
 880 | 			.returning();
 881 | 		return result;
 882 | 	},
 883 |

 887 | 			.set({ deletedAt: null })
 888 | 			.where(eq(schema.service.id, id))
 889 | 			.returning();
```

`queries/doctor.repo.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/doctor.repo.ts
   2 | import { and, count, eq, ilike, inArray, or, type SQL } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | 
   4 | import { type DBorTx, db } from "../client";
   5 | import * as schema from "../schema";
   6 | import type { DoctorCreateInput, DoctorUpdateInput, WorkingDayCreateInput, WorkingDayUpdateInput } from "../zod";
   7 | 
   8 | export const doctorRepo = {
   9 | 	async getDoctorById(id: string, clinicId?: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
  10 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  11 | 		const conditions: Record<string, unknown> = { id, isDeleted: false };
  12 | 		if (clinicId) conditions.clinicId = clinicId;
  13 | 
  14 | 		return client.query.doctor.findFirst({
  15 | 			where: conditions,
  16 | 			with: {
  17 | 				user: true,
  18 | 				clinic: true,
  19 | 				workingDays: true
  20 | 			}
  21 | 		});
  22 | 	},
  23 | 
  24 | 	async getDoctorByUserId(userId: string, clinicId?: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
  25 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  26 | 		const conditions: Record<string, unknown> = { userId, isDeleted: false };
  27 | 		if (clinicId) conditions.clinicId = clinicId;
  28 | 
  29 | 		return client.query.doctor.findFirst({
  30 | 			where: conditions,
  31 | 			with: { user: true, clinic: true }
  32 | 		});
  33 | 	},
  34 | 
  35 | 	async listDoctors(
  36 | 		params: {
  37 | 			clinicId: string;
  38 | 			limit: number;
  39 | 			offset: number;
  40 | 			search?: string;
  41 | 			specialty?: string;
  42 | 			status?: schema.Status;
  43 | 			availabilityStatus?: schema.AvailabilityStatus;
  44 | 		},
  45 | 		tx?: DBorTx
  46 | 	) {
  47 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  48 | 		const { clinicId, limit, offset, search, specialty, status, availabilityStatus } = params;
  49 | 
  50 | 		const conditions: SQL[] = [eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.doctor.isDeleted, false)];
  51 | 
  52 | 		if (specialty) conditions.push(eq(schema.doctor.specialty, specialty));
  53 | 		if (status) conditions.push(eq(schema.doctor.status, status));
  54 | 		if (availabilityStatus) conditions.push(eq(schema.doctor.availabilityStatus, availabilityStatus));
  55 | 		if (search) {
  56 | 			conditions.push(
  57 | 				or(ilike(schema.doctor.name, `%${search}%`), ilike(schema.doctor.specialty, `%${search}%`)) as SQL
  58 | 			);
  59 | 		}
  60 | 
  61 | 		const [doctors, total] = await Promise.all([
  62 | 			client.query.doctor.findMany({
  63 | 				where: { AND: conditions.map(c => ({ RAW: () => c })) },
  64 | 				limit,
  65 | 				offset,
  66 | 				orderBy: { name: "asc" }
  67 | 			}),
  68 | 			client
  69 | 				.select({ count: count() })
  70 | 				.from(schema.doctor)
  71 | 				.where(and(...conditions))
  72 | 		]);
  73 | 
  74 | 		return { doctors, total: total[0]?.count ?? 0 };
  75 | 	},
  76 | 
  77 | 	async createDoctor(data: schema.NewDbDoctor, tx?: DBorTx) {
  78 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  79 | 		const [result] = await client.insert(schema.doctor).values(data).returning();
  80 | 		return result;
  81 | 	},
  82 | 
  83 | 	async updateDoctor(id: string, data: Partial<schema.NewDbDoctor>, tx?: DBorTx) {
  84 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  85 | 		const [result] = await client
  86 | 			.update(schema.doctor)
  87 | 			.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
  88 | 			.where(eq(schema.doctor.id, id))
  89 | 			.returning();
  90 | 		return result;
  91 | 	},
  92 | 
  93 | 	async upsertDoctor(data: schema.NewDbDoctor, tx?: DBorTx) {
  94 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  95 | 		const [result] = await client
  96 | 			.insert(schema.doctor)
  97 | 			.values({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
  98 | 			.onConflictDoUpdate({
  99 | 				target: schema.doctor.userId,
 100 | 				set: { ...data, updatedAt: new Date() }
 101 | 			})
 102 | 			.returning();
 103 | 		return result;
 104 | 	},
 105 | 
 106 | 	async softDeleteDoctor(id: string, clinicId?: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 107 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 108 | 		const conditions = [eq(schema.doctor.id, id)];
 109 | 		if (clinicId) conditions.push(eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId));
 110 | 
 111 | 		const [result] = await client
 112 | 			.update(schema.doctor)
 113 | 			.set({ deletedAt: new Date(), isDeleted: true })
 114 | 			.where(and(...conditions))
 115 | 			.returning();
 116 | 		return result;
 117 | 	},
 118 | 
 119 | 	// Working days
 120 | 	async getWorkingDays(doctorId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 121 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 122 | 		return client.query.workingDay.findMany({
 123 | 			where: { doctorId },
 124 | 			orderBy: { day: "asc" }
 125 | 		});
 126 | 	},
 127 | 
 128 | 	async createWorkingDay(data: schema.NewDbWorkingDay, tx?: DBorTx) {
 129 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 130 | 		const [result] = await client.insert(schema.workingDay).values(data).returning();
 131 | 		return result;
 132 | 	},
 133 | 
 134 | 	async updateWorkingDay(id: string, data: Partial<schema.NewDbWorkingDay>, tx?: DBorTx) {
 135 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 136 | 		const [result] = await client
 137 | 			.update(schema.workingDay)
 138 | 			.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
 139 | 			.where(eq(schema.workingDay.id, id))
 140 | 			.returning();
 141 | 		return result;
 142 | 	},
 143 | 
 144 | 	async deleteWorkingDay(id: string, clinicId?: string) {
 145 | 		if (clinicId) {
 146 | 			const [result] = await db
 147 | 				.delete(schema.workingDay)
 148 | 				.where(
 149 | 					and(
 150 | 						eq(schema.workingDay.id, id),
 151 | 						inArray(schema.workingDay.doctorId, db.select({ id: schema.doctor.id }).from(schema.doctor).where(eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId)))
 152 | 					)
 153 | 				).returning();
 154 | 			return result;
 155 | 		}
 156 | 		const [result] = await db.delete(schema.workingDay).where(eq(schema.workingDay.id, id)).returning();
 157 | 		return result;
 158 | 	},
 159 | 
 160 | 	async replaceWorkingDays(doctorId: string, workingDays: schema.NewDbWorkingDay[], tx?: DBorTx) {
 161 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 162 | 		return client.transaction(async tx => {
 163 | 			await tx.delete(schema.workingDay).where(eq(schema.workingDay.doctorId, doctorId));
 164 | 			if (workingDays.length > 0) {
 165 | 				await tx.insert(schema.workingDay).values(workingDays);
 166 | 			}
 167 | 		});
 168 | 	},
 169 | 
 170 | 	// Doctor performance
 171 | 	async getDoctorPerformance(doctorId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, clinicId?: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 172 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 173 | 		const [appointments, ratings, prescriptions] = await Promise.all([
 174 | 			client.query.appointment.findMany({
 175 | 				where: {
 176 | 					doctorId,
 177 | 					isDeleted: false,
 178 | 					clinicId,
 179 | 					appointmentDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 180 | 				}
 181 | 			}),
 182 | 			client.query.rating.findMany({
 183 | 				where: {
 184 | 					staffId: doctorId,
 185 | 					createdAt: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 186 | 				}
 187 | 			}),
 188 | 			client.query.prescription.findMany({
 189 | 				where: {
 190 | 					doctorId,
 191 | 					issuedDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 192 | 				}
 193 | 			})
 194 | 		]);
 195 | 
 196 | 		const completedAppointments = appointments.filter(a => a.status === "COMPLETED");
 197 | 		const cancelledAppointments = appointments.filter(a => a.status === "CANCELLED");
 198 | 		const averageRating =
 199 | 			ratings.length > 0 ? ratings.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.rating ?? 0), 0) / ratings.length : 0;
 200 | 
 201 | 		return {
 202 | 			totalAppointments: appointments.length,
 203 | 			completedAppointments: completedAppointments.length,
 204 | 			cancelledAppointments: cancelledAppointments.length,
 205 | 			completionRate: appointments.length > 0 ? (completedAppointments.length / appointments.length) * 100 : 0,
 206 | 			totalPrescriptions: prescriptions.length,
 207 | 			averageRating,
 208 | 			totalRevenue: completedAppointments.reduce((sum, a) => sum + (a.appointmentPrice ?? 0), 0)
 209 | 		};
 210 | 	},
 211 | 	async getDoctorAvailability(doctorId: string, date: Date) {
 212 | 		const [workingDays, appointments] = await Promise.all([
 213 | 			db.query.workingDay.findMany({
 214 | 				where: { doctorId }
 215 | 			}),
 216 | 
 217 | 			db.query.appointment.findMany({
 218 | 				where: {
 219 | 					doctorId,
 220 | 					appointmentDate: {
 221 | 						gte: new Date(date.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)),
 222 | 						lte: new Date(date.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999))
 223 | 					},
 224 | 					isDeleted: false
 225 | 				}
 226 | 			})
 227 | 		]);
 228 | 
 229 | 		return { workingDays, appointments };
 230 | 	},
 231 | 
 232 | 	// Get doctor with patients and appointments
 233 | 	async getDoctorWithSchedule(doctorId: string, clinicId?: string) {
 234 | 		return await db.query.doctor.findFirst({
 235 | 			where: { id: doctorId, ...(clinicId ? { clinicId } : {}) },
 236 | 			with: {
 237 | 				user: true,
 238 | 				clinic: true,
 239 | 				workingDays: true,
 240 | 				appointments: {
 241 | 					where: { isDeleted: false, appointmentDate: { gte: new Date() } },
 242 | 					with: {
 243 | 						patient: true,
 244 | 						service: true
 245 | 					},
 246 | 					orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" }
 247 | 				},
 248 | 				medicalRecords: {
 249 | 					with: {
 250 | 						patient: true,
 251 | 						encounters: true
 252 | 					},
 253 | 					orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
 254 | 					limit: 20
 255 | 				},
 256 | 				prescriptions: {
 257 | 					where: { status: "active" },
 258 | 					with: {
 259 | 						patient: true,
 260 | 						prescribedItems: {
 261 | 							with: {
 262 | 								drug: true
 263 | 							}
 264 | 						}
 265 | 					},
 266 | 					orderBy: { issuedDate: "desc" }
 267 | 				}
 268 | 			}
 269 | 		});
 270 | 	},
 271 | 
 272 | 	async getAvailableTimeSlots(doctorId: string, date: Date, durationMinutes = 30) {
 273 | 		const workingDay = await db.query.workingDay.findFirst({
 274 | 			where: {
 275 | 				doctorId: doctorId,
 276 | 				day: date.toLocaleDateString("en-US", { weekday: "long" }).toUpperCase() as schema.Day
 277 | 			}
 278 | 		});
 279 | 
 280 | 		if (!workingDay) {
 281 | 			return [];
 282 | 		}
 283 | 
 284 | 		const appointments = await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 285 | 			where: {
 286 | 				doctorId,
 287 | 				appointmentDate: {
 288 | 					gte: new Date(date.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0)),
 289 | 					lte: new Date(date.setHours(23, 59, 59, 999))
 290 | 				},
 291 | 				isDeleted: false,
 292 | 				status: {
 293 | 					notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"]
 294 | 				}
 295 | 			}
 296 | 		});
 297 | 
 298 | 		// Generate time slots
 299 | 		const startHour = Number.parseInt(workingDay.startTime.split(":")[0] ?? "", 10);
 300 | 		const startMinute = Number.parseInt(workingDay.startTime.split(":")[1] ?? "", 10);
 301 | 		const endHour = Number.parseInt(workingDay.endTime.split(":")[0] ?? "", 10);
 302 | 		const endMinute = Number.parseInt(workingDay.endTime.split(":")[1] ?? "", 10);
 303 | 
 304 | 		const slots = [];
 305 | 		const currentTime = new Date(date);
 306 | 		currentTime.setHours(startHour, startMinute, 0, 0);
 307 | 		const endTime = new Date(date);
 308 | 		endTime.setHours(endHour, endMinute, 0, 0);
 309 | 
 310 | 		while (currentTime < endTime) {
 311 | 			const slotEnd = new Date(currentTime);
 312 | 			slotEnd.setMinutes(slotEnd.getMinutes() + durationMinutes);
 313 | 
 314 | 			// Check if slot is available
 315 | 			const isBooked = appointments.some(apt => {
 316 | 				const aptTime = new Date(apt.appointmentDate);
 317 | 				return (
 318 | 					aptTime.getHours() === currentTime.getHours() && aptTime.getMinutes() === currentTime.getMinutes()
 319 | 				);
 320 | 			});
 321 | 
 322 | 			if (!isBooked) {
 323 | 				slots.push({
 324 | 					startTime: currentTime.toLocaleTimeString(),
 325 | 					endTime: slotEnd.toLocaleTimeString(),
 326 | 					available: true
 327 | 				});
 328 | 			}
 329 | 
 330 | 			currentTime.setMinutes(currentTime.getMinutes() + durationMinutes);
 331 | 		}
 332 | 
 333 | 		return slots;
 334 | 	},
 335 | 	// Update doctor schedule
 336 | 	async updateDoctorSchedule(doctorId: string, workingDays: (typeof schema.workingDay.$inferInsert)[]) {
 337 | 		// Delete existing working days and insert new ones
 338 | 		await db.transaction(async tx => {
 339 | 			await tx.delete(schema.workingDay).where(eq(schema.workingDay.doctorId, doctorId));
 340 | 
 341 | 			for (const day of workingDays) {
 342 | 				await tx.insert(schema.workingDay).values({
 343 | 					...day,
 344 | 					doctorId,
 345 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID()
 346 | 				});
 347 | 			}
 348 | 		});
 349 | 	},
 350 | 
 351 | 	async createManyDoctors(data: DoctorCreateInput[]) {
 352 | 		return await db.insert(schema.doctor).values(data).returning();
 353 | 	},
 354 | 
 355 | 	async updateManyDoctors(ids: string[], data: DoctorUpdateInput) {
 356 | 		const updateData = { ...data };
 357 | 		updateData.updatedAt = new Date();
 358 | 		return await db.update(schema.doctor).set(updateData).where(inArray(schema.doctor.id, ids)).returning();
 359 | 	},
 360 | 
 361 | 	async deleteDoctor(id: string, clinicId?: string) {
 362 | 		const conditions = [eq(schema.doctor.id, id)];
 363 | 		if (clinicId) conditions.push(eq(schema.doctor.clinicId, clinicId));
 364 | 
 365 | 		const [result] = await db
 366 | 			.delete(schema.doctor)
 367 | 			.where(and(...conditions))
 368 | 			.returning();
 369 | 		return result;
 370 | 	},
 371 | 
 372 | 	async restoreDoctor(id: string) {
 373 | 		const [result] = await db
 374 | 			.update(schema.doctor)
 375 | 			.set({ deletedAt: null })
 376 | 			.where(eq(schema.doctor.id, id))
 377 | 			.returning();
 378 | 		return result;
 379 | 	},
 380 | 
 381 | 	async createManyWorkingDays(data: WorkingDayCreateInput[]) {
 382 | 		return await db.insert(schema.workingDay).values(data).returning();
 383 | 	},
 384 | 
 385 | 	async updateManyWorkingDays(ids: string[], data: WorkingDayUpdateInput) {
 386 | 		const updateData = { ...data };
 387 | 		updateData.updatedAt = new Date();
 388 | 		return await db.update(schema.workingDay).set(updateData).where(inArray(schema.workingDay.id, ids)).returning();
 389 | 	}
 390 | };
```

`queries/labs.repo.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/clinic.repo.ts
   2 | import { eq, inArray } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | 
   4 | import { db } from "../client";
   5 | import * as schema from "../schema";
   6 | import type { LabTestCreateInput, LabTestUpdateInput } from "../zod";
   7 | 
   8 | export const labsRepo = {
   9 | 	// Clinic queries
  10 | 	async getPendingByClinicId(clinicId: string) {
  11 | 		return await db.query.labTest.findMany({
  12 | 			where: {
  13 | 				status: "PENDING",
  14 | 				patient: {
  15 | 					clinicId
  16 | 				}
  17 | 			},
  18 | 			with: {
  19 | 				patient: true,
  20 | 				service: true,
  21 | 				medicalRecord: {
  22 | 					with: {
  23 | 						doctor: true
  24 | 					}
  25 | 				}
  26 | 			},
  27 | 			orderBy: { testDate: "asc" }
  28 | 		});
  29 | 	},
  30 | 	// Get lab tests by patient
  31 | 	async getByPatientId(patientId: string) {
  32 | 		return await db.query.labTest.findMany({
  33 | 			where: { patientId },
  34 | 			with: {
  35 | 				service: true,
  36 | 				medicalRecord: {
  37 | 					with: {
  38 | 						doctor: true
  39 | 					}
  40 | 				}
  41 | 			},
  42 | 			orderBy: { testDate: "desc" }
  43 | 		});
  44 | 	},
  45 | 
  46 | 	async getPatientLabTests(patientId: string, status?: schema.LabTestStatus) {
  47 | 		return await db.query.labTest.findMany({
  48 | 			where: {
  49 | 				patientId,
  50 | 				...(status && { status })
  51 | 			},
  52 | 			with: {
  53 | 				service: true,
  54 | 				medicalRecord: {
  55 | 					with: {
  56 | 						doctor: true
  57 | 					}
  58 | 				}
  59 | 			},
  60 | 			orderBy: { testDate: "desc" }
  61 | 		});
  62 | 	},
  63 | 	async getById(labTestId: string) {
  64 | 		return await db.query.labTest.findFirst({
  65 | 			where: { id: labTestId },
  66 | 			with: {
  67 | 				patient: true,
  68 | 				service: true,
  69 | 				medicalRecord: {
  70 | 					with: {
  71 | 						doctor: true
  72 | 					}
  73 | 				}
  74 | 			}
  75 | 		});
  76 | 	},
  77 | 	// Update lab test results
  78 | 	async updateLabTestResults(labTestId: string, result: string, status: schema.LabTestStatus) {
  79 | 		return await db
  80 | 			.update(schema.labTest)
  81 | 			.set({
  82 | 				result,
  83 | 				status,
  84 | 				updatedAt: new Date()
  85 | 			})
  86 | 			.where(eq(schema.labTest.id, labTestId))
  87 | 			.returning();
  88 | 	},
  89 | 
  90 | 	// Get pending lab tests
  91 | 	async getPendingLabTests() {
  92 | 		return await db.query.labTest.findMany({
  93 | 			where: {
  94 | 				status: "PENDING"
  95 | 			},
  96 | 			with: {
  97 | 				patient: true,
  98 | 				service: true,
  99 | 				medicalRecord: {
 100 | 					with: {
 101 | 						doctor: true
 102 | 					}
 103 | 				}
 104 | 			},
 105 | 			orderBy: { testDate: "asc" }
 106 | 		});
 107 | 	},

 134 | 	}
 135 | };
 136 | 
 137 | export type LabsRepo = typeof labsRepo;

```

`queries/medical.repo.ts`:

```ts
 209 | 	async getVitalSigns(params: {
 210 | 		patientId: string;
 211 | 		clinicId: string;
 212 | 		limit?: number;
 213 | 		page?: number;
 214 | 		pageSize?: number;
 215 | 		fromDate?: Date;
 216 | 		toDate?: Date;
 217 | 		encounterId?: string;
 218 | 	}) {
 219 | 		const { patientId, clinicId, page = 1, pageSize = 50, limit, fromDate, toDate, encounterId } = params;
 220 | 		const finalLimit = limit ?? pageSize;
 221 | 
 222 | 		const rqbWhere: Record<string, unknown> = { patientId, clinicId };
 223 | 
 224 | 		if (fromDate || toDate) {
 225 | 			const recordedAt: Record<string, unknown> = {};
 226 | 			if (fromDate) recordedAt.gte = fromDate;
 227 | 			if (toDate) recordedAt.lte = toDate;
 228 | 			rqbWhere.recordedAt = recordedAt;
 229 | 		}
 230 | 
 231 | 		if (encounterId) {
 232 | 			rqbWhere.encounterId = encounterId;
 233 | 		}
 234 | 
 235 | 		return await db.query.vitalSign.findMany({
 236 | 			where: rqbWhere,
 237 | 			orderBy: { recordedAt: "desc" },
 238 | 			limit: finalLimit,
 239 | 			offset: (page - 1) * finalLimit
 240 | 		});
 241 | 	},

 262 | 	async checkVitalSignsAccess(userId: string, patientId: string): Promise<boolean> {
 263 | 		const userData = await db.query.user.findFirst({
 264 | 			where: { id: userId },
 265 | 			with: {
 266 | 				patients: true,
 267 | 				doctors: true
 268 | 			}
 269 | 		});
 270 | 
 271 | 		if (!userData) {
 272 | 			return false;
 273 | 		}
 274 | 
 275 | 		if (userData.role === "admin" || userData.role === "staff") {
 276 | 			return true;
 277 | 		}
 278 | 		if (userData.role === "doctor" && userData.doctors) {
 279 | 			return true;
 280 | 		}
 281 | 		if (userData.role === "patient" && Array.isArray(userData.patients)) {
 282 | 			return userData.patients.some(p => p.id === patientId);
 283 | 		}
 284 | 
 285 | 		// Check if user is guardian
 286 | 		const guardianRecord = await db.query.guardian.findFirst({
 287 | 			where: {
 288 | 				userId,
 289 | 				patientId
 290 | 			}
 291 | 		});
 292 | 
 293 | 		return !!guardianRecord;
 294 | 	},
 295 | 	// Create bill for appointment
 296 | 	async createBillForAppointment(appointmentId: string) {
 297 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 298 | 			const appointment = await tx.query.appointment.findFirst({
 299 | 				where: { id: appointmentId },
 300 | 				with: {
 301 | 					patient: true,
 302 | 					doctor: true,
 303 | 					service: true
 304 | 				}
 305 | 			});
 306 | 
 307 | 			if (!appointment) {
 308 | 				throw new Error("Appointment not found");
 309 | 			}
 310 | 
 311 | 			// Calculate total amount
 312 | 			let totalAmount = appointment.appointmentPrice ?? 0;
 313 | 			if (appointment.service) {
 314 | 				totalAmount += appointment.service.price || 0;
 315 | 			}
 316 | 
 317 | 			// Create payment record
 318 | 			const [payment] = await tx
 319 | 				.insert(schema.payment)
 320 | 				.values({
 321 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 322 | 					clinicId: appointment.clinicId,
 323 | 					patientId: appointment.patientId,
 324 | 					appointmentId: appointment.id,
 325 | 					billDate: new Date(),
 326 | 					totalAmount,
 327 | 					amount: totalAmount,
 328 | 					status: "PENDING",
 329 | 					receiptNumber: Math.floor(Math.random() * 1_000_000)
 330 | 				})
 331 | 				.returning();
 332 | 
 333 | 			return payment;
 334 | 		});
 335 | 	},

 359 | 
 360 | 	async listPayments(params: {
 361 | 		clinicId: string;
 362 | 		startDate?: Date;
 363 | 		endDate?: Date;
 364 | 		status?: string;
 365 | 		limit: number;
 366 | 		offset: number;
 367 | 	}) {
 368 | 		const { clinicId, startDate, endDate, status, limit, offset } = params;
 369 | 
 370 | 		const conditions: SQL[] = [eq(schema.payment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.payment.isDeleted, false)];
 371 | 
 372 | 		if (startDate) conditions.push(gte(schema.payment.paymentDate, startDate));
 373 | 		if (endDate) conditions.push(lte(schema.payment.paymentDate, endDate));
 374 | 		if (status) conditions.push(eq(schema.payment.status, status as schema.PaymentStatus));
 375 | 
 376 | 		const [items, totalResult] = await Promise.all([
 377 | 			db.query.payment.findMany({
 378 | 				where: {
 379 | 					clinicId,
 380 | 					isDeleted: false,
 381 | 					paymentDate: {
 382 | 						gte: startDate,
 383 | 						lte: endDate
 384 | 					},
 385 | 					status: status as schema.PaymentStatus
 386 | 				},
 387 | 				limit,
 388 | 				offset,
 389 | 				with: {
 390 | 					patient: true,
 391 | 					appointment: true
 392 | 				},
 393 | 				orderBy: { paymentDate: "desc" }
 394 | 			}),
 395 | 			db
 396 | 				.select({ count: count() })
 397 | 				.from(schema.payment)
 398 | 				.where(and(...conditions))
 399 | 		]);
 400 | 
 401 | 		return {
 402 | 			items,
 403 | 			total: totalResult[0]?.count ?? 0
 404 | 		};
 405 | 	},
 406 | 
 407 | 	async getClinicRevenue(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) {
 408 | 		const payments = await db.query.payment.findMany({
 409 | 			where: {
 410 | 				clinicId,
 411 | 				isDeleted: false,
 412 | 				createdAt: {
 413 | 					gte: startDate,
 414 | 					lte: endDate
 415 | 				}
 416 | 			},
 417 | 
 418 | 			with: {
 419 | 				patient: true
 420 | 			},
 421 | 			orderBy: (payment, { desc }) => [desc(payment.createdAt)]
 422 | 		});
 423 | 
 424 | 		const totalRevenue = payments.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.status === "PAID" ? (p.amountPaid ?? 0) : 0), 0);
 425 | 		const totalBilled = payments.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.totalAmount ?? 0), 0);
 426 | 
 427 | 		const outstanding = Math.max(0, totalBilled - totalRevenue);
 428 | 
 429 | 		const pendingClaims = payments.filter(p => p.paymentMethod === "INSURANCE" && p.status !== "PAID").length;
 430 | 
 431 | 		const collectionRate = totalBilled > 0 ? Math.round((totalRevenue / totalBilled) * 100) : 100;
 432 | 
 433 | 		const transactions = payments.map(p => ({
 434 | 			id: p.id,
 435 | 			patientId: p.patientId || "",
 436 | 			patientName: p.patient ? `${p.patient.firstName} ${p.patient.lastName}` : "Unknown Patient",
 437 | 			amount: p.totalAmount ?? 0,
 438 | 			date: p.paymentDate || p.createdAt,
 439 | 			type: p.status === "PAID" ? ("PAYMENT" as const) : ("INVOICE" as const),
 440 | 			status: (p.status === "PAID"
 441 | 				? "PAID"
 442 | 				: p.status === "PENDING" || p.status === "PARTIAL"
 443 | 					? "PENDING"
 444 | 					: p.status === "UNPAID"
 445 | 						? "OVERDUE"
 446 | 						: "CANCELLED") as "PAID" | "PENDING" | "OVERDUE" | "CANCELLED",
 447 | 			description: p.notes || undefined
 448 | 		}));
 449 | 
 450 | 		return {
 451 | 			totalRevenue,
 452 | 			totalBilled,
 453 | 			monthlyRevenue: totalRevenue,
 454 | 			revenueGrowth: 12,
 455 | 			outstanding,
 456 | 			pendingClaims,
 457 | 			collectionRate,
 458 | 			paymentCount: payments.length,
 459 | 			averagePayment: payments.length > 0 ? totalRevenue / payments.length : 0,
 460 | 			payments,
 461 | 			transactions
 462 | 		};
 463 | 	},
 464 | 
 465 | 	// Process payment
 466 | 	async processPayment(paymentId: string, amountPaid: number, paymentMethod: string, notes?: string) {
 467 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 468 | 			const payment = await tx.query.payment.findFirst({
 469 | 				where: { id: paymentId }
 470 | 			});
 471 | 
 472 | 			if (!payment) {
 473 | 				throw new Error("Payment not found");
 474 | 			}
 475 | 
 476 | 			const [updatedPayment] = await tx
 477 | 				.update(schema.payment)
 478 | 				.set({
 479 | 					amountPaid,
 480 | 					paymentMethod: paymentMethod as schema.PaymentMethod,
 481 | 					paymentDate: new Date(),
 482 | 					paidDate: new Date(),
 483 | 					status: amountPaid >= (payment.totalAmount ?? 0) ? "PAID" : "PARTIAL",
 484 | 					notes,
 485 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 486 | 				})
 487 | 				.where(eq(schema.payment.id, paymentId))
 488 | 				.returning();
 489 | 
 490 | 			return updatedPayment;
 491 | 		});
 492 | 	},
 493 | 	async getTimeLeftForAppointment(appointmentId: string): Promise<string> {
 494 | 		const record = await db.query.appointment.findFirst({
 495 | 			with: {
 496 | 				patient: true,
 497 | 				doctor: true,
 498 | 				clinic: true,
 499 | 				service: true
 500 | 			},
 501 | 			where: { id: appointmentId }
 502 | 		});
 503 | 
 504 | 		if (!record?.appointmentDate) {
 505 | 			return "Appointment not found or date missing";
 506 | 		}
 507 | 
 508 | 		const now = new Date();
 509 | 		const appointmentTime = new Date(record.appointmentDate);
 510 | 
 511 | 		const diffMs = appointmentTime.getTime() - now.getTime();
 512 | 		if (diffMs < 0) return "Appointment has already passed";
 513 | 
 514 | 		const diffMins = Math.floor(diffMs / (1000 * 60));
 515 | 		const hours = Math.floor(diffMins / 60);
 516 | 		const mins = diffMins % 60;
 517 | 
 518 | 		if (hours > 0) {
 519 | 			return `${hours} hours and ${mins} minutes remaining`;
 520 | 		}
 521 | 		return `${mins} minutes remaining`;
 522 | 	},
 523 | 	async createPatientBill(data: PatientBillCreateInput) {
 524 | 		const [result] = await db.insert(schema.patientBill).values(data).returning();
 525 | 		return result;
 526 | 	},

 538 | 			.where(eq(schema.patientBill.id, id))
 539 | 			.returning();
 540 | 		return result;
 541 | 	},

 582 | 
 583 | 	async deleteVitalSign(id: string) {
 584 | 		const [result] = await db.delete(schema.vitalSign).where(eq(schema.vitalSign.id, id)).returning();
 585 | 		return result;
 586 | 	},
 587 | 	async createManyDiagnosiss(data: DiagnosisCreateInput[]) {
 588 | 		return await db.insert(schema.diagnosis).values(data).returning();
 589 | 	},
 590 | 
 591 | 	async updateDiagnosis(id: string, data: DiagnosisUpdateInput) {
 592 | 		const updateData = { ...data };
 593 | 		updateData.updatedAt = new Date();
 594 | 		const [result] = await db
 595 | 			.update(schema.diagnosis)
 596 | 			.set(updateData)
 597 | 			.where(eq(schema.diagnosis.id, id))
 598 | 			.returning();
 599 | 		return result;
 600 | 	},

 602 | 	async updateManyDiagnosiss(ids: string[], data: DiagnosisUpdateInput) {
 603 | 		const updateData = { ...data };
 604 | 		updateData.updatedAt = new Date();
 605 | 		return await db.update(schema.diagnosis).set(updateData).where(inArray(schema.diagnosis.id, ids)).returning();
 606 | 	},
 607 | 
 608 | 	async deleteDiagnosis(id: string) {

 610 | 		return result;

 614 | 		const [result] = await db

 617 | 			.where(eq(schema.diagnosis.id, id))

 622 | 	async restoreDiagnosis(id: string) {
 623 | 		const [result] = await db
 624 | 			.update(schema.diagnosis)
 625 | 			.set({ deletedAt: null })
 626 | 			.where(eq(schema.diagnosis.id, id))
 627 | 			.returning();

 629 | 	},

 634 | 	async restoreMedicalRecord(id: string) {
 635 | 		const [result] = await db
 636 | 			.update(schema.medicalRecord)
 637 | 			.set({ deletedAt: null })
 638 | 			.where(eq(schema.medicalRecord.id, id))
 639 | 			.returning();
 640 | 		return result;
 641 | 	},
 642 | 	async completeEncounter(encounterData: {
 643 | 		medicalRecordId: string;
 644 | 		diagnosisId?: string;
 645 | 		notes?: string;
 646 | 		followUpDate?: Date;
 647 | 		prescribedMedications?: Array<{
 648 | 			drugId: string;
 649 | 			dosageValue: number;
 650 | 			dosageUnit: string;
 651 | 			frequency: schema.Frequency;
 652 | 			duration: string;
 653 | 			instructions?: string;
 654 | 		}>;
 655 | 	}) {
 656 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 657 | 			// Update medical record
 658 | 			const [medicalRecord] = await tx
 659 | 				.update(schema.medicalRecord)
 660 | 				.set({
 661 | 					status: "COMPLETED",
 662 | 					notes: encounterData.notes,
 663 | 					followUpDate: encounterData.followUpDate,
 664 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 665 | 				})
 666 | 				.where(eq(schema.medicalRecord.id, encounterData.medicalRecordId))
 667 | 				.returning();
 668 | 
 669 | 			if (!medicalRecord) {
 670 | 				throw new Error("Medical record not found");
 671 | 			}
 672 | 
 673 | 			// Create prescriptions if provided
 674 | 			const prescriptions = [];
 675 | 			if (encounterData.prescribedMedications?.length) {
 676 | 				const [prescription] = await tx
 677 | 					.insert(schema.prescription)
 678 | 					.values({
 679 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 680 | 						medicalRecordId: medicalRecord.id,
 681 | 						patientId: medicalRecord.patientId,
 682 | 						doctorId: medicalRecord.doctorId,
 683 | 						clinicId: medicalRecord.clinicId,
 684 | 						encounterId: encounterData.diagnosisId || "",
 685 | 						status: "active",
 686 | 						issuedDate: new Date()
 687 | 					})
 688 | 					.returning();
 689 | 
 690 | 				for (const med of encounterData.prescribedMedications) {
 691 | 					const [prescribedItem] = await tx
 692 | 						.insert(schema.prescribedItem)
 693 | 						.values({
 694 | 							id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 695 | 							prescriptionId: prescription?.id ?? "",
 696 | 							clinicId: medicalRecord.clinicId,
 697 | 							drugId: med.drugId,
 698 | 							dosageValue: med.dosageValue,
 699 | 							dosageUnit: med.dosageUnit,
 700 | 							frequency: med.frequency,
 701 | 							duration: med.duration,
 702 | 							instructions: med.instructions
 703 | 						})
 704 | 						.returning();
 705 | 					prescriptions.push(prescribedItem);
 706 | 				}
 707 | 			}
 708 | 
 709 | 			// Update appointment status
 710 | 			await tx
 711 | 				.update(schema.appointment)
 712 | 				.set({ status: "COMPLETED" })
 713 | 				.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, medicalRecord.appointmentId));
 714 | 
 715 | 			return { medicalRecord, prescriptions };
 716 | 		});
 717 | 	},
 718 | 
 719 | 	async createMedicalRecord(data: MedicalRecordCreateInput) {
 720 | 		// Use a transaction if you plan to add more operations later
 721 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 722 | 			const [result] = await tx.insert(schema.medicalRecord).values(data).returning();
 723 | 
 724 | 			if (!result) {
 725 | 				throw new Error("Failed to create medical record");
 726 | 			}
 727 | 
 728 | 			return result;
 729 | 		});
 730 | 	},
 731 | 
 732 | 	async createManyMedicalRecords(data: MedicalRecordCreateInput[]) {
 733 | 		return await db.insert(schema.medicalRecord).values(data).returning();
 734 | 	},

 739 | 		const [result] = await db
 740 | 			.update(schema.medicalRecord)
 741 | 			.set(updateData)
 742 | 			.where(eq(schema.medicalRecord.id, id))
 743 | 			.returning();

 745 | 	},

 747 | 	async updateManyMedicalRecords(ids: string[], data: MedicalRecordUpdateInput) {

 750 | 		return await db
 751 | 			.update(schema.medicalRecord)
 752 | 			.set(updateData)
 753 | 			.where(inArray(schema.medicalRecord.id, ids))
 754 | 			.returning();
 755 | 	},

 757 | 	async deleteMedicalRecord(id: string) {
 758 | 		const [result] = await db.delete(schema.medicalRecord).where(eq(schema.medicalRecord.id, id)).returning();
 759 | 		return result;
 760 | 	},
 761 | 
 762 | 	async softDeleteMedicalRecord(id: string) {
 763 | 		const [result] = await db
 764 | 			.update(schema.medicalRecord)
 765 | 			.set({ deletedAt: new Date() })
 766 | 			.where(eq(schema.medicalRecord.id, id))
 767 | 			.returning();
 768 | 		return result;
 769 | 	},
 770 | 	async addVitalSignsToMedicalRecord(
 771 | 		medicalRecordId: string,
 772 | 		vitalSigns: Omit<VitalSignCreateInput, "medicalId" | "id">
 773 | 	) {
 774 | 		const [vitalSign] = await db
 775 | 			.insert(schema.vitalSign)
 776 | 			.values({
 777 | 				...vitalSigns,
 778 | 				id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 779 | 				medicalId: medicalRecordId
 780 | 			})
 781 | 			.returning();
 782 | 
 783 | 		if (vitalSigns.growthRecordId) {
 784 | 			const growthRec = await db.query.growthRecord.findFirst({
 785 | 				where: {
 786 | 					id: vitalSigns.growthRecordId
 787 | 				}
 788 | 			});
 789 | 
 790 | 			// 3. Extract the weight and height properties directly from the growthRecord entity
 791 | 			if (growthRec?.weight && growthRec.height) {
 792 | 				const heightNum = Number(growthRec.height);
 793 | 				const weightNum = Number(growthRec.weight);
 794 | 
 795 | 				const bmi = weightNum / (heightNum / 100) ** 2;
 796 | 				const bmiValue = Number.parseFloat(bmi.toFixed(1));
 797 | 
 798 | 				// 4. Update the vitalSign record notes securely
 799 | 				await db
 800 | 					.update(schema.vitalSign)
 801 | 					.set({ notes: `Calculated BMI: ${bmiValue}` })
 802 | 					.where(eq(schema.vitalSign.id, vitalSign?.id ?? ""));
 803 | 
 804 | 				// 5. Sync to growth tracking using correct Drizzle Relational Queries v2 syntax
 805 | 				const mr = await db.query.medicalRecord.findFirst({
 806 | 					where: {
 807 | 						id: medicalRecordId
 808 | 					}
 809 | 				});
 810 | 
 811 | 				if (mr) {
 812 | 					await pediatricRepo.recordGrowthWithPercentiles({
 813 | 						patientId: mr.patientId,
 814 | 						clinicId: mr.clinicId,
 815 | 						date: new Date(),
 816 | 						weight: weightNum,
 817 | 						height: heightNum,
 818 | 						bmi: bmiValue
 819 | 					});
 820 | 				}
 821 | 			}
 822 | 		}
 823 | 
 824 | 		return vitalSign;
 825 | 	},
 826 | 	async createCompleteEncounter(data: createCompleteEncounterInput) {
 827 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 828 | 			// 1. Fetch appointment & clinic
 829 | 			const appointment = await tx.query.appointment.findFirst({
 830 | 				where: { id: data.medicalRecord.appointmentId },
 831 | 				columns: { clinicId: true }
 832 | 			});
 833 | 
 834 | 			if (!appointment?.clinicId) throw new Error("Clinic not assigned");
 835 | 
 836 | 			// 2. Complete appointment
 837 | 			await tx
 838 | 				.update(schema.appointment)
 839 | 				.set({ status: "COMPLETED" })
 840 | 				.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, data.medicalRecord.appointmentId));
 841 | 			// 3. Insert Records
 842 | 			const [record]: (typeof schema.medicalRecord.$inferSelect)[] = await tx
 843 | 				.insert(schema.medicalRecord)
 844 | 				.values({
 845 | 					...data.medicalRecord,
 846 | 					clinicId: appointment.clinicId
 847 | 				})
 848 | 				.returning();
 849 | 
 850 | 			const [diagnosis]: (typeof schema.diagnosis.$inferSelect)[] = await tx
 851 | 				.insert(schema.diagnosis)
 852 | 				.values({
 853 | 					...data.diagnoses[0],
 854 | 					patientId: data.medicalRecord.patientId,
 855 | 					doctorId: data.medicalRecord.doctorId,
 856 | 					appointmentId: data.medicalRecord.appointmentId
 857 | 				})
 858 | 				.returning();
 859 | 
 860 | 			// 4. Conditional Inserts
 861 | 			let vitalSigns: typeof schema.vitalSign.$inferSelect | undefined;
 862 | 			if (data.vitalSigns && data.vitalSigns.length > 0) {
 863 | 				const [vitalsResult] = await tx
 864 | 					.insert(schema.vitalSign)
 865 | 					.values({
 866 | 						...data.vitalSigns[0]
 867 | 					})
 868 | 					.returning();
 869 | 				vitalSigns = vitalsResult;
 870 | 			}
 871 | 
 872 | 			let growthRecord: typeof schema.growthRecord.$inferSelect | undefined;
 873 | 			if (data.growthRecord && data.growthRecord.length > 0) {
 874 | 				const [growthResult] = await tx
 875 | 					.insert(schema.growthRecord)
 876 | 					.values({
 877 | 						...data.growthRecord[0]
 878 | 					})
 879 | 					.returning();
 880 | 				growthRecord = growthResult;
 881 | 			}
 882 | 
 883 | 			return { medicalRecord: record, diagnosis, vitalSigns, growthRecord };
 884 | 		});
 885 | 	}
 886 | };
 887 | 
 888 | export type MedicalRepo = typeof medicalRepo;

```

`queries/patient.repo.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/patient.repo.ts
   2 | import { and, count, eq, inArray, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | 
   4 | import { type DBorTx, db } from "../client";
   5 | import * as schema from "../schema";
   6 | import type { GuardianCreateInput, GuardianUpdateInput, PatientCreateInput, PatientUpdateInput } from "../zod";
   7 | export const patientRepo = {
   8 | 	// Patient CRUD
   9 | 
  10 | 	validatePatientData(data: PatientCreateInput | PatientUpdateInput) {
  11 | 		if (data.email && !data.email.includes("@")) {
  12 | 			return { valid: false, error: "Invalid email address" };
  13 | 		}
  14 | 		if (data.phone && data.phone.length < 5) {
  15 | 			return { valid: false, error: "Phone number too short" };
  16 | 		}
  17 | 		if (data.dateOfBirth && data.dateOfBirth > new Date()) {
  18 | 			return { valid: false, error: "Date of birth cannot be in the future" };
  19 | 		}
  20 | 		return { valid: true };
  21 | 	},
  22 | 
  23 | 	async getPatientById(id: string, clinicId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
  24 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  25 | 		return client.query.patient.findFirst({
  26 | 			where: { id, clinicId, isDeleted: false },
  27 | 			with: {
  28 | 				user: true,
  29 | 				clinic: true
  30 | 			}
  31 | 		});
  32 | 	},
  33 | 
  34 | 	async generateMRN(clinicId: string) {
  35 | 		const lastPatient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
  36 | 			where: {
  37 | 				clinicId: clinicId,
  38 | 				isDeleted: false
  39 | 			},
  40 | 			orderBy: (p, { desc }) => desc(p.createdAt)
  41 | 		});
  42 | 
  43 | 		if (lastPatient?.mrn) {
  44 | 			const match = lastPatient.mrn.match(/\d+/);
  45 | 			if (match) {
  46 | 				const nextNumber = Number.parseInt(match[0], 10) + 1;
  47 | 				return `MRN-${nextNumber.toString().padStart(6, "0")}`;
  48 | 			}
  49 | 		}
  50 | 		return "MRN-000001";
  51 | 	},
  52 | 
  53 | 	async getPatientByUserId(userId: string, clinicId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
  54 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  55 | 		return client.query.patient.findFirst({
  56 | 			where: { userId, clinicId, isDeleted: false },
  57 | 			with: { user: true }
  58 | 		});
  59 | 	},
  60 | 
  61 | 	async getPatientByMRN(mrn: string, clinicId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
  62 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  63 | 		return client.query.patient.findFirst({
  64 | 			where: { mrn, clinicId, isDeleted: false }
  65 | 		});
  66 | 	},
  67 | 
  68 | 	async listPatients(
  69 | 		params: {
  70 | 			clinicId: string;
  71 | 			limit: number;
  72 | 			offset: number;
  73 | 			search?: string;
  74 | 			status?: (typeof schema.statusEnum.enumValues)[number]; // Using Enum type
  75 | 			isActive?: boolean;
  76 | 			gender?: (typeof schema.genderEnum.enumValues)[number];
  77 | 			bloodGroup?: (typeof schema.bloodGroupEnum.enumValues)[number];
  78 | 		},
  79 | 		tx?: DBorTx
  80 | 	) {
  81 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  82 | 		const { clinicId, limit, offset, search, status, isActive, gender, bloodGroup } = params;
  83 | 
  84 | 		const whereClause = {
  85 | 			AND: [
  86 | 				{ clinicId: { eq: clinicId } },
  87 | 				{ isDeleted: { eq: false } },
  88 | 				...(status ? [{ status: { eq: status } }] : []),
  89 | 				...(isActive !== undefined ? [{ isActive: { eq: isActive } }] : []),
  90 | 				...(gender ? [{ gender: { eq: gender } }] : []),
  91 | 				...(bloodGroup ? [{ bloodGroup: { eq: bloodGroup } }] : []),
  92 | 				...(search
  93 | 					? [
  94 | 							{
  95 | 								OR: [
  96 | 									{ firstName: { ilike: `%${search}%` } },
  97 | 									{ lastName: { ilike: `%${search}%` } },
  98 | 									{ email: { ilike: `%${search}%` } },
  99 | 									{ phone: { ilike: `%${search}%` } }
 100 | 								]
 101 | 							}
 102 | 						]
 103 | 					: [])
 104 | 			]
 105 | 		};
 106 | 
 107 | 		// Execute queries in parallel
 108 | 		const [patients, total] = await Promise.all([
 109 | 			client.query.patient.findMany({
 110 | 				where: whereClause,
 111 | 				with: { user: true },
 112 | 				limit,
 113 | 				offset,
 114 | 				orderBy: (p, { asc }) => asc(p.lastName)
 115 | 			}),
 116 | 			client
 117 | 				.select({ count: count() })
 118 | 				.from(schema.patient)
 119 | 				.where(and(eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false)))
 120 | 		]);
 121 | 
 122 | 		return {
 123 | 			patients,
 124 | 			total: Number(total[0]?.count ?? 0)
 125 | 		};
 126 | 	},
 127 | 
 128 | 	async createPatient(data: schema.NewDbPatient, tx?: DBorTx) {
 129 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 130 | 		const [result] = await client.insert(schema.patient).values(data).returning();
 131 | 		return result;
 132 | 	},
 133 |

 138 | 			.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
 139 | 			.where(eq(schema.patient.id, id))
 140 | 			.returning();

 164 | 	async getPatientWithFullHistory(patientId: string, clinicId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 165 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 166 | 		return client.query.patient.findFirst({
 167 | 			where: { id: patientId, clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 168 | 			with: {
 169 | 				user: true,
 170 | 				clinic: true,
 171 | 				guardians: {
 172 | 					with: { user: true }
 173 | 				},
 174 | 				appointments: {
 175 | 					where: { isDeleted: false },
 176 | 					with: { doctor: true, service: true },
 177 | 					orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" }
 178 | 				},
 179 | 				medicalRecords: {
 180 | 					with: {
 181 | 						doctor: true,
 182 | 						appointment: true,
 183 | 						vitalSigns: true,
 184 | 						prescriptions: {
 185 | 							with: {
 186 | 								prescribedItems: {
 187 | 									with: { drug: true }
 188 | 								}
 189 | 							}
 190 | 						}
 191 | 					},
 192 | 					orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }
 193 | 				},
 194 | 				vitalSigns: {
 195 | 					orderBy: { recordedAt: "desc" },
 196 | 					limit: 10
 197 | 				},
 198 | 				growthRecords: {
 199 | 					orderBy: { date: "desc" }
 200 | 				},
 201 | 				immunizations: {
 202 | 					with: { administeredBy: true },
 203 | 					orderBy: { date: "desc" }
 204 | 				},
 205 | 				labTests: {
 206 | 					with: { service: true },
 207 | 					orderBy: { testDate: "desc" }
 208 | 				},
 209 | 				prescriptions: {
 210 | 					with: {
 211 | 						doctor: true,
 212 | 						prescribedItems: {
 213 | 							with: { drug: true }
 214 | 						}
 215 | 					},
 216 | 					orderBy: { issuedDate: "desc" }
 217 | 				},
 218 | 				payments: {
 219 | 					orderBy: { paymentDate: "desc" }
 220 | 				},
 221 | 				feedingLogs: {
 222 | 					orderBy: { date: "desc" }
 223 | 				},
 224 | 				developmentalChecks: {
 225 | 					orderBy: { checkDate: "desc" }
 226 | 				}
 227 | 			}
 228 | 		});
 229 | 	},
 230 | 
 231 | 	async getPatientUpcomingAppointments(patientId: string, clinicId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 232 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 233 | 		return client.query.appointment.findMany({
 234 | 			where: {
 235 | 				patientId,
 236 | 				clinicId,
 237 | 				isDeleted: false,
 238 | 				appointmentDate: { gte: new Date() },
 239 | 				status: { notIn: ["CANCELLED", "COMPLETED"] }
 240 | 			},
 241 | 			with: { doctor: true, service: true, clinic: true },
 242 | 			orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" }
 243 | 		});
 244 | 	},
 245 | 
 246 | 	// Patient stats
 247 | 	async getPatientStats(patientId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 248 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 249 | 
 250 | 		const [appointmentStats] = await client
 251 | 			.select({
 252 | 				total: sql<number>`count(*)`,
 253 | 				completed: sql<number>`sum(case when ${schema.appointment.status} = 'COMPLETED' then 1 else 0 end)`,
 254 | 				cancelled: sql<number>`sum(case when ${schema.appointment.status} = 'CANCELLED' then 1 else 0 end)`,
 255 | 				lastVisit: sql<Date>`max(case when ${schema.appointment.status} = 'COMPLETED' then ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} else null end)`,
 256 | 				nextAppointment: sql<Date>`min(case when ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} > now() and ${schema.appointment.status} not in ('CANCELLED', 'COMPLETED') then ${schema.appointment.appointmentDate} else null end)`
 257 | 			})
 258 | 			.from(schema.appointment)
 259 | 			.where(and(eq(schema.appointment.patientId, patientId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false)));
 260 | 
 261 | 		const [paymentStats] = await client
 262 | 			.select({
 263 | 				total: sql<number>`count(*)`,
 264 | 				paidAmount: sql<number>`coalesce(sum(${schema.payment.amountPaid}), 0)`,
 265 | 				totalAmount: sql<number>`coalesce(sum(${schema.payment.totalAmount}), 0)`
 266 | 			})
 267 | 			.from(schema.payment)
 268 | 			.where(and(eq(schema.payment.patientId, patientId), eq(schema.payment.isDeleted, false)));
 269 | 
 270 | 		const [prescriptionStats] = await client
 271 | 			.select({
 272 | 				total: sql<number>`count(*)`,
 273 | 				active: sql<number>`sum(case when ${schema.prescription.status} = 'active' then 1 else 0 end)`
 274 | 			})
 275 | 			.from(schema.prescription)
 276 | 			.where(eq(schema.prescription.patientId, patientId));
 277 | 
 278 | 		const [immunizationCount] = await client
 279 | 			.select({ count: sql<number>`count(*)` })
 280 | 			.from(schema.immunization)
 281 | 			.where(and(eq(schema.immunization.patientId, patientId), eq(schema.immunization.isDeleted, false)));
 282 | 
 283 | 		return {
 284 | 			totalAppointments: Number(appointmentStats?.total ?? 0),
 285 | 			completedAppointments: Number(appointmentStats?.completed ?? 0),
 286 | 			cancelledAppointments: Number(appointmentStats?.cancelled ?? 0),
 287 | 			totalPayments: Number(paymentStats?.total ?? 0),
 288 | 			paidAmount: Number(paymentStats?.paidAmount ?? 0),
 289 | 			dueAmount: Number(paymentStats?.totalAmount ?? 0) - Number(paymentStats?.paidAmount ?? 0),
 290 | 			totalPrescriptions: Number(prescriptionStats?.total ?? 0),
 291 | 			activePrescriptions: Number(prescriptionStats?.active ?? 0),
 292 | 			totalImmunizations: Number(immunizationCount?.count ?? 0),
 293 | 			lastVisit: appointmentStats?.lastVisit ?? null,
 294 | 			nextAppointment: appointmentStats?.nextAppointment ?? null
 295 | 		};
 296 | 	},

 329 | 		minDate.setMonth(minDate.getMonth() - maxAgeMonths);

 331 | 		maxDate.setMonth(maxDate.getMonth() - minAgeMonths);
 332 |

 335 | 				clinicId,

 347 | 	async getPatientsWithAppointmentsThisWeek(clinicId: string) {
 348 | 		const startOfWeek = new Date();
 349 | 		startOfWeek.setDate(startOfWeek.getDate() - startOfWeek.getDay());
 350 | 		startOfWeek.setHours(0, 0, 0, 0);
 351 | 
 352 | 		const endOfWeek = new Date(startOfWeek);
 353 | 		endOfWeek.setDate(endOfWeek.getDate() + 7);
 354 | 
 355 | 		return await db.query.appointment.findMany({
 356 | 			where: {
 357 | 				clinicId,
 358 | 				isDeleted: false,
 359 | 				status: "CONFIRMED",
 360 | 				appointmentDate: {
 361 | 					gte: startOfWeek,
 362 | 					lte: endOfWeek
 363 | 				}
 364 | 			},
 365 | 			with: {
 366 | 				patient: {
 367 | 					with: {
 368 | 						guardians: true
 369 | 					}
 370 | 				},
 371 | 				doctor: true
 372 | 			},
 373 | 			orderBy: { appointmentDate: "asc" }
 374 | 		});
 375 | 	},
 376 | 	async getPatientGrowthPercentiles(patientId: string, clinicId: string) {
 377 | 		const patient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 378 | 			where: { id: patientId, clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 379 | 			with: {
 380 | 				growthRecords: {
 381 | 					orderBy: { date: "asc" }
 382 | 				}
 383 | 			}
 384 | 		});
 385 | 
 386 | 		if (!patient?.growthRecords.length) {
 387 | 			return null;
 388 | 		}
 389 | 
 390 | 		const whoStandards = await db.query.whoGrowthStandard.findMany({
 391 | 			where: {
 392 | 				gender: patient.gender as "MALE" | "FEMALE",
 393 | 				measurementType: "BMI"
 394 | 			}
 395 | 		});
 396 | 
 397 | 		// Calculate percentiles for each growth record
 398 | 		const growthWithPercentiles = patient.growthRecords.map(record => {
 399 | 			const standard = whoStandards.find(s => Math.abs(s.ageDays - (record.ageDays ?? 0)) <= 30);
 400 | 
 401 | 			let percentile = null;
 402 | 			if (standard && record.bmi) {
 403 | 				// Simple percentile calculation (simplified)
 404 | 				if (record.bmi <= standard.sd3neg) percentile = 1;
 405 | 				else if (record.bmi <= standard.sd2neg) percentile = 2;
 406 | 				else if (record.bmi <= standard.sd1neg) percentile = 5;
 407 | 				else if (record.bmi >= standard.sd3pos) percentile = 99;
 408 | 				else if (record.bmi >= standard.sd2pos) percentile = 97;
 409 | 				else if (record.bmi >= standard.sd1pos) percentile = 85;
 410 | 				else percentile = 50;
 411 | 			}
 412 | 
 413 | 			return { ...record, percentile };
 414 | 		});
 415 | 
 416 | 		return growthWithPercentiles;
 417 | 	},
 418 | 
 419 | 	async getNeonatalAssessment(patientId: string, clinicId: string) {
 420 | 		return db.query.neonatalAssessment.findFirst({
 421 | 			where: { patientId, clinicId }
 422 | 		});
 423 | 	},
```
