```ts
 620 | 	async createPatientWithGuardian(
 621 | 		patientData: PatientCreateInput,
 622 | 		guardianData?: Omit<GuardianCreateInput, "patientId">
 623 | 	) {
 624 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 625 | 			// Create patient
 626 | 			const [patient] = await tx
 627 | 				.insert(schema.patient)
 628 | 				.values({
 629 | 					...patientData,
 630 | 					id: patientData.id ?? crypto.randomUUID()
 631 | 				})
 632 | 				.returning();
 633 | 
 634 | 			// Create guardian if provided
 635 | 			if (guardianData && patient) {
 636 | 				await tx.insert(schema.guardian).values({
 637 | 					...guardianData,
 638 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 639 | 					patientId: patient.id
 640 | 				});
 641 | 			}
 642 | 
 643 | 			// Create initial growth record if age appropriate
 644 | 			if (patient?.dateOfBirth) {
 645 | 				const ageInDays = Math.floor((Date.now() - patient?.dateOfBirth.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
 646 | 
 647 | 				if (ageInDays <= 730) {
 648 | 					// First 2 years
 649 | 					await tx.insert(schema.growthRecord).values({
 650 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 651 | 						patientId: patient?.id,
 652 | 						clinicId: patient?.clinicId,
 653 | 						date: new Date(),
 654 | 						ageDays: ageInDays,
 655 | 						ageMonths: Math.floor(ageInDays / 30),
 656 | 						gender: patient?.gender as schema.Gender
 657 | 					});
 658 | 				}
 659 | 			}
 660 | 
 661 | 			return patient;
 662 | 		});
 663 | 	},
 664 | 
 665 | 	async createGuardians(data: GuardianCreateInput) {
 666 | 		const [result] = await db.insert(schema.guardian).values(data).returning();
 667 | 		return result;
 668 | 	},

 704 | 
 705 | export type PatientRepo = typeof patientRepo;

```

`queries/payment.repo.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // queries/payment.repo.ts
   2 | import { and, count, desc, eq, gte, ilike, lte, or, SQL, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | import { type DBorTx, db } from "../client";
   4 | import * as schema from "../schema";
   5 | import type { DbPayment, PaymentMethod, PaymentStatus } from "../schema/types";
   6 | 
   7 | export const paymentRepo = {
   8 | 	/**
   9 | 	 * Get payment records with pagination and filters
  10 | 	 */
  11 | 	async getPaymentRecords(
  12 | 		params: {
  13 | 			page: number;
  14 | 			limit: number;
  15 | 			search?: string;
  16 | 			status?: PaymentStatus;
  17 | 			startDate?: Date;
  18 | 			endDate?: Date;
  19 | 		},
  20 | 		tx?: DBorTx
  21 | 	) {
  22 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  23 | 		const { page, limit, search, status, startDate, endDate } = params;
  24 | 		const offset = (page - 1) * limit;
  25 | 
  26 | 		const conditions: SQL[] = [];
  27 | 
  28 | 		if (search) {
  29 | 			conditions.push(
  30 | 				or(
  31 | 					ilike(schema.patient.firstName, `%${search}%`),
  32 | 					ilike(schema.patient.lastName, `%${search}%`),
  33 | 					ilike(schema.payment.patientId, `%${search}%`)
  34 | 				) as SQL
  35 | 			);
  36 | 		}
  37 | 
  38 | 		if (status) {
  39 | 			conditions.push(eq(schema.payment.status, status));
  40 | 		}
  41 | 
  42 | 		if (startDate) {
  43 | 			conditions.push(gte(schema.payment.billDate, startDate));
  44 | 		}
  45 | 
  46 | 		if (endDate) {
  47 | 			conditions.push(lte(schema.payment.billDate, endDate));
  48 | 		}
  49 | 
  50 | 		const whereClause = conditions.length > 0 ? and(...conditions) : undefined;
  51 | 
  52 | 		const [payments, total] = await Promise.all([
  53 | 			client
  54 | 				.select({
  55 | 					payment: schema.payment,
  56 | 					patient: {
  57 | 						firstName: schema.patient.firstName,
  58 | 						lastName: schema.patient.lastName,
  59 | 						dateOfBirth: schema.patient.dateOfBirth,
  60 | 						image: schema.patient.image,
  61 | 						colorCode: schema.patient.colorCode,
  62 | 						gender: schema.patient.gender,
  63 | 						phone: schema.patient.phone,
  64 | 						email: schema.patient.email
  65 | 					}
  66 | 				})
  67 | 				.from(schema.payment)
  68 | 				.leftJoin(schema.patient, eq(schema.payment.patientId, schema.patient.id))
  69 | 				.where(whereClause)
  70 | 				.orderBy(desc(schema.payment.createdAt))
  71 | 				.limit(limit)
  72 | 				.offset(offset),
  73 | 			client
  74 | 				.select({ count: count() })
  75 | 				.from(schema.payment)
  76 | 				.leftJoin(schema.patient, eq(schema.payment.patientId, schema.patient.id))
  77 | 				.where(whereClause)
  78 | 		]);
  79 | 
  80 | 		const totalRecords = Number(total[0]?.count) || 0;
  81 | 
  82 | 		return {
  83 | 			payments: payments.map(item => ({
  84 | 				...item.payment,
  85 | 				patient: item.patient
  86 | 			})),
  87 | 			total: totalRecords,
  88 | 			page,
  89 | 			limit,
  90 | 			totalPages: Math.ceil(totalRecords / limit)
  91 | 		};
  92 | 	},
  93 | 
  94 | 	/**
  95 | 	 * Get payment by ID with patient and bills
  96 | 	 */
  97 | 	async getPaymentById(id: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
  98 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
  99 | 
 100 | 		const paymentData = await client
 101 | 			.select({
 102 | 				payment: schema.payment,
 103 | 				patient: {
 104 | 					firstName: schema.patient.firstName,
 105 | 					lastName: schema.patient.lastName,
 106 | 					dateOfBirth: schema.patient.dateOfBirth,
 107 | 					image: schema.patient.image,
 108 | 					colorCode: schema.patient.colorCode,
 109 | 					gender: schema.patient.gender,
 110 | 					phone: schema.patient.phone,
 111 | 					email: schema.patient.email
 112 | 				}
 113 | 			})
 114 | 			.from(schema.payment)
 115 | 			.leftJoin(schema.patient, eq(schema.payment.patientId, schema.patient.id))
 116 | 			.where(eq(schema.payment.id, id))
 117 | 			.limit(1);
 118 | 
 119 | 		if (!paymentData.length) {
 120 | 			return null;
 121 | 		}
 122 | 
 123 | 		return {
 124 | 			...paymentData[0]?.payment,
 125 | 			patient: paymentData[0]?.patient
 126 | 		};
 127 | 	},
 128 | 
 129 | 	/**
 130 | 	 * Get bills by payment ID
 131 | 	 */
 132 | 	async getBillsByPaymentId(paymentId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 133 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 134 | 
 135 | 		return client
 136 | 			.select({
 137 | 				bill: schema.patientBill,
 138 | 				service: {
 139 | 					id: schema.service.id,
 140 | 					serviceName: schema.service.serviceName,
 141 | 					description: schema.service.description,
 142 | 					price: schema.service.price,
 143 | 					category: schema.service.category
 144 | 				}
 145 | 			})
 146 | 			.from(schema.patientBill)
 147 | 			.leftJoin(schema.service, eq(schema.patientBill.serviceId, schema.service.id))
 148 | 			.where(eq(schema.patientBill.billId, paymentId))
 149 | 			.orderBy(desc(schema.patientBill.createdAt));
 150 | 	},
 151 | 
 152 | 	/**
 153 | 	 * Get payment summary statistics
 154 | 	 */
 155 | 	async getPaymentSummary(startDate?: Date, endDate?: Date, tx?: DBorTx) {
 156 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 157 | 		const conditions = [];
 158 | 
 159 | 		if (startDate) {
 160 | 			conditions.push(gte(schema.payment.billDate, startDate));
 161 | 		}
 162 | 
 163 | 		if (endDate) {
 164 | 			conditions.push(lte(schema.payment.billDate, endDate));
 165 | 		}
 166 | 
 167 | 		const whereClause = conditions.length > 0 ? and(...conditions) : undefined;
 168 | 
 169 | 		const summary = await client
 170 | 			.select({
 171 | 				totalPayments: count(),
 172 | 				totalAmount: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${schema.payment.totalAmount}), 0)`,
 173 | 				totalPaid: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${schema.payment.amountPaid}), 0)`,
 174 | 				totalDiscount: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${schema.payment.discount}), 0)`,
 175 | 				paidCount: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ${schema.payment.status} = 'PAID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)`,
 176 | 				pendingCount: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ${schema.payment.status} = 'PENDING' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)`,
 177 | 				unpaidCount: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ${schema.payment.status} = 'UNPAID' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)`,
 178 | 				refundedCount: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ${schema.payment.status} = 'REFUNDED' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)`,
 179 | 				partialCount: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN ${schema.payment.status} = 'PARTIAL' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0)`
 180 | 			})
 181 | 			.from(schema.payment)
 182 | 			.where(whereClause);
 183 | 
 184 | 		return summary[0] ?? {
 185 | 			totalPayments: 0,
 186 | 			totalAmount: 0,
 187 | 			totalPaid: 0,
 188 | 			totalDiscount: 0,
 189 | 			paidCount: 0,
 190 | 			pendingCount: 0,
 191 | 			unpaidCount: 0,
 192 | 			refundedCount: 0,
 193 | 			partialCount: 0
 194 | 		};
 195 | 	},
 196 | 
 197 | 	/**
 198 | 	 * Create a new payment
 199 | 	 */
 200 | 	async createPayment(data: Partial<DbPayment> & { id: string; billDate: Date }, tx?: DBorTx) {
 201 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 202 | 		const [result] = await client
 203 | 			.insert(schema.payment)
 204 | 			.values({
 205 | 				...data,
 206 | 				createdAt: data.createdAt ?? new Date(),
 207 | 				updatedAt: data.updatedAt ?? new Date()
 208 | 			})
 209 | 			.returning();
 210 | 		return result;
 211 | 	},
 212 | 
 213 | 	/**
 214 | 	 * Update payment
 215 | 	 */
 216 | 	async updatePayment(id: string, data: Partial<DbPayment>, tx?: DBorTx) {
 217 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 218 | 		const [result] = await client
 219 | 			.update(schema.payment)
 220 | 			.set({ ...data, updatedAt: new Date() })
 221 | 			.where(eq(schema.payment.id, id))
 222 | 			.returning();
 223 | 		return result;
 224 | 	},
 225 | 
 226 | 	/**
 227 | 	 * Update payment status
 228 | 	 */
 229 | 	async updatePaymentStatus(id: string, status: PaymentStatus, paymentMethod?: PaymentMethod, notes?: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 230 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 231 | 		const [result] = await client
 232 | 			.update(schema.payment)
 233 | 			.set({
 234 | 				status,
 235 | 				paymentMethod,
 236 | 				notes,
 237 | 				paymentDate: status === "PAID" ? new Date() : undefined,
 238 | 				updatedAt: new Date()
 239 | 			})
 240 | 			.where(eq(schema.payment.id, id))
 241 | 			.returning();
 242 | 		return result;
 243 | 	},
 244 | 
 245 | 	/**
 246 | 	 * Get or create payment for appointment
 247 | 	 */
 248 | 	async getOrCreatePaymentByAppointment(appointmentId: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 249 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 250 | 
 251 | 		// Check if payment exists
 252 | 		const existingPayment = await client.query.payment.findFirst({
 253 | 			where: { appointmentId }
 254 | 		});
 255 | 
 256 | 		if (existingPayment) {
 257 | 			return existingPayment;
 258 | 		}
 259 | 
 260 | 		// Get appointment details
 261 | 		const appointmentData = await client.query.appointment.findFirst({
 262 | 			where: { id: appointmentId },
 263 | 			columns: { patientId: true, clinicId: true }
 264 | 		});
 265 | 
 266 | 		if (!appointmentData) {
 267 | 			throw new Error("Appointment not found");
 268 | 		}
 269 | 
 270 | 		if (!appointmentData.patientId) {
 271 | 			throw new Error("Patient ID missing for appointment");
 272 | 		}
 273 | 
 274 | 		// Create new payment
 275 | 		const [newPayment] = await client
 276 | 			.insert(schema.payment)
 277 | 			.values({
 278 | 				id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 279 | 				appointmentId,
 280 | 				patientId: appointmentData.patientId,
 281 | 				clinicId: appointmentData.clinicId,
 282 | 				billDate: new Date(),
 283 | 				paymentDate: new Date(),
 284 | 				discount: 0,
 285 | 				amountPaid: 0,
 286 | 				totalAmount: 0,
 287 | 				status: "PENDING"
 288 | 			})
 289 | 			.returning();
 290 | 
 291 | 		return newPayment;
 292 | 	},
 293 | 
 294 | 	/**
 295 | 	 * Add bill item to payment
 296 | 	 */
 297 | 	async addBillItem(data: {
 298 | 		billId: string;
 299 | 		serviceId: string;
 300 | 		serviceDate: Date;
 301 | 		quantity: number;
 302 | 		unitCost: number;
 303 | 		totalCost: number;
 304 | 	}, tx?: DBorTx) {
 305 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 306 | 
 307 | 		const [result] = await client
 308 | 			.insert(schema.patientBill)
 309 | 			.values({
 310 | 				id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 311 | 				...data
 312 | 			})
 313 | 			.returning();
 314 | 
 315 | 		// Update payment total amount
 316 | 		const currentTotal = await client
 317 | 			.select({ sum: sql<number>`COALESCE(SUM(${schema.patientBill.totalCost}), 0)` })
 318 | 			.from(schema.patientBill)
 319 | 			.where(eq(schema.patientBill.billId, data.billId));
 320 | 
 321 | 		const newTotalAmount = Number(currentTotal[0]?.sum) || 0;
 322 | 
 323 | 		await client
 324 | 			.update(schema.payment)
 325 | 			.set({
 326 | 				totalAmount: newTotalAmount,
 327 | 				updatedAt: new Date()
 328 | 			})
 329 | 			.where(eq(schema.payment.id, data.billId));
 330 | 
 331 | 		return result;
 332 | 	},
 333 | 
 334 | 	/**
 335 | 	 * Generate final bill with discount
 336 | 	 */
 337 | 	async generateBill(
 338 | 		paymentId: string,
 339 | 		billDate: Date,
 340 | 		discountPercentage: number,
 341 | 		totalAmount: number,
 342 | 		tx?: DBorTx
 343 | 	) {
 344 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 345 | 
 346 | 		const discountAmount = (discountPercentage / 100) * totalAmount;
 347 | 		const finalTotal = totalAmount - discountAmount;
 348 | 
 349 | 		const [updatedPayment] = await client
 350 | 			.update(schema.payment)
 351 | 			.set({
 352 | 				billDate,
 353 | 				discount: discountAmount,
 354 | 				totalAmount,
 355 | 				amountPaid: finalTotal,
 356 | 				status: "PAID",
 357 | 				paymentDate: new Date(),
 358 | 				updatedAt: new Date()
 359 | 			})
 360 | 			.where(eq(schema.payment.id, paymentId))
 361 | 			.returning();
 362 | 
 363 | 		if (!updatedPayment) {
 364 | 			throw new Error("Payment record not found");
 365 | 		}
 366 | 
 367 | 		// Update appointment status to COMPLETED if appointment exists
 368 | 		if (updatedPayment.appointmentId) {
 369 | 			await client
 370 | 				.update(schema.appointment)
 371 | 				.set({
 372 | 					status: "COMPLETED",
 373 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 374 | 				})
 375 | 				.where(eq(schema.appointment.id, updatedPayment.appointmentId));
 376 | 		}
 377 | 
 378 | 		return {
 379 | 			...updatedPayment,
 380 | 			discountPercentage,
 381 | 			finalAmount: finalTotal
 382 | 		};
 383 | 	}
 384 | };
 385 | 
 386 | export type PaymentRepo = typeof paymentRepo;

```

`queries/pediatric.repo.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/clinic.repo.ts
   2 | 
   3 | import { and, between, eq, gte, inArray, lte, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   4 | 
   5 | import { db } from "../client";
   6 | import * as schema from "../schema";
   7 | import type {
   8 |   AdverseEventCreateInput,

  43 | }

  52 | 	recommendations: string[];

  54 | 	notes: string | null;
  55 | 	createdAt: Date;

  57 | }
  58 | 
  59 | export const pediatricRepo = {
  60 | 	// Clinic queries
  61 | 	async getPatientGrowthRecords(patientId: string, clinicId: string) {
  62 | 		return await db.query.growthRecord.findMany({
  63 | 			where: { patientId, clinicId },
  64 | 			orderBy: { date: "asc" }
  65 | 		});
  66 | 	},
  67 | 
  68 | 	async listGrowthRecords(clinicId: string, patientId?: string, limit = 50, offset = 0) {
  69 | 		const [records, total] = await Promise.all([
  70 | 			db.query.growthRecord.findMany({
  71 | 				where: {
  72 | 					clinicId,
  73 | 					...(patientId && { patientId })
  74 | 				},
  75 | 				limit,
  76 | 				offset,
  77 | 				orderBy: { date: "desc" }
  78 | 			}),
  79 | 			db.$count(
  80 | 				schema.growthRecord,
  81 | 				and(
  82 | 					eq(schema.growthRecord.clinicId, clinicId),
  83 | 					patientId ? eq(schema.growthRecord.patientId, patientId) : undefined
  84 | 				)
  85 | 			)
  86 | 		]);
  87 | 		return { records, total };
  88 | 	},
  89 | 	async getGrowthRecordById(id: string, clinicId: string) {
  90 | 		return await db.query.growthRecord.findFirst({
  91 | 			where: { id, clinicId },
  92 | 			with: {
  93 | 				patient: true
  94 | 			}
  95 | 		});
  96 | 	},
  97 | 	async addMeasurementPoint(
  98 | 		input: {
  99 | 			patientId: string;
 100 | 			date: Date;
 101 | 			weight?: number;
 102 | 			height?: number;
 103 | 			headCircumference?: number;
 104 | 			notes?: string;
 105 | 		},
 106 | 		clinicId: string
 107 | 	) {
 108 | 		return await db
 109 | 			.insert(schema.growthRecord)
 110 | 			.values({
 111 | 				...input,
 112 | 				id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 113 | 				clinicId
 114 | 			})
 115 | 			.returning();
 116 | 	},
 117 | 
 118 | 	async getGrowthAnalytics(patientId: string, clinicId: string) {
 119 | 		const records = await this.getPatientGrowthRecords(patientId, clinicId);
 120 | 
 121 | 		if (records.length < 2) return { velocity: null, records };
 122 | 
 123 | 		const first = records[0];
 124 | 		const last = records[records.length - 1];
 125 | 		if (!first || !last) {
 126 | 			return { velocity: null, records };
 127 | 		}
 128 | 		const monthsDiff = (last.date.getTime() - first.date.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 30.44);
 129 | 
 130 | 		const weightVelocity = monthsDiff > 0 ? (Number(last.weight ?? 0) - Number(first.weight ?? 0)) / monthsDiff : 0;
 131 | 		const heightVelocity = monthsDiff > 0 ? (Number(last.height ?? 0) - Number(first.height ?? 0)) / monthsDiff : 0;
 132 | 
 133 | 		return {
 134 | 			records,
 135 | 			velocity: {
 136 | 				weightKgPerMonth: weightVelocity.toFixed(2),
 137 | 				heightCmPerMonth: heightVelocity.toFixed(2)
 138 | 			}
 139 | 		};
 140 | 	},
 141 | 	async list({
 142 | 		patientId,
 143 | 		clinicId: _clinicId,
 144 | 		startDate,
 145 | 		endDate,
 146 | 		type,
 147 | 		limit = 50,
 148 | 		offset = 0
 149 | 	}: FeedingLogFilters) {
 150 | 		const logs = await db.query.feedingLog.findMany({
 151 | 			where: {
 152 | 				patientId,
 153 | 				date: {
 154 | 					gte: startDate,
 155 | 					lte: endDate
 156 | 				},
 157 | 				type
 158 | 			},
 159 | 			orderBy: { date: "desc" },
 160 | 			limit,
 161 | 			offset
 162 | 		});
 163 | 
 164 | 		const total = await db.$count(
 165 | 			schema.feedingLog,
 166 | 			and(
 167 | 				eq(schema.feedingLog.patientId, patientId),
 168 | 				startDate && endDate
 169 | 					? between(schema.feedingLog.date, startDate, endDate)
 170 | 					: startDate
 171 | 						? gte(schema.feedingLog.date, startDate)
 172 | 						: endDate
 173 | 							? lte(schema.feedingLog.date, endDate)
 174 | 							: undefined,
 175 | 				type ? eq(schema.feedingLog.type, type) : undefined
 176 | 			)
 177 | 		);
 178 | 
 179 | 		return {
 180 | 			logs,
 181 | 			total,
 182 | 			hasMore: offset + limit < total
 183 | 		};
 184 | 	},
 185 | 
 186 | 	/**
 187 | 	 * Get feeding log by ID
 188 | 	 */
 189 | 	async getById(id: string, _clinicId?: string) {
 190 | 		return await db.query.feedingLog.findFirst({
 191 | 			where: {
 192 | 				id
 193 | 			}
 194 | 		});
 195 | 	},
 196 | 
 197 | 	/**
 198 | 	 * Get feeding statistics for a patient
 199 | 	 */
 200 | 	async getFeedingStats(patientId: string, _clinicId: string, days = 30): Promise<FeedingStats> {
 201 | 		const endDate = new Date();
 202 | 		const startDate = new Date();
 203 | 		startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - days);
 204 | 
 205 | 		const logs = await db.query.feedingLog.findMany({
 206 | 			where: {
 207 | 				patientId,
 208 | 				date: {
 209 | 					gte: startDate,
 210 | 					lte: endDate
 211 | 				}
 212 | 			},
 213 | 			orderBy: { date: "asc" }
 214 | 		});
 215 | 
 216 | 		// Calculate statistics
 217 | 		const byType: Record<string, number> = {};
 218 | 		let totalDuration = 0;
 219 | 		let totalAmount = 0;
 220 | 		const feedingsByDayMap: Record<string, { count: number; totalDuration: number; totalAmount: number }> = {};
 221 | 
 222 | 		for (const log of logs) {
 223 | 			// Count by type
 224 | 			byType[log.type] = (byType[log.type] || 0) + 1;
 225 | 
 226 | 			// Sum duration and amount
 227 | 			totalDuration += log.duration || 0;
 228 | 			totalAmount += log.amount || 0;
 229 | 
 230 | 			// Group by day
 231 | 			const dateKey = log.date.toISOString().split("T")[0] ?? "";
 232 | 			if (!feedingsByDayMap[dateKey]) {
 233 | 				feedingsByDayMap[dateKey] = {
 234 | 					count: 0,
 235 | 					totalDuration: 0,
 236 | 					totalAmount: 0
 237 | 				};
 238 | 			}
 239 | 			feedingsByDayMap[dateKey].count++;
 240 | 			feedingsByDayMap[dateKey].totalDuration += log.duration || 0;
 241 | 			feedingsByDayMap[dateKey].totalAmount += log.amount || 0;
 242 | 		}
 243 | 
 244 | 		const averageDuration = logs.length > 0 ? totalDuration / logs.length : 0;
 245 | 
 246 | 		return {
 247 | 			totalFeedings: logs.length,
 248 | 			byType,
 249 | 			averageDuration,
 250 | 			totalAmount,
 251 | 			feedingsByDay: Object.entries(feedingsByDayMap)
 252 | 				.map(([date, stats]) => ({
 253 | 					date,
 254 | 					count: stats.count,
 255 | 					totalDuration: stats.totalDuration,
 256 | 					totalAmount: stats.totalAmount
 257 | 				}))
 258 | 				.sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date))
 259 | 		};
 260 | 	},
 261 | 
 262 | 	/**
 263 | 	 * Get breastfeeding-specific statistics
 264 | 	 */
 265 | 	async getBreastfeedingStats(patientId: string, _clinicId: string, days = 30) {
 266 | 		const endDate = new Date();
 267 | 		const startDate = new Date();
 268 | 		startDate.setDate(startDate.getDate() - days);
 269 | 
 270 | 		const logs = await db.query.feedingLog.findMany({
 271 | 			where: {
 272 | 				patientId,
 273 | 				type: "BREAST",
 274 | 				date: {
 275 | 					gte: startDate,
 276 | 					lte: endDate
 277 | 				}
 278 | 			},
 279 | 			orderBy: { date: "asc" }
 280 | 		});
 281 | 
 282 | 		// Today's total
 283 | 		const today = new Date().toISOString().split("T")[0] ?? "";
 284 | 		const todayFeedings = logs.filter(log => log.date.toISOString().split("T")[0] === today);
 285 | 		const todayTotal = todayFeedings.length;
 286 | 
 287 | 		// Weekly data (last 7 days)
 288 | 		const weeklyDataMap: Record<
 289 | 			string,
 290 | 			{
 291 | 				duration: number;
 292 | 				count: number;
 293 | 				leftDuration: number;
 294 | 				rightDuration: number;
 295 | 			}
 296 | 		> = {};
 297 | 
 298 | 		for (const log of logs) {
 299 | 			const dateKey = log.date.toISOString().split("T")[0] ?? "";
 300 | 			if (!weeklyDataMap[dateKey]) {
 301 | 				weeklyDataMap[dateKey] = {
 302 | 					duration: 0,
 303 | 					count: 0,
 304 | 					leftDuration: 0,
 305 | 					rightDuration: 0
 306 | 				};
 307 | 			}
 308 | 			weeklyDataMap[dateKey].duration += log.duration || 0;
 309 | 			weeklyDataMap[dateKey].count++;
 310 | 			if (log.breast === "LEFT") weeklyDataMap[dateKey].leftDuration += log.duration || 0;
 311 | 			if (log.breast === "RIGHT") weeklyDataMap[dateKey].rightDuration += log.duration || 0;
 312 | 			if (log.breast === "BOTH") {
 313 | 				weeklyDataMap[dateKey].leftDuration += (log.duration || 0) / 2;
 314 | 				weeklyDataMap[dateKey].rightDuration += (log.duration || 0) / 2;
 315 | 			}
 316 | 		}
 317 | 
 318 | 		const weeklyData = Object.entries(weeklyDataMap)
 319 | 			.map(([date, stats]) => ({
 320 | 				date,
 321 | 				duration: stats.duration,
 322 | 				count: stats.count,
 323 | 				leftDuration: stats.leftDuration,
 324 | 				rightDuration: stats.rightDuration
 325 | 			}))
 326 | 			.sort((a, b) => a.date.localeCompare(b.date))
 327 | 			.slice(-7);
 328 | 
 329 | 		// Calculate average duration
 330 | 		const totalDuration = logs.reduce((sum, log) => sum + (log.duration || 0), 0);
 331 | 		const averageDuration = logs.length > 0 ? totalDuration / logs.length : 0;
 332 | 
 333 | 		// Weekly average (last 7 days)
 334 | 		const last7Days = weeklyData.slice(-7);
 335 | 		const weeklyAverage =
 336 | 			last7Days.length > 0 ? last7Days.reduce((sum, day) => sum + day.count, 0) / last7Days.length : 0;
 337 | 
 338 | 		// Sessions by time of day
 339 | 		const sessionsByTimeOfDay = {
 340 | 			morning: 0, // 6am - 12pm
 341 | 			afternoon: 0, // 12pm - 5pm
 342 | 			evening: 0, // 5pm - 9pm
 343 | 			night: 0 // 9pm - 6am
 344 | 		};
 345 | 
 346 | 		for (const log of logs) {
 347 | 			const hour = log.date.getHours();
 348 | 			if (hour >= 6 && hour < 12) sessionsByTimeOfDay.morning++;
 349 | 			else if (hour >= 12 && hour < 17) sessionsByTimeOfDay.afternoon++;
 350 | 			else if (hour >= 17 && hour < 21) sessionsByTimeOfDay.evening++;
 351 | 			else sessionsByTimeOfDay.night++;
 352 | 		}
 353 | 
 354 | 		// Breast preference
 355 | 		let leftPreference = 0;
 356 | 		let rightPreference = 0;
 357 | 		let bothPreference = 0;
 358 | 
 359 | 		for (const log of logs) {
 360 | 			if (log.breast === "LEFT") leftPreference++;
 361 | 			else if (log.breast === "RIGHT") rightPreference++;
 362 | 			else if (log.breast === "BOTH") bothPreference++;
 363 | 		}
 364 | 
 365 | 		const totalFeedings = logs.length;
 366 | 		const breastPreference = {
 367 | 			left: totalFeedings > 0 ? (leftPreference / totalFeedings) * 100 : 0,
 368 | 			right: totalFeedings > 0 ? (rightPreference / totalFeedings) * 100 : 0,
 369 | 			both: totalFeedings > 0 ? (bothPreference / totalFeedings) * 100 : 0
 370 | 		};
 371 | 
 372 | 		return {
 373 | 			todayTotal,
 374 | 			weeklyAverage: Math.round(weeklyAverage * 10) / 10,
 375 | 			totalSessions: logs.length,
 376 | 			averageDuration: Math.round(averageDuration * 10) / 10,
 377 | 			weeklyData,
 378 | 			sessionsByTimeOfDay,
 379 | 			breastPreference
 380 | 		};
 381 | 	},
 382 | 
 383 | 	/**
 384 | 	 * Get feeding logs by date range
 385 | 	 */
 386 | 	async getFeedingsByDateRange(patientId: string, _clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) {
 387 | 		return await db.query.feedingLog.findMany({
 388 | 			where: {
 389 | 				patientId,
 390 | 				date: {
 391 | 					gte: startDate,
 392 | 					lte: endDate
 393 | 				}
 394 | 			},
 395 | 			orderBy: { date: "asc" }
 396 | 		});
 397 | 	},
 398 | 
 399 | 	/**
 400 | 	 * Get latest feeding log for a patient
 401 | 	 */
 402 | 	async getLatestFeedings(patientId: string) {
 403 | 		return await db.query.feedingLog.findFirst({
 404 | 			where: { patientId },
 405 | 			orderBy: { date: "desc" }
 406 | 		});
 407 | 	},
 408 | 	async getAssessments(patientId: string, clinicId: string) {
 409 | 		// If you have a dedicated nutrition_assessment table:
 410 | 		// return await db.query.nutritionAssessment.findMany({
 411 | 		//   where: { patientId, clinicId },
 412 | 		//   orderBy: { assessmentDate: "desc" },
 413 | 		// });
 414 | 
 415 | 		// Alternative: Store assessments in medicalRecord with a specific type
 416 | 		const medicalRecords = await db.query.medicalRecord.findMany({
 417 | 			where: {
 418 | 				patientId,
 419 | 				clinicId,
 420 | 				notes: { ilike: "%nutrition_assessment%" }
 421 | 			},
 422 | 			orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }
 423 | 		});
 424 | 
 425 | 		// Parse assessments from medical records
 426 | 		const assessments: NutritionalAssessment[] = [];
 427 | 		for (const record of medicalRecords) {
 428 | 			try {
 429 | 				if (record.notes) {
 430 | 					const parsed = JSON.parse(record.notes);
 431 | 					if (parsed.type === "nutrition_assessment") {
 432 | 						assessments.push({
 433 | 							id: record.id,
 434 | 							patientId: record.patientId,
 435 | 							clinicId: record.clinicId,
 436 | 							assessmentDate: record.diagnosisDate || record.createdAt,
 437 | 							nutritionalStatus: (parsed.nutritionalStatus as schema.NutritionalStatus) || "NORMAL",
 438 | 							dietaryRestrictions: (parsed.dietaryRestrictions as string[]) || [],
 439 | 							recommendations: (parsed.recommendations as string[]) || [],
 440 | 							followUpDate: record.followUpDate || null,
 441 | 							notes: (parsed.notes as string) || null,
 442 | 							createdAt: record.createdAt,
 443 | 							updatedAt: record.updatedAt
 444 | 						});
 445 | 					}
 446 | 				}
 447 | 			} catch {
 448 | 				// Skip invalid JSON
 449 | 			}
 450 | 		}
 451 | 
 452 | 		return assessments;
 453 | 	},
 454 | 
 455 | 	/**
 456 | 	 * Get latest nutrition assessment
 457 | 	 */
 458 | 	async getLatestAssessment(patientId: string, clinicId: string): Promise<NutritionalAssessment | null> {
 459 | 		const assessments = await this.getAssessments(patientId, clinicId);
 460 | 		return assessments.length > 0 ? (assessments[0] ?? null) : null;
 461 | 	},

 463 | 	/**
 464 | 	 * Get nutrition assessment by ID
 465 | 	 */
 466 | 	async getAssessmentById(id: string, clinicId: string): Promise<NutritionalAssessment | null> {
 467 | 		const record = await db.query.medicalRecord.findFirst({
 468 | 			where: { id, clinicId }
 469 | 		});
 470 | 
 471 | 		if (!record?.notes) return null;
 472 | 
 473 | 		try {
 474 | 			const parsed = JSON.parse(record.notes);
 475 | 			if (parsed.type === "nutrition_assessment") {
 476 | 				return {
 477 | 					id: record.id,
 478 | 					patientId: record.patientId,
 479 | 					clinicId: record.clinicId,
 480 | 					assessmentDate: record.diagnosisDate || record.createdAt,
 481 | 					nutritionalStatus: (parsed.nutritionalStatus as schema.NutritionalStatus) || "NORMAL",
 482 | 					dietaryRestrictions: (parsed.dietaryRestrictions as string[]) || [],
 483 | 					recommendations: (parsed.recommendations as string[]) || [],
 484 | 					followUpDate: record.followUpDate || null,
 485 | 					notes: (parsed.notes as string) || null,
 486 | 					createdAt: record.createdAt,
 487 | 					updatedAt: record.updatedAt
 488 | 				};
 489 | 			}
 490 | 		} catch {
 491 | 			return null;
 492 | 		}
 493 | 
 494 | 		return null;
 495 | 	},
 496 | 
 497 | 	/**
 498 | 	 * Get nutrition assessment history with trends
 499 | 	 */
 500 | 	async getAssessmentHistory(patientId: string, clinicId: string, limit = 10) {
 501 | 		const assessments = await this.getAssessments(patientId, clinicId);
 502 | 		const sorted = assessments.sort((a, b) => b.assessmentDate.getTime() - a.assessmentDate.getTime());
 503 | 		const recent = sorted.slice(0, limit);
 504 | 
 505 | 		// Calculate trends
 506 | 		let trend: "improving" | "stable" | "declining" | null = null;
 507 | 		if (recent.length >= 2) {
 508 | 			const statusOrder: Record<string, number> = {
 509 | 				MALNOURISHED: 0,
 510 | 				UNDERWEIGHT: 1,
 511 | 				NORMAL: 2,
 512 | 				OVERWEIGHT: 2,
 513 | 				OBESE: 1
 514 | 			};
 515 | 			const currentScore = statusOrder[recent[0]?.nutritionalStatus || "NORMAL"] ?? 1;
 516 | 			const previousScore = statusOrder[recent[1]?.nutritionalStatus || "NORMAL"] ?? 1;
 517 | 
 518 | 			if (currentScore > previousScore) trend = "improving";
 519 | 			else if (currentScore < previousScore) trend = "declining";
 520 | 			else trend = "stable";
 521 | 		}
 522 | 
 523 | 		return {
 524 | 			assessments: recent,
 525 | 			total: assessments.length,
 526 | 			trend
 527 | 		};
 528 | 	},
 529 | 
 530 | 	/**
 531 | 	 * Get patients requiring follow-up based on nutrition assessments
 532 | 	 */
 533 | 	async getPatientsNeedingFollowUp(clinicId: string, daysUntilFollowUp = 30) {
 534 | 		const followUpDate = new Date();
 535 | 		followUpDate.setDate(followUpDate.getDate() + daysUntilFollowUp);
 536 | 
 537 | 		// This query would need a dedicated nutrition_assessment table
 538 | 		// Placeholder implementation using medicalRecord
 539 | 		const records = await db.query.medicalRecord.findMany({
 540 | 			where: {
 541 | 				clinicId,
 542 | 				followUpDate: { lte: followUpDate },
 543 | 				status: "ACTIVE"
 544 | 			},
 545 | 			with: {
 546 | 				patient: true
 547 | 			}
 548 | 		});
 549 | 
 550 | 		return records.filter(record => {
 551 | 			try {
 552 | 				if (record.notes) {
 553 | 					const parsed = JSON.parse(record.notes);
 554 | 					return parsed.type === "nutrition_assessment";
 555 | 				}
 556 | 				return false;
 557 | 			} catch {
 558 | 				return false;
 559 | 			}
 560 | 		});
 561 | 	},
 562 | 	async getNutritionalDashboardData(patientId: string, clinicId: string) {
 563 | 		const [feedingStats, breastfeedingStats, latestAssessment, feedingLogs] = await Promise.all([
 564 | 			this.getFeedingStats(patientId, clinicId, 30),
 565 | 			this.getBreastfeedingStats(patientId, clinicId, 30),
 566 | 			this.getLatestAssessment(patientId, clinicId),
 567 | 			this.list({ patientId, clinicId, limit: 10, offset: 0 })
 568 | 		]);
 569 | 
 570 | 		// Generate alerts
 571 | 		const alerts: Array<{
 572 | 			type: "warning" | "info" | "success";
 573 | 			message: string;
 574 | 			suggestion?: string;
 575 | 		}> = [];
 576 | 
 577 | 		// Check feeding frequency
 578 | 		if (feedingStats.totalFeedings > 0) {
 579 | 			const avgDaily =
 580 | 				feedingStats.feedingsByDay.length > 0
 581 | 					? feedingStats.totalFeedings / feedingStats.feedingsByDay.length
 582 | 					: 0;
 583 | 
 584 | 			if (avgDaily < 4 && feedingStats.totalFeedings > 0) {
 585 | 				alerts.push({
 586 | 					type: "warning",
 587 | 					message: "Low feeding frequency detected",
 588 | 					suggestion: "Consider more frequent feedings throughout the day."
 589 | 				});
 590 | 			}
 591 | 		}
 592 | 
 593 | 		// Check breastfeeding
 594 | 		if (breastfeedingStats.totalSessions === 0 && feedingStats.totalFeedings > 0) {
 595 | 			alerts.push({
 596 | 				type: "info",
 597 | 				message: "No breastfeeding records found",
 598 | 				suggestion: "Consider tracking breastfeeding sessions for better insights."
 599 | 			});
 600 | 		}
 601 | 
 602 | 		// Check nutritional status
 603 | 		if (latestAssessment) {
 604 | 			if (latestAssessment.nutritionalStatus === "UNDERWEIGHT") {
 605 | 				alerts.push({
 606 | 					type: "warning",
 607 | 					message: "Patient is underweight",
 608 | 					suggestion: "Consult with a nutritionist for dietary recommendations."
 609 | 				});
 610 | 			} else if (latestAssessment.nutritionalStatus === "OBESE") {
 611 | 				alerts.push({
 612 | 					type: "warning",
 613 | 					message: "Weight management concern detected",
 614 | 					suggestion: "Review dietary habits and physical activity."
 615 | 				});
 616 | 			} else if (latestAssessment.nutritionalStatus === "NORMAL") {
 617 | 				alerts.push({
 618 | 					type: "success",
 619 | 					message: "Normal nutritional status maintained",
 620 | 					suggestion: "Continue with current healthy habits."
 621 | 				});
 622 | 			}
 623 | 		}
 624 | 
 625 | 		return {
 626 | 			feedingStats,
 627 | 			breastfeedingStats,
 628 | 			latestAssessment,
 629 | 			recentFeedings: feedingLogs.logs,
 630 | 			alerts
 631 | 		};
 632 | 	},
 633 | 
 634 | 	/**
 635 | 	 * Get clinic-wide nutrition statistics (for admin dashboard)
 636 | 	 */
 637 | 	async getClinicNutritionStats(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) {
 638 | 		const feedingLogs = await db.query.feedingLog.findMany({
 639 | 			where: {
 640 | 				date: {
 641 | 					gte: startDate,
 642 | 					lte: endDate
 643 | 				}
 644 | 			},
 645 | 			with: {
 646 | 				patient: {
 647 | 					where: { clinicId }
 648 | 				}
 649 | 			}
 650 | 		});
 651 | 
 652 | 		// Filter by clinic through patient relation
 653 | 		const clinicLogs = feedingLogs.filter(log => log.patient?.clinicId === clinicId);
 654 | 
 655 | 		// Calculate summary statistics
 656 | 		const byType: Record<string, number> = {};
 657 | 		let totalDuration = 0;
 658 | 		let totalAmount = 0;
 659 | 		const uniquePatients = new Set<string>();
 660 | 
 661 | 		for (const log of clinicLogs) {
 662 | 			byType[log.type] = (byType[log.type] || 0) + 1;
 663 | 			totalDuration += log.duration || 0;
 664 | 			totalAmount += log.amount || 0;
 665 | 			uniquePatients.add(log.patientId);
 666 | 		}
 667 | 
 668 | 		return {
 669 | 			totalFeedings: clinicLogs.length,
 670 | 			uniquePatients: uniquePatients.size,
 671 | 			byType,
 672 | 			averageDuration: clinicLogs.length > 0 ? totalDuration / clinicLogs.length : 0,
 673 | 			totalAmount
 674 | 		};
 675 | 	},
 676 | 	async generateFeedingReport(patientId: string, clinicId: string, days = 30) {
 677 | 		const stats = await this.getFeedingStats(patientId, clinicId, days);
 678 | 		const breastfeedingStats = await this.getBreastfeedingStats(patientId, clinicId, days);
 679 | 
 680 | 		return {
 681 | 			period: { days },
 682 | 			generatedAt: new Date(),
 683 | 			patientId,
 684 | 			summary: {
 685 | 				totalFeedings: stats.totalFeedings,
 686 | 				averageDaily: stats.feedingsByDay.length > 0 ? stats.totalFeedings / stats.feedingsByDay.length : 0,
 687 | 				mostCommonType: Object.entries(stats.byType).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])[0]?.[0] || "none"
 688 | 			},
 689 | 			breastfeeding: breastfeedingStats,
 690 | 			dailyBreakdown: stats.feedingsByDay
 691 | 		};
 692 | 	},
 693 | 
 694 | 	/**
 695 | 	 * Compare nutrition across multiple patients
 696 | 	 */
 697 | 	async comparePatients(patientIds: string[], clinicId: string, days = 30) {
 698 | 		const results = await Promise.all(
 699 | 			patientIds.map(async patientId => {
 700 | 				const stats = await this.getFeedingStats(patientId, clinicId, days);
 701 | 				const latestAssessment = await this.getLatestAssessment(patientId, clinicId);
 702 | 				return {
 703 | 					patientId,
 704 | 					totalFeedings: stats.totalFeedings,
 705 | 					averageDaily: stats.feedingsByDay.length > 0 ? stats.totalFeedings / stats.feedingsByDay.length : 0,
 706 | 					nutritionalStatus: latestAssessment?.nutritionalStatus || "unknown"
 707 | 				};
 708 | 			})
 709 | 		);
 710 | 
 711 | 		return results;
 712 | 	},
 713 | 	async getFeedingLogsSummary(patientId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) {
 714 | 		const feedingLogs = await db.query.feedingLog.findMany({
 715 | 			where: {
 716 | 				patientId,
 717 | 				date: {
 718 | 					gte: startDate,
 719 | 					lte: endDate
 720 | 				}
 721 | 			},
 722 | 			orderBy: { date: "asc" }
 723 | 		});
 724 | 
 725 | 		const summary = {
 726 | 			totalFeedings: feedingLogs.length,
 727 | 			byType: {} as Record<string, number>,
 728 | 			averageDuration: 0,
 729 | 			totalAmount: 0
 730 | 		};
 731 | 
 732 | 		let totalDuration = 0;
 733 | 		for (const log of feedingLogs) {
 734 | 			summary.byType[log.type] = (summary.byType[log.type] || 0) + 1;
 735 | 			totalDuration += log.duration ?? 0;
 736 | 			summary.totalAmount += log.amount ?? 0;
 737 | 		}
 738 | 
 739 | 		summary.averageDuration = feedingLogs.length > 0 ? totalDuration / feedingLogs.length : 0;
 740 | 
 741 | 		return summary;
 742 | 	},

 744 | 	// Get developmental milestones progress
 745 | 	async getDevelopmentalProgress(patientId: string) {
 746 | 		const [milestones, checks] = await Promise.all([
 747 | 			db.query.developmentalMilestones.findMany({
 748 | 				where: { patientId },
 749 | 				orderBy: { dateRecorded: "asc" }
 750 | 			}),
 751 | 
 752 | 			db.query.developmentalCheck.findMany({
 753 | 				where: { patientId },
 754 | 				orderBy: { checkDate: "asc" }
 755 | 			})
 756 | 		]);
 757 | 
 758 | 		// Group milestones by age range
 759 | 		const milestonesByAge: Record<string, typeof milestones> = {};
 760 | 		for (const milestone of milestones) {
 761 | 			if (!milestonesByAge[milestone.ageAchieved]) {
 762 | 				milestonesByAge[milestone.ageAchieved] = [];
 763 | 			}
 764 | 			milestonesByAge[milestone.ageAchieved]?.push(milestone);
 765 | 		}
 766 | 
 767 | 		return {
 768 | 			milestones: milestonesByAge,
 769 | 			developmentalChecks: checks,
 770 | 			totalMilestonesAchieved: milestones.length,
 771 | 			lastCheckup: checks[checks.length - 1]
 772 | 		};
 773 | 	},

 799 | 	async listImmunizations(input: { limit: number; offset: number; patientId?: string; clinicId?: string }) {
 800 | 		const { limit, offset, patientId, clinicId } = input;
 801 | 
 802 | 		const [records, total] = await Promise.all([
 803 | 			db.query.immunization.findMany({
 804 | 				where: {
 805 | 					...(clinicId && { clinicId }),
 806 | 					isDeleted: false,
 807 | 					...(patientId && { patientId })
 808 | 				},
 809 | 				limit,
 810 | 				offset,
 811 | 				orderBy: { date: "desc" }
 812 | 			}),
 813 | 			db.$count(
 814 | 				schema.immunization,
 815 | 				and(
 816 | 					clinicId ? eq(schema.immunization.clinicId, clinicId) : undefined,
 817 | 					eq(schema.immunization.isDeleted, false),
 818 | 					patientId ? eq(schema.immunization.patientId, patientId) : undefined
 819 | 				)
 820 | 			)
 821 | 		]);
 822 | 
 823 | 		return {
 824 | 			records,
 825 | 			total
 826 | 		};
 827 | 	},
 828 | 	// Get vaccine schedule for patient based on age
 829 | 	async getPatientVaccineSchedule(patientId: string) {
 830 | 		const patient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 831 | 			where: { id: patientId },
 832 | 			with: {
 833 | 				immunizations: true
 834 | 			}
 835 | 		});
 836 | 
 837 | 		if (!patient) {
 838 | 			throw new Error("Patient not found");
 839 | 		}
 840 | 
 841 | 		// Calculate age in days
 842 | 		const ageInDays = Math.floor((Date.now() - patient.dateOfBirth.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
 843 | 		// Get due vaccines
 844 | 
 845 | 		const dueVaccines = await db.query.vaccineSchedule.findMany({
 846 | 			where: {
 847 | 				isDeleted: false, // Simple equality
 848 | 				ageInDaysMin: { lte: ageInDays }, // LTE operator as object key
 849 | 				OR: [
 850 | 					{ ageInDaysMax: { gte: ageInDays } } // GTE operator
 851 | 				]
 852 | 			}
 853 | 		});
 854 | 		// Filter out already administered vaccines
 855 | 		const administeredVaccines = new Set(patient.immunizations.map(i => i.vaccine));
 856 | 
 857 | 		const pendingVaccines = dueVaccines.filter(v => !administeredVaccines.has(v.vaccineName));
 858 | 
 859 | 		return { pendingVaccines, administeredVaccines: patient.immunizations };
 860 | 	},
 861 | 	async getVaccineInventoryStatus(clinicId: string) {
 862 | 		const inventory = await db.query.vaccineInventory.findMany({
 863 | 			where: { clinicId },
 864 | 			orderBy: { expirationDate: "asc" }
 865 | 		});
 866 | 
 867 | 		const now = new Date();
 868 | 		const expiringSoon = inventory.filter(v => {
 869 | 			const daysUntilExpiry = Math.ceil(
 870 | 				((v.expirationDate?.getTime() ?? now.getTime()) - now.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
 871 | 			);
 872 | 			return daysUntilExpiry <= 30 && daysUntilExpiry > 0;
 873 | 		});
 874 | 
 875 | 		const expired = inventory.filter(v => v.expirationDate && v.expirationDate < now);
 876 | 		const lowStock = inventory.filter(v => v.quantity < 10);
 877 | 
 878 | 		return {
 879 | 			totalVaccines: inventory.length,
 880 | 			totalDoses: inventory.reduce((sum, v) => sum + (v.quantity ?? 0), 0),
 881 | 			expiringSoon,
 882 | 			expired,
 883 | 			lowStock,
 884 | 			inventoryByVaccine: inventory
 885 | 		};
 886 | 	},
 887 | 	async getOverdueImmunizations(clinicId: string) {
 888 | 		const overdueImmunizations = await db.query.immunization.findMany({
 889 | 			where: {
 890 | 				clinicId,
 891 | 				isDeleted: false,
 892 | 				status: "OVERDUE"
 893 | 			},
 894 | 			with: {
 895 | 				patient: {
 896 | 					with: {
 897 | 						guardians: true
 898 | 					}
 899 | 				}
 900 | 			},
 901 | 			orderBy: { date: "asc" }
 902 | 		});
 903 | 
 904 | 		return overdueImmunizations;
 905 | 	},
 906 | 	async getUpcomingImmunizations(clinicId: string) {
 907 | 		// const now = new Date();
 908 | 		const thirtyDaysFromNow = new Date();
 909 | 		thirtyDaysFromNow.setDate(thirtyDaysFromNow.getDate() + 30);
 910 | 
 911 | 		const allPatients = await db.query.patient.findMany({
 912 | 			where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 913 | 			with: {
 914 | 				immunizations: true
 915 | 			}
 916 | 		});
 917 | 
 918 | 		const upcomingImmunizations = [];
 919 | 
 920 | 		for (const patient of allPatients) {
 921 | 			const dueVaccines = await this.getPatientVaccineSchedule(patient.id);
 922 | 			upcomingImmunizations.push({
 923 | 				patient,
 924 | 				dueVaccines: dueVaccines.pendingVaccines
 925 | 			});
 926 | 		}
 927 | 
 928 | 		return upcomingImmunizations.filter(u => u.dueVaccines.length > 0);
 929 | 	},
 930 | 	// Record immunization
 931 | 	async recordImmunization(data: {
 932 | 		patientId: string;
 933 | 		clinicId: string;
 934 | 		vaccine: string;
 935 | 		date: Date;
 936 | 		dose: string;
 937 | 		lotNumber: string;
 938 | 		administeredByStaffId: string;
 939 | 		notes?: string;
 940 | 	}) {
 941 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 942 | 			const [immunization] = await tx
 943 | 				.insert(schema.immunization)
 944 | 				.values({
 945 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 946 | 					recordId: crypto.randomUUID(),
 947 | 					...data,
 948 | 					status: "COMPLETED"
 949 | 				})
 950 | 				.returning();
 951 | 
 952 | 			// Update vaccine inventory
 953 | 			await tx
 954 | 				.update(schema.vaccineInventory)
 955 | 				.set({
 956 | 					quantity: sql`${schema.vaccineInventory.quantity} - 1`,
 957 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 958 | 				})
 959 | 				.where(
 960 | 					and(
 961 | 						eq(schema.vaccineInventory.clinicId, data.clinicId),
 962 | 						eq(schema.vaccineInventory.vaccineName, data.vaccine)
 963 | 					)
 964 | 				);
 965 | 
 966 | 			return immunization;
 967 | 		});
 968 | 	},
 969 |

 978 | 
 979 | 	async updateFeedingLogs(id: string, data: FeedingLogUpdateInput) {
 980 | 		const updateData = { ...data };
 981 | 
 982 | 		const [result] = await db
 983 | 			.update(schema.feedingLog)

1184 | 
1185 | 	async syncFeedingLogs(
1186 | 		patientId: string,
1187 | 		_clinicId: string,
1188 | 		externalLogs: Array<{
1189 | 			timestamp: Date;
1190 | 			type: string;
1191 | 			duration?: number;
1192 | 			amount?: number;
1193 | 			source: string;
1194 | 		}>
1195 | 	) {
1196 | 		const results = [];
1197 | 		const errors = [];
1198 | 
1199 | 		for (const externalLog of externalLogs) {
1200 | 			try {
1201 | 				// Check if log already exists (within 5 minutes)
1202 | 				const existingLog = await db.query.feedingLog.findFirst({
1203 | 					where: {
1204 | 						patientId,
1205 | 						date: {
1206 | 							gte: new Date(externalLog.timestamp.getTime() - 5 * 60 * 1000),
1207 | 							lte: new Date(externalLog.timestamp.getTime() + 5 * 60 * 1000)
1208 | 						}
1209 | 					}
1210 | 				});
1211 | 
1212 | 				if (!existingLog) {
1213 | 					const newLog = await this.createFeedingLog({
1214 | 						patientId,
1215 | 						id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1216 | 						date: externalLog.timestamp,
1217 | 						type: externalLog.type as schema.FeedingType,
1218 | 						duration: externalLog.duration,
1219 | 						amount: externalLog.amount,
1220 | 						notes: `Synced from ${externalLog.source}`
1221 | 					});
1222 | 					results.push(newLog);
1223 | 				} else {
1224 | 					errors.push({
1225 | 						timestamp: externalLog.timestamp,
1226 | 						error: "Duplicate log found within 5 minute window"
1227 | 					});
1228 | 				}
1229 | 			} catch (error) {
1230 | 				errors.push({
1231 | 					timestamp: externalLog.timestamp,
1232 | 					error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"
1233 | 				});
1234 | 			}
1235 | 		}
1236 | 
1237 | 		return { synced: results.length, failed: errors.length, results, errors };
1238 | 	},
1239 | 	async createNutritionAssessment(data: NutritionalAssessmentCreateInput) {
1240 | 		const assessmentData = {
1241 | 			type: "nutrition_assessment",
1242 | 			nutritionalStatus: data.nutritionalStatus,
1243 | 			dietaryRestrictions: data.dietaryRestrictions ?? [],
1244 | 			recommendations: data.recommendations
1245 | 		};
1246 | 
1247 | 		// medicalRecord requires non-null appointmentId and doctorId — use sentinel values
1248 | 		const [result] = await db
1249 | 			.insert(schema.medicalRecord)
1250 | 			.values({
1251 | 				id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1252 | 				patientId: data.patientId,
1253 | 				clinicId: data.clinicId,
1254 | 				doctorId: "system",
1255 | 				appointmentId: "nutrition_assessment",
1256 | 				diagnosisDate: data.createdAt,
1257 | 				notes: JSON.stringify(assessmentData),
1258 | 				followUpDate: data.updatedAt ?? null,
1259 | 				status: "ACTIVE",
1260 | 				createdAt: new Date(),
1261 | 				updatedAt: new Date()
1262 | 			})
1263 | 			.returning();
1264 | 
1265 | 		if (!result) {
1266 | 			throw new Error("Failed to create nutrition assessment record");
1267 | 		}
1268 | 
1269 | 		// Create a corresponding diagnosis record
1270 | 		await db.insert(schema.diagnosis).values({
1271 | 			id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1272 | 			medicalId: result.id,
1273 | 			patientId: data.patientId,
1274 | 			doctorId: "system",
1275 | 			clinicId: data.clinicId,
1276 | 			appointmentId: null,
1277 | 			diagnosis: `Nutrition Assessment - ${data.nutritionalStatus}`,
1278 | 			symptoms: "",
1279 | 			date: data.createdAt,
1280 | 			status: "ACTIVE",
1281 | 			createdAt: new Date(),
1282 | 			updatedAt: new Date()
1283 | 		});
1284 | 
1285 | 		return {
1286 | 			id: result.id,
1287 | 			patientId: result.patientId,
1288 | 			clinicId: result.clinicId,
1289 | 			assessmentDate: result.diagnosisDate ?? result.createdAt,
1290 | 			nutritionalStatus: data.nutritionalStatus,
1291 | 			dietaryRestrictions: data.dietaryRestrictions ?? [],
1292 | 			recommendations: data.recommendations,
1293 | 			followUpDate: result.followUpDate,
1294 | 			notes: data.notes ?? null,
1295 | 			createdAt: result.createdAt,
1296 | 			updatedAt: result.updatedAt
1297 | 		};
1298 | 	},
1299 | 	async updateNutritionAssessment(id: string, data: NutritionalAssessmentUpdateInput) {
1300 | 		const existing = await db.query.medicalRecord.findFirst({
1301 | 			where: { id }
1302 | 		});
1303 | 
1304 | 		if (!existing) {
1305 | 			throw new Error("Nutrition assessment not found");
1306 | 		}
1307 | 
1308 | 		let parsedNotes: Record<string, unknown> = {};
1309 | 		try {
1310 | 			if (existing.notes) {
1311 | 				parsedNotes = JSON.parse(existing.notes) as Record<string, unknown>;
1312 | 			}
1313 | 		} catch {
1314 | 			parsedNotes = {};
1315 | 		}
1316 | 
1317 | 		const updatedNotes = {
1318 | 			...parsedNotes,
1319 | 			type: "nutrition_assessment",
1320 | 			nutritionalStatus: data.nutritionalStatus || parsedNotes.nutritionalStatus,
1321 | 			dietaryRestrictions: data.dietaryRestrictions || parsedNotes.dietaryRestrictions,
1322 | 			recommendations: data.recommendations || parsedNotes.recommendations
1323 | 		};
1324 | 
1325 | 		const [result] = await db
1326 | 			.update(schema.medicalRecord)
1327 | 			.set({
1328 | 				diagnosisDate: data.createdAt,
1329 | 				notes: JSON.stringify(updatedNotes),
1330 | 				followUpDate: data.updatedAt !== undefined ? data.updatedAt : existing.followUpDate,
1331 | 				updatedAt: new Date()
1332 | 			})
1333 | 			.where(eq(schema.medicalRecord.id, id))
1334 | 			.returning();
1335 | 
1336 | 		if (!result) {
1337 | 			throw new Error("Failed to update nutrition assessment record");
1338 | 		}
1339 | 
1340 | 		return {
1341 | 			id: result.id,
1342 | 			patientId: result.patientId,
1343 | 			clinicId: result.clinicId,
1344 | 			assessmentDate: result.diagnosisDate ?? result.createdAt,
1345 | 			nutritionalStatus: (updatedNotes.nutritionalStatus as string | undefined) ?? "NORMAL",
1346 | 			dietaryRestrictions: (updatedNotes.dietaryRestrictions as string[] | undefined) ?? [],
1347 | 			recommendations: (updatedNotes.recommendations as string[] | undefined) ?? [],
1348 | 			followUpDate: result.followUpDate,
1349 | 			createdAt: result.createdAt,
1350 | 			updatedAt: result.updatedAt
1351 | 		};
1352 | 	},
1353 | 
1354 | 	async deleteNutritionAssessment(id: string) {
1355 | 		const [result] = await db
1356 | 			.update(schema.medicalRecord)
1357 | 			.set({ isDeleted: true, deletedAt: new Date() })
1358 | 			.where(eq(schema.medicalRecord.id, id))

1363 | 	async createNutritionRecommendation(
1364 | 		patientId: string,
1365 | 		clinicId: string,
1366 | 		data: Omit<schema.NutritionRecommendation, "id" | "patientId" | "clinicId" | "createdAt" | "updatedAt">
1367 | 	) {
1368 | 		const patient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
1369 | 			where: { id: patientId },
1370 | 			with: { user: true }
1371 | 		});
1372 | 
1373 | 		if (patient?.userId) {
1374 | 			await db.insert(schema.notification).values({
1375 | 				id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1376 | 				userId: patient.userId,
1377 | 				clinicId,
1378 | 				title: `Nutrition ${data.recommendationType}: ${data.title}`,
1379 | 				body: data.description,
1380 | 				type: "nutrition_recommendation",
1381 | 				priority: data.priority === "high" ? "high" : "medium",
1382 | 				metadata: {
1383 | 					recommendationType: data.recommendationType,
1384 | 					dueDate: data.dueDate,
1385 | 					priority: data.priority
1386 | 				},
1387 | 				createdAt: new Date(),
1388 | 				updatedAt: new Date()
1389 | 			});
1390 | 		}
1391 | 		return {
1392 | 			id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1393 | 			patientId,
1394 | 			clinicId,
1395 | 			...data,
1396 | 			createdAt: new Date(),
1397 | 			updatedAt: new Date()
1398 | 		};
1399 | 	},
1400 | 	async completeNutritionRecommendation(recommendationId: string) {
1401 | 		// Update the notification status
1402 | 		const [result] = await db
1403 | 			.update(schema.notification)
1404 | 			.set({ status: "read", updatedAt: new Date() })
1405 | 			.where(eq(schema.notification.id, recommendationId))
1406 | 			.returning();
1407 | 
1408 | 		return { success: !!result, id: recommendationId };
1409 | 	},
1410 | 
1411 | 	async generateRecurringFeedings(
1412 | 		patientId: string,
1413 | 		clinicId: string,
1414 | 		schedule: {
1415 | 			startDate: Date;
1416 | 			endDate: Date;
1417 | 			times: string[]; // e.g., ["08:00", "12:00", "16:00", "20:00"]
1418 | 			type: "BREAST" | "FORMULA" | "MIXED";
1419 | 			duration?: number;
1420 | 			amount?: number;
1421 | 		}
1422 | 	) {
1423 | 		const feedings = [];
1424 | 		const currentDate = new Date(schedule.startDate);
1425 | 		const endDate = new Date(schedule.endDate);
1426 | 
1427 | 		while (currentDate <= endDate) {
1428 | 			for (const time of schedule.times) {
1429 | 				const [hours, minutes] = time.split(":").map(Number);
1430 | 				const feedingTime = new Date(currentDate);
1431 | 				feedingTime.setHours(hours || 0, minutes || 0, 0, 0);
1432 | 
1433 | 				feedings.push({
1434 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1435 | 					patientId,
1436 | 					date: feedingTime,
1437 | 					type: schedule.type,
1438 | 					duration: schedule.duration,
1439 | 					amount: schedule.amount,
1440 | 					notes: "Auto-generated from recurring schedule"
1441 | 				});
1442 | 			}
1443 | 			currentDate.setDate(currentDate.getDate() + 1);
1444 | 		}
1445 | 
1446 | 		// Check for duplicates before inserting
1447 | 		const existingLogs = await this.list({
1448 | 			patientId,
1449 | 			clinicId,
1450 | 			startDate: schedule.startDate,
1451 | 			endDate: schedule.endDate,
1452 | 			limit: 1000,
1453 | 			offset: 0
1454 | 		});
1455 | 
1456 | 		const existingTimes = new Set(existingLogs.logs.map(log => log.date.toISOString()));
1457 | 
1458 | 		const newFeedings = feedings.filter(feeding => !existingTimes.has(feeding.date.toISOString()));
1459 | 
1460 | 		if (newFeedings.length > 0) {
1461 | 			return await this.createManyFeedingLogs(newFeedings);
1462 | 		}
1463 | 
1464 | 		return [];
1465 | 	},
1466 | 	async bulkImportFeedingLogs(clinicId: string, logs: Array<Omit<FeedingLogCreateInput, "clinicId">>) {
1467 | 		const results = [];
1468 | 		const errors = [];
1469 | 
1470 | 		for (const log of logs) {
1471 | 			try {
1472 | 				// Validate patient exists
1473 | 				const patient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
1474 | 					where: { id: log.patientId, clinicId }
1475 | 				});
1476 | 
1477 | 				if (!patient) {
1478 | 					errors.push({ patientId: log.patientId, error: "Patient not found" });
1479 | 					continue;
1480 | 				}
1481 | 
1482 | 				const result = await this.createFeedingLog({
1483 | 					...log,
1484 | 					id: log.id ?? crypto.randomUUID()
1485 | 				});
1486 | 				results.push(result);
1487 | 			} catch (error) {
1488 | 				errors.push({
1489 | 					patientId: log.patientId,
1490 | 					error: error instanceof Error ? error.message : "Unknown error"
1491 | 				});
1492 | 			}
1493 | 		}
1494 | 
1495 | 		return { success: results.length, failed: errors.length, results, errors };
1496 | 	},

1539 | 	async recordImmunizationWithInventory(data: ImmunizationCreateInput & { vaccineInventoryId?: string }) {
1540 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
1541 | 			// Check vaccine inventory
1542 | 			if (data.vaccineInventoryId) {
1543 | 				const inventory = await tx.query.vaccineInventory.findFirst({
1544 | 					where: { id: data.vaccineInventoryId }
1545 | 				});
1546 | 
1547 | 				if (!inventory || inventory.quantity < 1) {
1548 | 					throw new Error("Insufficient vaccine stock");
1549 | 				}
1550 | 
1551 | 				// Update inventory
1552 | 				await tx
1553 | 					.update(schema.vaccineInventory)
1554 | 					.set({
1555 | 						quantity: inventory.quantity - 1,
1556 | 						updatedAt: new Date()
1557 | 					})
1558 | 					.where(eq(schema.vaccineInventory.id, data.vaccineInventoryId));
1559 | 			}
1560 | 
1561 | 			// Record immunization
1562 | 			const [immunization] = await tx
1563 | 				.insert(schema.immunization)
1564 | 				.values({
1565 | 					...data,
1566 | 					id: data.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
1567 | 					recordId: data.recordId ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
1568 | 					status: "COMPLETED"
1569 | 				})
1570 | 				.returning();
1571 | 
1572 | 			// Check for overdue status
1573 | 			const vaccineSchedule = await tx.query.vaccineSchedule.findFirst({
1574 | 				where: { vaccineName: data.vaccine }
1575 | 			});
1576 | 
1577 | 			if (vaccineSchedule?.ageInDaysMax) {
1578 | 				const patient = await tx.query.patient.findFirst({
1579 | 					where: { id: data.patientId }
1580 | 				});
1581 | 
1582 | 				if (patient) {
1583 | 					const ageAtVaccination = Math.floor(
1584 | 						(data.date.getTime() - patient.dateOfBirth.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)
1585 | 					);
1586 | 
1587 | 					if (ageAtVaccination > vaccineSchedule.ageInDaysMax) {
1588 | 						await tx
1589 | 							.update(schema.immunization)
1590 | 							.set({ isOverDue: true })
1591 | 							.where(eq(schema.immunization.id, immunization?.id ?? ""));
1592 | 					}
1593 | 				}
1594 | 			}
1595 | 
1596 | 			return immunization;
1597 | 		});
1598 | 	},
1599 | 
1600 | 	async bulkUpdateVaccineInventory(
1601 | 		clinicId: string,
1602 | 		updates: Array<{
1603 | 			vaccineName: string;
1604 | 			quantity: number;
1605 | 			lotNumber?: string;
1606 | 			expirationDate?: Date;
1607 | 		}>
1608 | 	) {
1609 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
1610 | 			const results = [];
1611 | 			for (const update of updates) {
1612 | 				const existing = await tx.query.vaccineInventory.findFirst({
1613 | 					where: {
1614 | 						clinicId,
1615 | 						vaccineName: update.vaccineName
1616 | 					}
1617 | 				});
1618 | 
1619 | 				if (existing) {
1620 | 					const [updated] = await tx
1621 | 						.update(schema.vaccineInventory)
1622 | 						.set({
1623 | 							quantity: existing.quantity + update.quantity,
1624 | 							lotNumber: update.lotNumber || existing.lotNumber,
1625 | 							expirationDate: update.expirationDate || existing.expirationDate,
1626 | 							updatedAt: new Date()
1627 | 						})
1628 | 						.where(eq(schema.vaccineInventory.id, existing.id))
1629 | 						.returning();
1630 | 					results.push(updated);
1631 | 				} else {
1632 | 					const [created] = await tx
1633 | 						.insert(schema.vaccineInventory)
1634 | 						.values({
1635 | 							id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1636 | 							clinicId,
1637 | 							vaccineName: update.vaccineName,
1638 | 							quantity: update.quantity,
1639 | 							lotNumber: update.lotNumber,
1640 | 							expirationDate: update.expirationDate
1641 | 						})
1642 | 						.returning();
1643 | 					results.push(created);
1644 | 				}
1645 | 			}
1646 | 			return results;
1647 | 		});
1648 | 	},

1698 | 		return result;
1699 | 	},
1700 | 
1701 | 	async recordGrowthWithPercentiles(data: Omit<schema.CreateGrowthRecordInput, "id">) {
1702 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
1703 | 			// Calculate age in days/months
1704 | 			const patient = await tx.query.patient.findFirst({
1705 | 				where: { id: data.patientId }
1706 | 			});
1707 | 
1708 | 			if (!patient) {
1709 | 				throw new Error("Patient not found");
1710 | 			}
1711 | 
1712 | 			const ageDays = Math.floor((data.date.getTime() - patient.dateOfBirth.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
1713 | 			const ageMonths = Math.floor(ageDays / 30);
1714 | 
1715 | 			// Find WHO standards for comparison
1716 | 			const whoStandards = await tx.query.whoGrowthStandard.findMany({
1717 | 				where: {
1718 | 					gender: patient.gender as schema.Gender,
1719 | 					ageDays: {
1720 | 						lte: ageDays + 30,
1721 | 						gte: ageDays - 30
1722 | 					}
1723 | 				}
1724 | 			});
1725 | 
1726 | 			// Calculate Z-scores
1727 | 			let weightForAgeZ: number | undefined;
1728 | 			let heightForAgeZ: number | undefined;
1729 | 			let bmiForAgeZ: number | undefined;
1730 | 
1731 | 			const weightStandard = whoStandards.find(s => s.measurementType === "WEIGHT");
1732 | 			if (weightStandard && data.weight) {
1733 | 				weightForAgeZ = (data.weight - weightStandard.mValue) / weightStandard.sValue;
1734 | 			}
1735 | 
1736 | 			const heightStandard = whoStandards.find(s => s.measurementType === "HEIGHT");
1737 | 			if (heightStandard && data.height) {
1738 | 				heightForAgeZ = (data.height - heightStandard.mValue) / heightStandard.sValue;
1739 | 			}
1740 | 
1741 | 			if (data.bmi) {
1742 | 				const bmiStandard = whoStandards.find(s => s.measurementType === "BMI");
1743 | 				if (bmiStandard) {
1744 | 					bmiForAgeZ = (data.bmi - bmiStandard.mValue) / bmiStandard.sValue;
1745 | 				}
1746 | 			}
1747 | 
1748 | 			// Create growth record
1749 | 			const [growthRecord] = await tx
1750 | 				.insert(schema.growthRecord)
1751 | 				.values({
1752 | 					...data,
1753 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1754 | 					ageDays,
1755 | 					ageMonths,
1756 | 					weightForAgeZ,
1757 | 					heightForAgeZ,
1758 | 					bmiForAgeZ
1759 | 				})
1760 | 				.returning();
1761 | 
1762 | 			// Create alert for abnormal growth
1763 | 			if (weightForAgeZ && (weightForAgeZ < -2 || weightForAgeZ > 2)) {
1764 | 				await tx.insert(schema.alert).values({
1765 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
1766 | 					title: "Abnormal Growth Pattern",
1767 | 					message: `Patient ${patient.firstName} ${patient.lastName} has abnormal weight-for-age Z-score: ${weightForAgeZ.toFixed(2)}`,
1768 | 					type: "growth_alert",
1769 | 					action: { label: "View Patient", href: `/patients/${patient.id}` }
1770 | 				});
1771 | 			}
1772 | 
1773 | 			return growthRecord;
1774 | 		});
1775 | 	},
1776 | 	async createManyGrowthRecords(data: schema.CreateGrowthRecordInput[]) {
1777 | 		return await db.insert(schema.growthRecord).values(data).returning();
1778 | 	},
1779 | 
1780 | 	async updateGrowthRecord(id: string, data: schema.UpdateGrowthRecordInput) {

1783 | 		const [result] = await db
1784 | 			.update(schema.growthRecord)
1785 | 			.set(updateData)
1786 | 			.where(eq(schema.growthRecord.id, id))
1787 | 			.returning();
1788 | 		return result;
1789 | 	},
1790 | 
1791 | 	async updateManyGrowthRecords(ids: string[], data: schema.UpdateGrowthRecordInput) {

1795 | 			.update(schema.growthRecord)
1796 | 			.set(updateData)
1797 | 			.where(inArray(schema.growthRecord.id, ids))
1798 | 			.returning();
1799 | 	},
1800 |

1803 | 		return result;
1804 | 	},
1805 | 	async getWHOStandards(ageDays: number, gender: schema.Gender, type: schema.MeasurementType) {
1806 | 		return await db.query.whoGrowthStandard.findFirst({
1807 | 			where: { ageDays, gender, measurementType: type }
1808 | 		});
1809 | 	},
1810 | 	async getMultipleWHOStandards(
1811 | 		params: Array<{ ageDays: number; gender: schema.Gender; type: schema.MeasurementType }>
1812 | 	) {
1813 | 		// Optimization: If performance is an issue, consider converting this
1814 | 		// into a single query using 'inArray' rather than Promise.all(map)
1815 | 		return await Promise.all(params.map(p => this.getWHOStandards(p.ageDays, p.gender, p.type)));
1816 | 	},
1817 | 
1818 | 	/**
1819 | 	 * Get immunizations within a date range for a specific clinic
1820 | 	 */
1821 | 	async getImmunizationsInRange(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) {
1822 | 		return await db.query.immunization.findMany({
1823 | 			where: {
1824 | 				clinicId,
1825 | 				isDeleted: false,
1826 | 				date: {
1827 | 					gte: startDate,
1828 | 					lte: endDate
1829 | 				}
1830 | 			},
1831 | 			orderBy: { date: "asc" }
1832 | 		});
1833 | 	}
1834 | };

1836 | export type PediatricRepo = typeof pediatricRepo;

```

`queries/pharmacy.repo.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/clinic.repo.ts
   2 | import { eq, inArray, type SQL, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | 
   4 | import { db } from "../client";
   5 | import * as schema from "../schema";
   6 | import type {
   7 | 	DoseGuidelineCreateInput,
   8 | 	DoseGuidelineUpdateInput,
   9 | 	DrugCreateInput,
  10 | 	DrugUpdateInput,
  11 | 	MedicationDispenseCreateInput,
  12 | 	MedicationDispenseUpdateInput,
  13 | 	PrescribedItemCreateInput,
  14 | 	PrescribedItemUpdateInput,
  15 | 	PrescriptionCreateInput,
  16 | 	PrescriptionLogCreateInput,
  17 | 	PrescriptionLogUpdateInput,
  18 | 	PrescriptionStatus,
  19 | 	PrescriptionUpdateInput
  20 | } from "../zod";
  21 | 
  22 | export const pharmacyRepo = {
  23 | 	// Clinic queries
  24 | 	async getPrescriptionById(id: string) {
  25 | 		return await db.query.prescription.findFirst({
  26 | 			where: { id },
  27 | 			with: {
  28 | 				patient: true,
  29 | 				doctor: true,
  30 | 				prescribedItems: {
  31 | 					with: {
  32 | 						drug: true
  33 | 					}
  34 | 				},
  35 | 				medicalRecord: true
  36 | 			}
  37 | 		});
  38 | 	},
  39 | 
  40 | 	async getPatientActivePrescriptions(patientId: string, clinicId?: string, includeExpired?: boolean) {
  41 | 		const conditions: Record<string, unknown> = { patientId };
  42 | 		if (clinicId) conditions.clinicId = clinicId;
  43 | 		if (!includeExpired) {
  44 | 			conditions.status = "active";
  45 | 			conditions.OR = [{ endDate: { gt: new Date() } }, { endDA: null }];
  46 | 		}
  47 | 
  48 | 		return await db.query.prescription.findMany({
  49 | 			where: conditions,
  50 | 			with: {
  51 | 				prescribedItems: {
  52 | 					with: {
  53 | 						drug: true,
  54 | 						dispenses: {
  55 | 							orderBy: { dispensedAt: "desc" },
  56 | 							limit: 10
  57 | 						}
  58 | 					}
  59 | 				},
  60 | 				doctor: {
  61 | 					with: {
  62 | 						user: true
  63 | 					}
  64 | 				}
  65 | 			},
  66 | 			orderBy: { issuedDate: "desc" }
  67 | 		});
  68 | 	},
  69 | 
  70 | 	async getPrescriptionWithItems(id: string, clinicId?: string) {
  71 | 		return await db.query.prescription.findFirst({
  72 | 			where: { id, ...(clinicId ? { clinicId } : {}) },
  73 | 			with: {
  74 | 				prescribedItems: {
  75 | 					with: {
  76 | 						drug: true
  77 | 					}
  78 | 				}
  79 | 			}
  80 | 		});
  81 | 	},

 150 | 
 151 | 	async listDrugs(search?: string, category?: string, limit = 50, offset = 0) {
 152 | 		let where: Record<string, unknown> | undefined;
 153 | 
 154 | 		if (search || category) {
 155 | 			where = {};
 156 | 
 157 | 			if (search) {
 158 | 				where.RAW = () => sql`
 159 |             ${schema.drug.name} LIKE ${`%${search}%`} OR
 160 |             ${schema.drug.genericName} LIKE ${`%${search}%`} OR
 161 |             ${schema.drug.brandName} LIKE ${`%${search}%`}
 162 |           `;
 163 | 			}
 164 | 
 165 | 			if (category) {
 166 | 				if (where.RAW) {
 167 | 					const searchRaw = where.RAW as () => SQL;
 168 | 					where = {
 169 | 						AND: [{ RAW: searchRaw }, { contraindications: category }]
 170 | 					};
 171 | 				} else {
 172 | 					where.contraindications = category;
 173 | 				}
 174 | 			}
 175 | 		}
 176 | 
 177 | 		const drugsList = await db.query.drug.findMany({
 178 | 			where,
 179 | 			limit,
 180 | 			offset,
 181 | 			orderBy: { name: "asc" }
 182 | 		});
 183 | 
 184 | 		const [totalResult] = await db.select({ count: sql<number>`cast(count(*) as integer)` }).from(schema.drug);
 185 | 		const total = totalResult?.count ?? 0;
 186 | 
 187 | 		return {
 188 | 			drugs: drugsList,
 189 | 			pagination: { limit, offset, total, hasMore: offset + limit < total }
 190 | 		};
 191 | 	},
 192 | 
 193 | 	async getPatientAllergies(patientId: string) {
 194 | 		const patient = await db.query.patient.findFirst({
 195 | 			where: { id: patientId },
 196 | 			columns: { allergies: true }
 197 | 		});
 198 | 		return patient?.allergies;
 199 | 	},
 200 | 
 201 | 	async updatePrescriptionStatus(id: string, status: PrescriptionStatus, performedBy: string) {
 202 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 203 | 			await tx.update(schema.prescription).set({ status }).where(eq(schema.prescription.id, id));
 204 | 			await tx.insert(schema.prescriptionLog).values({
 205 | 				id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 206 | 				prescriptionId: id,
 207 | 				action: status.toUpperCase(),
 208 | 				performedBy,
 209 | 				createdAt: new Date()
 210 | 			});
 211 | 		});
 212 | 	},
 213 | 
 214 | 	async checkDoctorAccess(doctorId: string, userId: string, clinicId?: string) {
 215 | 		const userRecord = await db.query.user.findFirst({
 216 | 			where: { id: userId },
 217 | 			with: {
 218 | 				doctors: true,
 219 | 				clinics: true
 220 | 			}
 221 | 		});
 222 | 
 223 | 		if (!userRecord) {
 224 | 			return false;
 225 | 		}
 226 | 
 227 | 		// Admin has full access
 228 | 		if (userRecord.role === "admin" || userRecord.role === "superadmin") {
 229 | 			return true;
 230 | 		}
 231 | 
 232 | 		// Staff has limited access
 233 | 		if (userRecord.role === "staff") {
 234 | 			return true;
 235 | 		}
 236 | 
 237 | 		// Doctor access
 238 | 		if (userRecord.role === "doctor") {
 239 | 			const doctorRecord = await db.query.doctor.findFirst({
 240 | 				where: {
 241 | 					userId,
 242 | 					id: doctorId
 243 | 				}
 244 | 			});
 245 | 			return !!doctorRecord;
 246 | 		}
 247 | 
 248 | 		// Check clinic membership
 249 | 		if (clinicId) {
 250 | 			const clinicMember = await db.query.clinicMember.findFirst({
 251 | 				where: {
 252 | 					userId,
 253 | 					clinicId
 254 | 				}
 255 | 			});
 256 | 			return !!clinicMember;
 257 | 		}
 258 | 
 259 | 		return false;
 260 | 	},
 261 | 	async checkDrugStock(clinicId: string, threshold = 10) {
 262 | 		const lowStockDrugs = await db.query.drug.findMany({
 263 | 			where: {
 264 | 				quantityInStock: { lt: threshold }
 265 | 			}
 266 | 		});
 267 | 
 268 | 		for (const drug of lowStockDrugs) {
 269 | 			await db.insert(schema.notification).values({
 270 | 				id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 271 | 				userId: "admin", // Should be clinic admin
 272 | 				clinicId,
 273 | 				title: "Low Stock Alert",
 274 | 				body: `${drug.name} is running low. Only ${drug.quantityInStock} units remaining.`,
 275 | 				type: "low_stock",
 276 | 				priority: "high"
 277 | 			});
 278 | 		}
 279 | 
 280 | 		return lowStockDrugs;
 281 | 	},
 282 | 
 283 | 	// Dispense medication
 284 | 	async dispenseMedication(data: {
 285 | 		prescribedItemId: string;
 286 | 		prescriptionId: string;
 287 | 		quantityDispensed: number;
 288 | 		dispensedBy: string;
 289 | 		notes?: string;
 290 | 	}) {
 291 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 292 | 			// Get prescribed item
 293 | 			const prescribedItem = await tx.query.prescribedItem.findFirst({
 294 | 				where: { id: data.prescribedItemId },
 295 | 				with: { drug: true }
 296 | 			});
 297 | 
 298 | 			if (!prescribedItem) {
 299 | 				throw new Error("Prescribed item not found");
 300 | 			}
 301 | 
 302 | 			// Check stock
 303 | 			if (!prescribedItem.drug || (prescribedItem.drug.quantityInStock ?? 0) < data.quantityDispensed) {
 304 | 				throw new Error("Insufficient stock");
 305 | 			}
 306 | 
 307 | 			// Create dispense record
 308 | 			const [dispense] = await tx
 309 | 				.insert(schema.medicationDispense)
 310 | 				.values({
 311 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 312 | 					...data,
 313 | 					dispensedAt: new Date()
 314 | 				})
 315 | 				.returning();
 316 | 
 317 | 			// Update drug stock
 318 | 			await tx
 319 | 				.update(schema.drug)
 320 | 				.set({
 321 | 					quantityInStock: (prescribedItem.drug.quantityInStock ?? 0) - data.quantityDispensed,
 322 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 323 | 				})
 324 | 				.where(eq(schema.drug.id, prescribedItem.drugId));
 325 | 
 326 | 			// Update prescribed item refills
 327 | 			await tx
 328 | 				.update(schema.prescribedItem)
 329 | 				.set({
 330 | 					refillsRemaining: (prescribedItem.refillsRemaining ?? 0) - 1,
 331 | 					lastRefillDate: new Date(),
 332 | 					quantityDispensedTotal: (prescribedItem.quantityDispensedTotal ?? 0) + data.quantityDispensed
 333 | 				})
 334 | 				.where(eq(schema.prescribedItem.id, data.prescribedItemId));
 335 | 
 336 | 			// Create prescription log
 337 | 			await tx.insert(schema.prescriptionLog).values({
 338 | 				id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 339 | 				prescriptionId: data.prescriptionId,
 340 | 				action: "DISPENSED",
 341 | 				performedBy: data.dispensedBy,
 342 | 				details: `Dispensed ${data.quantityDispensed} units of ${prescribedItem.drug.name}`,
 343 | 				createdAt: new Date()
 344 | 			});
 345 | 
 346 | 			return dispense;
 347 | 		});
 348 | 	},
 349 | 
 350 | 	async createDrugs(data: DrugCreateInput) {
 351 | 		const [result] = await db.insert(schema.drug).values(data).returning();
 352 | 		return result;
 353 | 	},

```

`queries/report.repo.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // queries/reporting.repo.ts

   5 | import { type DBorTx, db } from "../client";
   6 | import * as schema from "../schema";
```
