```ts
 131 | 
 132 | // ============================================
 133 | // Helper Functions
 134 | // ============================================
 135 | 
 136 | function calculateAgeGroup(ageMonths: number | null): string {
 137 | 	if (!ageMonths) return "unknown";
 138 | 	if (ageMonths < 12) return "infant";
 139 | 	if (ageMonths < 36) return "toddler";
 140 | 	if (ageMonths < 120) return "child";
 141 | 	if (ageMonths < 216) return "adolescent";
 142 | 	return "adult";
 143 | }
 144 | 
 145 | function toNumber(value: number | string | null | undefined): number {
 146 | 	if (value === null || value === undefined) return 0;
 147 | 	return typeof value === "number" ? value : Number(value);
 148 | }
 149 | 
 150 | // ============================================
 151 | // Reporting Repository
 152 | // ============================================
 153 | 
 154 | export const reportingRepo = {
 155 | 	/**
 156 | 	 * Get clinic analytics for a date range
 157 | 	 */
 158 | 	async getClinicAnalytics(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, tx?: DBorTx) {
 159 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 160 | 		const dateFilter = { gte: startDate, lte: endDate };
 161 | 
 162 | 		const [appointments, payments, patients, prescriptions] = await Promise.all([
 163 | 			// Appointments by status
 164 | 			client.query.appointment.findMany({
 165 | 				where: {
 166 | 					clinicId,
 167 | 					isDeleted: false,
 168 | 					appointmentDate: dateFilter
 169 | 				}
 170 | 			}),
 171 | 
 172 | 			// Payments summary
 173 | 			client.query.payment.findMany({
 174 | 				where: {
 175 | 					clinicId,
 176 | 					paymentDate: dateFilter,
 177 | 					status: "PAID"
 178 | 				}
 179 | 			}),
 180 | 
 181 | 			// New patients count
 182 | 			client.query.patient.findMany({
 183 | 				where: {
 184 | 					clinicId,
 185 | 					isDeleted: false,
 186 | 					createdAt: dateFilter
 187 | 				}
 188 | 			}),
 189 | 
 190 | 			// Prescriptions count
 191 | 			client.query.prescription.findMany({
 192 | 				where: {
 193 | 					clinicId,
 194 | 					issuedDate: dateFilter
 195 | 				}
 196 | 			})
 197 | 		]);
 198 | 
 199 | 		const appointmentStats = {
 200 | 			total: appointments.length,
 201 | 			completed: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "COMPLETED").length,
 202 | 			cancelled: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "CANCELLED").length,
 203 | 			pending: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "PENDING").length,
 204 | 			noShow: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "NO_SHOW").length,
 205 | 			confirmed: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "CONFIRMED").length
 206 | 		};
 207 | 
 208 | 		const revenue = payments.reduce((sum, p) => sum + toNumber(p.amount), 0);
 209 | 		const revenueByMethod = payments.reduce(
 210 | 			(acc, p) => {
 211 | 				const method = p.paymentMethod || "CASH";
 212 | 				acc[method] = (acc[method] || 0) + toNumber(p.amount);
 213 | 				return acc;
 214 | 			},
 215 | 			{} as Record<string, number>
 216 | 		);
 217 | 
 218 | 		return {
 219 | 			period: { startDate, endDate },
 220 | 			appointments: appointmentStats,
 221 | 			revenue: {
 222 | 				total: revenue,
 223 | 				byMethod: revenueByMethod,
 224 | 				averagePerAppointment: appointmentStats.completed > 0 ? revenue / appointmentStats.completed : 0
 225 | 			},
 226 | 			patients: {
 227 | 				total: patients.length,
 228 | 				newPatients: patients.length
 229 | 			},
 230 | 			prescriptions: prescriptions.length
 231 | 		};
 232 | 	},
 233 | 
 234 | 	/**
 235 | 	 * Get popular services for a date range
 236 | 	 */
 237 | 	async getPopularServices(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, limit = 10, tx?: DBorTx) {
 238 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 239 | 
 240 | 		const services = await client.query.service.findMany({
 241 | 			where: {
 242 | 				clinicId,
 243 | 				isDeleted: false
 244 | 			},
 245 | 			with: {
 246 | 				appointments: {
 247 | 					where: {
 248 | 						isDeleted: false,
 249 | 						status: "COMPLETED",
 250 | 						appointmentDate: {
 251 | 							gte: startDate,
 252 | 							lte: endDate
 253 | 						}
 254 | 					}
 255 | 				}
 256 | 			}
 257 | 		});
 258 | 
 259 | 		return services
 260 | 			.map(service => ({
 261 | 				id: service.id,
 262 | 				name: service.serviceName,
 263 | 				category: service.category,
 264 | 				price: service.price,
 265 | 				appointmentCount: service.appointments.length,
 266 | 				revenue: service.appointments.length * (service.price ?? 0),
 267 | 				totalUsage: service.appointments.length
 268 | 			}))
 269 | 			.sort((a, b) => b.totalUsage - a.totalUsage)
 270 | 			.slice(0, limit);
 271 | 	},
 272 | 
 273 | 	/**
 274 | 	 * Get clinical report data
 275 | 	 */
 276 | 	async getClinicalReport(
 277 | 		clinicId: string,
 278 | 		startDate: Date,
 279 | 		endDate: Date,
 280 | 		options: {
 281 | 			includeVitals?: boolean;
 282 | 			includeDiagnoses?: boolean;
 283 | 			includeImmunizations?: boolean;
 284 | 			includeGrowthData?: boolean;
 285 | 			ageGroup?: string;
 286 | 			patientIds?: string[];
 287 | 		} = {}
 288 | 	): Promise<ClinicalReportData> {
 289 | 		const client = db;
 290 | 		const dateFilter = { gte: startDate, lte: endDate };
 291 | 
 292 | 		const { includeVitals = true, includeDiagnoses = true, includeImmunizations = true, includeGrowthData = false, ageGroup = "all", patientIds } = options;
 293 | 
 294 | 		// Get all patients for age filtering
 295 | 		const allPatients = await client.query.patient.findMany({
 296 | 			where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 297 | 			columns: { id: true, ageMonths: true, gender: true, dateOfBirth: true, firstName: true, lastName: true, createdAt: true }
 298 | 		});
 299 | 
 300 | 		const filteredPatientIds =
 301 | 			ageGroup === "all"
 302 | 				? allPatients.map(p => p.id)
 303 | 				: allPatients
 304 | 						.filter(p => {
 305 | 							const ageMonths = p.dateOfBirth
 306 | 								? Math.floor(
 307 | 										(new Date().getTime() - new Date(p.dateOfBirth).getTime()) /
 308 | 											(1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 30.44)
 309 | 									)
 310 | 								: null;
 311 | 							return calculateAgeGroup(ageMonths) === ageGroup;
 312 | 						})
 313 | 						.map(p => p.id);
 314 | 
 315 | 		const finalPatientIds = patientIds || filteredPatientIds;
 316 | 		const patientWhere = finalPatientIds.length > 0 ? { patientId: { in: finalPatientIds } } : { patientId: { in: [] } };
 317 | 
 318 | 		const [totalPatients, newPatients, totalAppointments, completedAppointments, diagnoses, immunizations, vitalSigns, growthRecords] = await Promise.all([
 319 | 			client.$count(schema.patient, and(eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false))),
 320 | 			client.$count(schema.patient, and(eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false), gte(schema.patient.createdAt, startDate), lte(schema.patient.createdAt, endDate))),
 321 | 			client.$count(schema.appointment, and(eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false), gte(schema.appointment.createdAt, startDate), lte(schema.appointment.createdAt, endDate))),
 322 | 			client.$count(schema.appointment, and(eq(schema.appointment.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.appointment.isDeleted, false), eq(schema.appointment.status, "COMPLETED"), gte(schema.appointment.createdAt, startDate), lte(schema.appointment.createdAt, endDate))),
 323 | 			includeDiagnoses
 324 | 				? client.query.diagnosis.findMany({
 325 | 						where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false, date: dateFilter, ...patientWhere },
 326 | 						with: { doctor: { with: { user: { columns: { name: true } } } } }
 327 | 					})
 328 | 				: Promise.resolve([]),
 329 | 			includeImmunizations
 330 | 				? client.query.immunization.findMany({
 331 | 						where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false, date: dateFilter, ...patientWhere }
 332 | 					})
 333 | 				: Promise.resolve([]),
 334 | 			includeVitals
 335 | 				? client.query.vitalSign.findMany({
 336 | 						where: { clinicId, recordedAt: dateFilter, ...patientWhere },
 337 | 						with: { patient: { columns: { ageMonths: true, gender: true } } }
 338 | 					})
 339 | 				: Promise.resolve([]),
 340 | 			includeGrowthData
 341 | 				? client.query.growthRecord.findMany({
 342 | 						where: { clinicId, date: dateFilter, ...patientWhere },
 343 | 						with: { patient: { columns: { ageMonths: true, gender: true } } }
 344 | 					})
 345 | 				: Promise.resolve([])
 346 | 		]);
 347 | 
 348 | 		// Process diagnoses data
 349 | 		const diagnosisCounts: Record<string, number> = {};
 350 | 		const diagnosesByType: Record<string, number> = {};
 351 | 		for (const d of diagnoses) {
 352 | 			const diagName = d.diagnosis || "Unknown";
 353 | 			diagnosisCounts[diagName] = (diagnosisCounts[diagName] || 0) + 1;
 354 | 			const type = d.type || "CONSULTATION";
 355 | 			diagnosesByType[type] = (diagnosesByType[type] || 0) + 1;
 356 | 		}
 357 | 
 358 | 		// Process immunizations data
 359 | 		const vaccineCounts: Record<string, number> = {};
 360 | 		const immunizationStatusCounts: Record<string, number> = {};
 361 | 		for (const i of immunizations) {
 362 | 			vaccineCounts[i.vaccine] = (vaccineCounts[i.vaccine] || 0) + 1;
 363 | 			const status = i.status || "PENDING";
 364 | 			immunizationStatusCounts[status] = (immunizationStatusCounts[status] || 0) + 1;
 365 | 		}
 366 | 
 367 | 		// Process vital signs
 368 | 		let avgSystolic = 0, avgDiastolic = 0, avgHeartRate = 0, avgTemp = 0, avgO2 = 0;
 369 | 		if (vitalSigns.length > 0) {
 370 | 			avgSystolic = vitalSigns.reduce((sum, v) => sum + (v.systolic || 0), 0) / vitalSigns.length;
 371 | 			avgDiastolic = vitalSigns.reduce((sum, v) => sum + (v.diastolic || 0), 0) / vitalSigns.length;
 372 | 			avgHeartRate = vitalSigns.reduce((sum, v) => sum + (v.heartRate || 0), 0) / vitalSigns.length;
 373 | 			avgTemp = vitalSigns.reduce((sum, v) => sum + (v.bodyTemperature || 0), 0) / vitalSigns.length;
 374 | 			avgO2 = vitalSigns.reduce((sum, v) => sum + (v.oxygenSaturation || 0), 0) / vitalSigns.length;
 375 | 		}
 376 | 
 377 | 		// Process growth data
 378 | 		let avgWeight = 0, avgHeight = 0, avgHeadCirc = 0;
 379 | 		let underweight = 0, overweight = 0, obese = 0, stunted = 0;
 380 | 		if (growthRecords.length > 0) {
 381 | 			avgWeight = growthRecords.reduce((sum, g) => sum + (g.weight || 0), 0) / growthRecords.length;
 382 | 			avgHeight = growthRecords.reduce((sum, g) => sum + (g.height || 0), 0) / growthRecords.length;
 383 | 			avgHeadCirc = growthRecords.reduce((sum, g) => sum + (g.headCircumference || 0), 0) / growthRecords.length;
 384 | 			underweight = growthRecords.filter(g => g.weightForAgeZ && g.weightForAgeZ < -2).length;
 385 | 			overweight = growthRecords.filter(g => g.bmiForAgeZ && g.bmiForAgeZ > 1).length;
 386 | 			obese = growthRecords.filter(g => g.bmiForAgeZ && g.bmiForAgeZ > 2).length;
 387 | 			stunted = growthRecords.filter(g => g.heightForAgeZ && g.heightForAgeZ < -2).length;
 388 | 		}
 389 | 
 390 | 		const daysInPeriod = Math.max(1, Math.ceil((endDate.getTime() - startDate.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)));
 391 | 		const completionRate = totalAppointments > 0 ? (completedAppointments / totalAppointments) * 100 : 0;
 392 | 		const immunizationCoverageRate = allPatients.length > 0 ? (immunizations.length / allPatients.length) * 100 : 0;
 393 | 
 394 | 		return {
 395 | 			totalPatients,
 396 | 			newPatients,
 397 | 			totalAppointments,
 398 | 			completedAppointments,
 399 | 			completionRate,
 400 | 			topDiagnoses: Object.entries(diagnosisCounts)
 401 | 				.sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
 402 | 				.slice(0, 10)
 403 | 				.map(([diagnosis, count]) => ({ diagnosis, count })),
 404 | 			diagnosesByType: Object.entries(diagnosesByType).map(([type, count]) => ({ type, count })),
 405 | 			immunizationSummary: {
 406 | 				total: immunizations.length,
 407 | 				byVaccine: Object.entries(vaccineCounts).map(([vaccine, count]) => ({ vaccine, count })),
 408 | 				byStatus: immunizationStatusCounts
 409 | 			},
 410 | 			vitalSignsSummary: {
 411 | 				averageSystolic: avgSystolic,
 412 | 				averageDiastolic: avgDiastolic,
 413 | 				averageHeartRate: avgHeartRate,
 414 | 				averageTemperature: avgTemp,
 415 | 				averageOxygenSaturation: avgO2,
 416 | 				totalReadings: vitalSigns.length
 417 | 			},
 418 | 			growthSummary: {
 419 | 				averageWeight: avgWeight,
 420 | 				averageHeight: avgHeight,
 421 | 				averageHeadCircumference: avgHeadCirc,
 422 | 				underweightCount: underweight,
 423 | 				overweightCount: overweight,
 424 | 				obeseCount: obese,
 425 | 				stuntedCount: stunted,
 426 | 				totalRecords: growthRecords.length
 427 | 			},
 428 | 			averagePatientsPerDay: Math.round(totalAppointments / daysInPeriod),
 429 | 			immunizationCoverageRate
 430 | 		};
 431 | 	},
 432 | 
 433 | 	/**
 434 | 	 * Get financial report data
 435 | 	 */
 436 | 	async getFinancialReport(
 437 | 		clinicId: string,
 438 | 		startDate: Date,
 439 | 		endDate: Date,
 440 | 		options: { includeUnpaidInvoices?: boolean; groupBy?: "day" | "week" | "month" } = {}
 441 | 	): Promise<FinancialReportData> {
 442 | 		const client = db;
 443 | 		const dateFilter = { gte: startDate, lte: endDate };
 444 | 		const { includeUnpaidInvoices = true, groupBy = "month" } = options;
 445 | 
 446 | 		const [payments, unpaidInvoices] = await Promise.all([
 447 | 			client.query.payment.findMany({
 448 | 				where: {
 449 | 					clinicId,
 450 | 					isDeleted: false,
 451 | 					status: "PAID",
 452 | 					paymentDate: dateFilter
 453 | 				},
 454 | 				with: {
 455 | 					appointment: {
 456 | 						with: {
 457 | 							doctor: { with: { user: { columns: { name: true } } } },
 458 | 							service: true
 459 | 						}
 460 | 					},
 461 | 					patient: { with: { user: { columns: { name: true } } } }
 462 | 				}
 463 | 			}),
 464 | 			includeUnpaidInvoices
 465 | 				? client.query.payment.findMany({
 466 | 						where: {
 467 | 							clinicId,
 468 | 							isDeleted: false,
 469 | 							status: { in: ["UNPAID", "PARTIAL"] },
 470 | 							paymentDate: dateFilter
 471 | 						},
 472 | 						with: {
 473 | 							patient: { with: { user: { columns: { name: true } } } },
 474 | 							appointment: { with: { service: true } }
 475 | 						}
 476 | 					})
 477 | 				: Promise.resolve([])
 478 | 		]);
 479 | 
 480 | 		const totalRevenue = payments.reduce((sum, p) => sum + toNumber(p.amountPaid), 0);
 481 | 		const totalDiscount = payments.reduce((sum, p) => sum + toNumber(p.discount), 0);
 482 | 		const averageTransaction = payments.length > 0 ? totalRevenue / payments.length : 0;
 483 | 
 484 | 		// Revenue by payment method
 485 | 		const revenueByMethod: Record<string, number> = {};
 486 | 		const revenueByService: Record<string, number> = {};
 487 | 		const revenueByDoctor: Record<string, number> = {};
 488 | 
 489 | 		for (const p of payments) {
 490 | 			const method = p.paymentMethod || "CASH";
 491 | 			revenueByMethod[method] = (revenueByMethod[method] || 0) + toNumber(p.amountPaid);
 492 | 
 493 | 			const serviceName = p.appointment?.service?.serviceName || "Unknown";
 494 | 			revenueByService[serviceName] = (revenueByService[serviceName] || 0) + toNumber(p.amountPaid);
 495 | 
 496 | 			const doctorName = p.appointment?.doctor?.user?.name || "Unknown";
 497 | 			revenueByDoctor[doctorName] = (revenueByDoctor[doctorName] || 0) + toNumber(p.amountPaid);
 498 | 		}
 499 | 
 500 | 		// Timeline data based on groupBy
 501 | 		const timelineMap = new Map<string, { revenue: number; count: number }>();
 502 | 		for (const p of payments) {
 503 | 			const date = p.paymentDate || p.createdAt;
 504 | 			let periodKey: string;
 505 | 			if (groupBy === "day") {
 506 | 				periodKey = format(date, "yyyy-MM-dd");
 507 | 			} else if (groupBy === "week") {
 508 | 				periodKey = `${date.getFullYear()}-W${Math.ceil(date.getDate() / 7)}`;
 509 | 			} else {
 510 | 				periodKey = format(date, "yyyy-MM");
 511 | 			}
 512 | 			const existing = timelineMap.get(periodKey) || { revenue: 0, count: 0 };
 513 | 			timelineMap.set(periodKey, {
 514 | 				revenue: existing.revenue + toNumber(p.amountPaid),
 515 | 				count: existing.count + 1
 516 | 			});
 517 | 		}
 518 | 
 519 | 		const totalOutstanding = unpaidInvoices.reduce((sum, inv) => {
 520 | 			const due = toNumber(inv.totalAmount) - toNumber(inv.amountPaid);
 521 | 			return sum + Math.max(0, due);
 522 | 		}, 0);
 523 | 
 524 | 		return {
 525 | 			totalRevenue,
 526 | 			totalDiscount,
 527 | 			netRevenue: totalRevenue - totalDiscount,
 528 | 			transactionCount: payments.length,
 529 | 			averageTransaction,
 530 | 			outstandingAmount: totalOutstanding,
 531 | 			revenueByMethod,
 532 | 			revenueByService: Object.entries(revenueByService)
 533 | 				.sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
 534 | 				.slice(0, 10)
 535 | 				.map(([service, revenue]) => ({ service, revenue })),
 536 | 			revenueByDoctor: Object.entries(revenueByDoctor)
 537 | 				.sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
 538 | 				.slice(0, 10)
 539 | 				.map(([doctor, revenue]) => ({ doctor, revenue })),
 540 | 			timelineData: Array.from(timelineMap.entries()).map(([period, data]) => ({ period, ...data })),
 541 | 			unpaidInvoices: unpaidInvoices.map(inv => ({
 542 | 				id: inv.id,
 543 | 				receiptNumber: inv.receiptNumber,
 544 | 				patientName: inv.patient?.user?.name || "Unknown",
 545 | 				amount: toNumber(inv.totalAmount),
 546 | 				paid: toNumber(inv.amountPaid),
 547 | 				due: toNumber(inv.totalAmount) - toNumber(inv.amountPaid),
 548 | 				dueDate: inv.paymentDate,
 549 | 				status: inv.status || "UNPAID"
 550 | 			}))
 551 | 		};
 552 | 	},
 553 | 
 554 | 	/**
 555 | 	 * Get operational report data
 556 | 	 */
 557 | 	async getOperationalReport(
 558 | 		clinicId: string,
 559 | 		startDate: Date,
 560 | 		endDate: Date,
 561 | 		options: { includeWaitTimeAnalysis?: boolean } = {}
 562 | 	): Promise<OperationalReportData> {
 563 | 		const client = db;
 564 | 		const dateFilter = { gte: startDate, lte: endDate };
 565 | 		const daysInPeriod = Math.max(1, Math.ceil((endDate.getTime() - startDate.getTime()) / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)));
 566 | 
 567 | 		const [appointments, doctors] = await Promise.all([
 568 | 			client.query.appointment.findMany({
 569 | 				where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false, createdAt: dateFilter },
 570 | 				with: {
 571 | 					doctor: { with: { user: { columns: { name: true } } } },
 572 | 					service: true,
 573 | 					patient: { columns: { id: true } }
 574 | 				}
 575 | 			}),
 576 | 			client.query.doctor.findMany({
 577 | 				where: { clinicId, isDeleted: false },
 578 | 				with: {
 579 | 					appointments: {
 580 | 						where: { createdAt: dateFilter },
 581 | 						with: { service: true, patient: true }
 582 | 					},
 583 | 					ratings: { where: { createdAt: dateFilter } }
 584 | 				}
 585 | 			})
 586 | 		]);
 587 | 
 588 | 		// Calculate appointment stats
 589 | 		const totalAppointments = appointments.length;
 590 | 		const completedAppointments = appointments.filter(a => a.status === "COMPLETED").length;
 591 | 		const cancelledAppointments = appointments.filter(a => a.status === "CANCELLED").length;
 592 | 		const noShowAppointments = appointments.filter(a => a.status === "NO_SHOW").length;
 593 | 		const uniquePatients = new Set(appointments.map(a => a.patientId)).size;
 594 | 
 595 | 		const completionRate = totalAppointments > 0 ? (completedAppointments / totalAppointments) * 100 : 0;
 596 | 		const cancellationRate = totalAppointments > 0 ? (cancelledAppointments / totalAppointments) * 100 : 0;
 597 | 		const noShowRate = totalAppointments > 0 ? (noShowAppointments / totalAppointments) * 100 : 0;
 598 | 
 599 | 		// Appointment distribution by day of week
 600 | 		const appointmentsByDay: Record<string, number> = {};
 601 | 		const appointmentsByHour: Record<string, number> = {};
 602 | 		const servicesByPopularity: Record<string, number> = {};
 603 | 
 604 | 		for (const a of appointments) {
 605 | 			const day = format(a.appointmentDate, "EEEE");
 606 | 			appointmentsByDay[day] = (appointmentsByDay[day] || 0) + 1;
 607 | 
 608 | 			const hour = a.appointmentDate.getHours();
 609 | 			const hourRange = `${hour}:00-${hour + 1}:00`;
 610 | 			appointmentsByHour[hourRange] = (appointmentsByHour[hourRange] || 0) + 1;
 611 | 
 612 | 			const serviceName = a.service?.serviceName || "Unknown";
 613 | 			servicesByPopularity[serviceName] = (servicesByPopularity[serviceName] || 0) + 1;
 614 | 		}
 615 | 
 616 | 		// Doctor performance metrics
 617 | 		const doctorPerformance = doctors.map(doctor => {
 618 | 			const doctorAppointments = doctor.appointments || [];
 619 | 			const completedAppts = doctorAppointments.filter(a => a.status === "COMPLETED").length;
 620 | 			const averageRating =
 621 | 				doctor.ratings.length > 0
 622 | 					? doctor.ratings.reduce((sum, r) => sum + (r.rating || 0), 0) / doctor.ratings.length
 623 | 					: 0;
 624 | 
 625 | 			return {
 626 | 				id: doctor.id,
 627 | 				name: doctor.name,
 628 | 				totalAppointments: doctorAppointments.length,
 629 | 				completedAppointments: completedAppts,
 630 | 				completionRate: doctorAppointments.length > 0 ? (completedAppts / doctorAppointments.length) * 100 : 0,
 631 | 				averageRating: averageRating || 0,
 632 | 				totalRevenue: doctorAppointments.reduce((sum, a) => sum + (a.appointmentPrice || 0), 0)
 633 | 			};
 634 | 		});
 635 | 
 636 | 		// Calculate wait times (if actual_start_time exists in schema)
 637 | 		let waitTimeStats = {
 638 | 			averageWaitTime: 0,
 639 | 			medianWaitTime: 0,
 640 | 			maxWaitTime: 0,
 641 | 			minWaitTime: 0,
 642 | 			totalRecords: 0
 643 | 		};
 644 | 
 645 | 		if (options.includeWaitTimeAnalysis) {
 646 | 			// Note: This assumes there's an actual_start_time column
 647 | 			// If not, this will return zeros
 648 | 			try {
 649 | 				// @ts-ignore - actualStartTime might not be in the base schema but could be in the DB
 650 | 				const waitTimes = appointments
 651 | 					.filter(a => (a as any).actualStartTime)
 652 | 					.map(a => {
 653 | 						const actualStart = (a as any).actualStartTime as Date;
 654 | 						const diff = (actualStart.getTime() - a.appointmentDate.getTime()) / (1000 * 60);
 655 | 						return Math.max(0, diff);
 656 | 					});
 657 | 
 658 | 				if (waitTimes.length > 0) {
 659 | 					const sorted = [...waitTimes].sort((a, b) => a - b);
 660 | 					waitTimeStats = {
 661 | 						averageWaitTime: waitTimes.reduce((a, b) => a + b, 0) / waitTimes.length,
 662 | 						medianWaitTime: sorted[Math.floor(sorted.length / 2)] ?? 0,
 663 | 						maxWaitTime: Math.max(...waitTimes),
 664 | 						minWaitTime: Math.min(...waitTimes),
 665 | 						totalRecords: waitTimes.length
 666 | 					};
 667 | 				}
 668 | 			} catch {
 669 | 				// Column might not exist
 670 | 			}
 671 | 		}
 672 | 
 673 | 		// Calculate retention rate
 674 | 		const repeatPatients = appointments.length - uniquePatients;
 675 | 		const patientRetentionRate = appointments.length > 0 ? (repeatPatients / appointments.length) * 100 : 0;
 676 | 
 677 | 		// Peak hour and busiest day
 678 | 		const peakHour = Object.entries(appointmentsByHour).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])[0]?.[0] || "N/A";
 679 | 		const busiestDay = Object.entries(appointmentsByDay).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])[0]?.[0] || "N/A";
 680 | 
 681 | 		// Appointment slot utilization (assuming 8-hour workday per doctor)
 682 | 		const averageDailyAppointments = totalAppointments / daysInPeriod;
 683 | 		const appointmentSlotUtilization = Math.min(100, (averageDailyAppointments / (doctors.length * 8)) * 100);
 684 | 
 685 | 		return {
 686 | 			totalAppointments,
 687 | 			completedAppointments,
 688 | 			cancelledAppointments,
 689 | 			noShowAppointments,
 690 | 			completionRate,
 691 | 			cancellationRate,
 692 | 			noShowRate,
 693 | 			uniquePatients,
 694 | 			appointmentsByDay: Object.entries(appointmentsByDay).map(([day, count]) => ({ day, count })),
 695 | 			appointmentsByHour: Object.entries(appointmentsByHour).map(([hour, count]) => ({ hour, count })),
 696 | 			topServices: Object.entries(servicesByPopularity)
 697 | 				.sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1])
 698 | 				.slice(0, 10)
 699 | 				.map(([service, count]) => ({ service, count })),
 700 | 			statusDistribution: {
 701 | 				completed: completedAppointments,
 702 | 				cancelled: cancelledAppointments,
 703 | 				noShow: noShowAppointments,
 704 | 				scheduled: totalAppointments - completedAppointments - cancelledAppointments - noShowAppointments
 705 | 			},
 706 | 			doctorPerformance: doctorPerformance.sort((a, b) => b.totalAppointments - a.totalAppointments),
 707 | 			averageDoctorLoad: doctorPerformance.reduce((sum, d) => sum + d.totalAppointments, 0) / Math.max(1, doctors.length),
 708 | 			waitTimeStats,
 709 | 			averageDailyAppointments,
 710 | 			peakHour,
 711 | 			busiestDay,
 712 | 			appointmentSlotUtilization,
 713 | 			patientRetentionRate
 714 | 		};
 715 | 	},
 716 | 
 717 | 	/**
 718 | 	 * Get patient summary report
 719 | 	 */
 720 | 	async getPatientSummaryReport(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, tx?: DBorTx): Promise<PatientSummaryReportData> {
 721 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 722 | 
 723 | 		const patients = await client.query.patient.findMany({
 724 | 			where: {
 725 | 				clinicId,
 726 | 				isDeleted: false,
 727 | 				createdAt: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 728 | 			},
 729 | 			with: {
 730 | 				appointments: { columns: { id: true } }
 731 | 			}
 732 | 		});
 733 | 
 734 | 		const totalPatients = await client.$count(schema.patient, and(eq(schema.patient.clinicId, clinicId), eq(schema.patient.isDeleted, false)));
 735 | 
 736 | 		const ageGroups: Record<string, number> = {};
 737 | 		const genderDistribution: Record<string, number> = {};
 738 | 
 739 | 		for (const p of patients) {
 740 | 			const ageMonths = p.dateOfBirth
 741 | 				? Math.floor(
 742 | 						(new Date().getTime() - new Date(p.dateOfBirth).getTime()) /
 743 | 							(1000 * 60 * 60 * 24 * 30.44)
 744 | 					)
 745 | 				: null;
 746 | 
 747 | 			const group = calculateAgeGroup(ageMonths);
 748 | 			ageGroups[group] = (ageGroups[group] || 0) + 1;
 749 | 			genderDistribution[p.gender || "OTHER"] = (genderDistribution[p.gender || "OTHER"] || 0) + 1;
 750 | 		}
 751 | 
 752 | 		const totalAppointments = patients.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.appointments?.length || 0), 0);
 753 | 		const averageAppointmentsPerPatient = patients.length > 0 ? totalAppointments / patients.length : 0;
 754 | 
 755 | 		return {
 756 | 			totalPatients,
 757 | 			newPatients: patients.length,
 758 | 			ageGroups,
 759 | 			genderDistribution,
 760 | 			averageAppointmentsPerPatient
 761 | 		};
 762 | 	},
 763 | 
 764 | 	/**
 765 | 	 * Get inventory report
 766 | 	 */
 767 | 	async getInventoryReport(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date, tx?: DBorTx): Promise<InventoryReportData> {
 768 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 769 | 
 770 | 		const drugs = await client.query.drug.findMany({
 771 | 			where: {
 772 | 				clinicId
 773 | 			},
 774 | 			with: {
 775 | 				prescribedItems: {
 776 | 					where: {
 777 | 						prescription: {
 778 | 							issuedDate: { gte: startDate, lte: endDate }
 779 | 						}
 780 | 					}
 781 | 				}
 782 | 			}
 783 | 		});
 784 | 
 785 | 		const lowStockThreshold = 10;
 786 | 		const lowStockItems = drugs.filter(d => (d.quantityInStock || 0) < lowStockThreshold).length;
 787 | 
 788 | 		return {
 789 | 			totalDrugs: drugs.length,
 790 | 			lowStockItems,
 791 | 			mostPrescribed: drugs
 792 | 				.map(d => ({
 793 | 					name: d.name,
 794 | 					prescriptionCount: d.prescribedItems.length
 795 | 				}))
 796 | 				.sort((a, b) => b.prescriptionCount - a.prescriptionCount)
 797 | 				.slice(0, 10)
 798 | 		};
 799 | 	}
 800 | };
 801 | 
 802 | export type ReportingRepo = typeof reportingRepo;

```

`queries/staff.repo.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/clinic.repo.ts
   2 | import { and, eq, ilike, inArray, or } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | 
   4 | import { db } from "../client";
   5 | import * as schema from "../schema";
   6 | import type { StaffCreateInput, StaffUpdateInput } from "../zod";
   7 | 
   8 | export const staffRepo = {
   9 | 	// Clinic queries
  10 | 	async listStaff(params: {
  11 | 		clinicId: string;
  12 | 		page: number;
  13 | 		limit: number;
  14 | 		search?: string;
  15 | 		role?: "admin" | "doctor" | "staff" | "patient";
  16 | 		status?: "ACTIVE" | "INACTIVE" | "PENDING" | "SUSPENDED";
  17 | 	}) {
  18 | 		const { clinicId, page, limit, search, role, status } = params;
  19 | 
  20 | 		const rqbWhere: Record<string, unknown> = {
  21 | 			clinicId,
  22 | 			isDeleted: false,
  23 | 			...(role && { role }),
  24 | 			...(status && { status }),
  25 | 			...(search && {
  26 | 				OR: [
  27 | 					{ name: { ilike: `%${search}%` } },
  28 | 					{ email: { ilike: `%${search}%` } },
  29 | 					{ phone: { ilike: `%${search}%` } },
  30 | 					{ department: { ilike: `%${search}%` } }
  31 | 				]
  32 | 			})
  33 | 		};
  34 | 
  35 | 		const [staffList, total] = await Promise.all([
  36 | 			db.query.staff.findMany({
  37 | 				where: rqbWhere,
  38 | 				limit,
  39 | 				offset: (page - 1) * limit,
  40 | 				orderBy: { name: "asc" }
  41 | 			}),
  42 | 			db.$count(
  43 | 				schema.staff,
  44 | 				and(
  45 | 					eq(schema.staff.clinicId, clinicId),
  46 | 					eq(schema.staff.isActive, true),
  47 | 					role ? eq(schema.staff.role, role) : undefined,
  48 | 					status ? eq(schema.staff.status, status) : undefined,
  49 | 					search
  50 | 						? or(
  51 | 								ilike(schema.staff.name, `%${search}%`),
  52 | 								ilike(schema.staff.email, `%${search}%`),
  53 | 								ilike(schema.staff.phone, `%${search}%`),
  54 | 								ilike(schema.staff.department, `%${search}%`)
  55 | 							)
  56 | 						: undefined
  57 | 				)
  58 | 			)
  59 | 		]);
  60 | 
  61 | 		return { staff: staffList, total, totalPages: Math.ceil(total / limit) };
  62 | 	},
  63 | 
  64 | 	async getStaffById(id: string, clinicId: string) {
  65 | 		return await db.query.staff.findFirst({
  66 | 			where: { id, clinicId, isActive: true }
  67 | 		});
  68 | 	},
  69 | 
  70 | 	async createStaff(data: StaffCreateInput) {
  71 | 		const [result] = await db.insert(schema.staff).values(data).returning();
  72 | 		return result;
  73 | 	},
  74 | 
  75 | 	async createManyStaffs(data: StaffCreateInput[]) {
  76 | 		return await db.insert(schema.staff).values(data).returning();
  77 | 	},
  78 | 
  79 | 	async updateStaff(id: string, data: StaffUpdateInput) {
  80 | 		const updateData = { ...data };
  81 | 		updateData.updatedAt = new Date();
  82 | 		const [result] = await db.update(schema.staff).set(updateData).where(eq(schema.staff.id, id)).returning();
  83 | 		return result;
  84 | 	},
  85 | 
  86 | 	async updateManyStaffs(ids: string[], data: StaffUpdateInput) {
  87 | 		const updateData = { ...data };
  88 | 		updateData.updatedAt = new Date();
  89 | 		return await db.update(schema.staff).set(updateData).where(inArray(schema.staff.id, ids)).returning();
  90 | 	},
  91 | 
  92 | 	async deleteStaff(id: string) {
  93 | 		const [result] = await db.delete(schema.staff).where(eq(schema.staff.id, id)).returning();
  94 | 		return result;
  95 | 	},
  96 | 
  97 | 	async softDeleteStaff(id: string) {
  98 | 		const [result] = await db
  99 | 			.update(schema.staff)
 100 | 			.set({ deletedAt: new Date() })
 101 | 			.where(eq(schema.staff.id, id))
 102 | 			.returning();
 103 | 		return result;
 104 | 	},
 105 | 	async restoreStaff(id: string) {
 106 | 		const [result] = await db
 107 | 			.update(schema.staff)
 108 | 			.set({ deletedAt: null })
 109 | 			.where(eq(schema.staff.id, id))
 110 | 			.returning();
 111 | 		return result;
 112 | 	}
 113 | };
 114 | 
 115 | export type StaffRepo = typeof staffRepo;

```

`queries/system.repo.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/repositories/clinic.repo.ts
   2 | import { and, eq, ilike, inArray, or, sql } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | 
   4 | import { type DBorTx, db } from "../client";
   5 | import * as schema from "../schema";
   6 | import type { AppointmentStatus } from "../zod";
   7 | 
   8 | export const systemRepo = {
   9 | 	// Search files
  10 | 	async searchFiles(userId: string, searchTerm: string) {
  11 | 		return await db.query.file.findMany({
  12 | 			where: {
  13 | 				userId,
  14 | 				// Using object syntax for ilike
  15 | 				searchText: { ilike: `%${searchTerm}%` }
  16 | 			},
  17 | 			// orderBy is now an object
  18 | 			orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" }
  19 | 		});
  20 | 	},
  21 | 
  22 | 	// Advanced search with filters
  23 | 	async advancedSearch(filters: {
  24 | 		clinicId?: string;
  25 | 		patientName?: string;
  26 | 		doctorName?: string;
  27 | 		dateFrom?: Date;
  28 | 		dateTo?: Date;
  29 | 		status?: AppointmentStatus;
  30 | 	}) {
  31 | 		return await db.query.appointment.findMany({
  32 | 			where: {
  33 | 				isDeleted: false,
  34 | 				// Handling isNull in v2 object syntax usually requires RAW if not natively supported
  35 | 				AND: [
  36 | 					{ RAW: table => sql`${table.deletedAt} IS NULL` },
  37 | 					...(filters.clinicId ? [{ clinicId: filters.clinicId }] : []),
  38 | 					...(filters.status ? [{ status: filters.status }] : []),
  39 | 					...(filters.dateFrom && filters.dateTo
  40 | 						? [
  41 | 								{
  42 | 									appointmentDate: {
  43 | 										gte: filters.dateFrom,
  44 | 										lte: filters.dateTo
  45 | 									}
  46 | 								}
  47 | 							]
  48 | 						: [])
  49 | 				]
  50 | 			},
  51 | 			with: {
  52 | 				// Corrected relation filters for v2
  53 | 				patient: filters.patientName
  54 | 					? {
  55 | 							where: {
  56 | 								OR: [
  57 | 									{ firstName: { ilike: `%${filters.patientName}%` } },
  58 | 									{ lastName: { ilike: `%${filters.patientName}%` } }
  59 | 								]
  60 | 							}
  61 | 						}
  62 | 					: true,
  63 | 				doctor: filters.doctorName
  64 | 					? {
  65 | 							where: {
  66 | 								name: { ilike: `%${filters.doctorName}%` }
  67 | 							}
  68 | 						}
  69 | 					: true,
  70 | 				service: true,
  71 | 				bills: true
  72 | 			},
  73 | 			orderBy: { appointmentDate: "desc" }
  74 | 		});
  75 | 	},
  76 | 	async getUserNotifications(userId: string, clinicId?: string, limit = 5, offset = 0) {
  77 | 		return await db.query.notification.findMany({
  78 | 			where: {
  79 | 				userId,
  80 | 				...(clinicId && { clinicId })
  81 | 			},
  82 | 			orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
  83 | 			limit,
  84 | 			offset
  85 | 		});
  86 | 	},
  87 | 
  88 | 	// List notifications with filters and counts
  89 | 	async listNotifications(params: {
  90 | 		userId: string;
  91 | 		clinicId?: string;
  92 | 		status?: "all" | "read" | "unread";
  93 | 		type?: string | null;
  94 | 		search?: string;
  95 | 		limit: number;
  96 | 		offset: number;
  97 | 	}) {
  98 | 		const { userId, clinicId, status, type, search, limit, offset } = params;
  99 | 		const rqbWhere = {
 100 | 			userId,
 101 | 			...(clinicId && { clinicId }),
 102 | 			...(status === "unread" && { status: "unread" as const }),
 103 | 			...(status === "read" && { status: "read" as const }),
 104 | 			...(type && { type }),
 105 | 			...(search && {
 106 | 				OR: [{ body: { ilike: `%${search}%` } }, { title: { ilike: `%${search}%` } }]
 107 | 			})
 108 | 		};
 109 | 
 110 | 		const [items, totalResult, unreadResult] = await Promise.all([
 111 | 			db.query.notification.findMany({
 112 | 				where: rqbWhere,
 113 | 				orderBy: { createdAt: "desc" },
 114 | 				limit,
 115 | 				offset
 116 | 			}),
 117 | 			db.$count(
 118 | 				schema.notification,
 119 | 				and(
 120 | 					eq(schema.notification.userId, userId),
 121 | 					clinicId ? eq(schema.notification.clinicId, clinicId) : undefined,
 122 | 					status === "unread" ? eq(schema.notification.status, "unread") : undefined,
 123 | 					status === "read" ? eq(schema.notification.status, "read") : undefined,
 124 | 					type ? eq(schema.notification.type, type) : undefined,
 125 | 					search
 126 | 						? or(
 127 | 								ilike(schema.notification.body, `%${search}%`),
 128 | 								ilike(schema.notification.title, `%${search}%`)
 129 | 							)
 130 | 						: undefined
 131 | 				)
 132 | 			),
 133 | 			db.$count(
 134 | 				schema.notification,
 135 | 				and(
 136 | 					eq(schema.notification.userId, userId),
 137 | 					clinicId ? eq(schema.notification.clinicId, clinicId) : undefined,
 138 | 					eq(schema.notification.status, "unread")
 139 | 				)
 140 | 			)
 141 | 		]);
 142 | 
 143 | 		return {
 144 | 			items,
 145 | 			total: totalResult,
 146 | 			unreadCount: unreadResult
 147 | 		};
 148 | 	},
 149 | 
 150 | 	// Mark notification as read
 151 | 	async markNotificationsAsRead(notificationId: string, userId?: string) {
 152 | 		const condition = userId
 153 | 			? and(eq(schema.notification.id, notificationId), eq(schema.notification.userId, userId))
 154 | 			: eq(schema.notification.id, notificationId);
 155 | 
 156 | 		return await db
 157 | 			.update(schema.notification)
 158 | 			.set({ status: "read", updatedAt: new Date() })
 159 | 			.where(condition)
 160 | 			.returning();
 161 | 	},
 162 | 
 163 | 	// Mark all as read
 164 | 	async markAllNotificationsAsRead(userId: string, clinicId?: string) {
 165 | 		return await db
 166 | 			.update(schema.notification)
 167 | 			.set({ status: "read", updatedAt: new Date() })
 168 | 			.where(
 169 | 				and(
 170 | 					eq(schema.notification.userId, userId),
 171 | 					clinicId ? eq(schema.notification.clinicId, clinicId) : undefined,
 172 | 					eq(schema.notification.status, "unread")
 173 | 				)
 174 | 			)
 175 | 			.returning();
 176 | 	},
 177 | 
 178 | 	// Delete a notification
 179 | 	async deleteNotification(notificationId: string, userId: string) {
 180 | 		return await db
 181 | 			.delete(schema.notification)
 182 | 			.where(and(eq(schema.notification.id, notificationId), eq(schema.notification.userId, userId)))
 183 | 			.returning();
 184 | 	},
 185 | 
 186 | 	// Clear all notifications for user
 187 | 	async clearAllNotifications(userId: string, clinicId?: string) {
 188 | 		return await db
 189 | 			.delete(schema.notification)
 190 | 			.where(
 191 | 				and(
 192 | 					eq(schema.notification.userId, userId),
 193 | 					clinicId ? eq(schema.notification.clinicId, clinicId) : undefined
 194 | 				)
 195 | 			)
 196 | 			.returning();
 197 | 	},
 198 | 	async getClinicAnalytics(clinicId: string, startDate: Date, endDate: Date) {
 199 | 		const [appointments, payments, patients, prescriptions] = await Promise.all([
 200 | 			// Appointments by status
 201 | 			db.query.appointment.findMany({
 202 | 				where: {
 203 | 					clinicId,
 204 | 					isDeleted: false,
 205 | 					appointmentDate: {
 206 | 						gte: startDate,
 207 | 						lte: endDate
 208 | 					}
 209 | 				}
 210 | 			}),
 211 | 
 212 | 			// Payments summary
 213 | 			db.query.payment.findMany({
 214 | 				where: {
 215 | 					clinicId,
 216 | 					paymentDate: {
 217 | 						gte: startDate,
 218 | 						lte: endDate
 219 | 					},
 220 | 					status: "PAID"
 221 | 				}
 222 | 			}),
 223 | 
 224 | 			// New patients count
 225 | 			db.query.patient.findMany({
 226 | 				where: {
 227 | 					clinicId,
 228 | 					isDeleted: false,
 229 | 					createdAt: {
 230 | 						gte: startDate,
 231 | 						lte: endDate
 232 | 					}
 233 | 				}
 234 | 			}),
 235 | 
 236 | 			// Prescriptions count
 237 | 			db.query.prescription.findMany({
 238 | 				where: {
 239 | 					clinicId,
 240 | 					issuedDate: {
 241 | 						gte: startDate,
 242 | 						lte: endDate
 243 | 					}
 244 | 				}
 245 | 			})
 246 | 		]);
 247 | 
 248 | 		const appointmentStats = {
 249 | 			total: appointments.length,
 250 | 			completed: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "COMPLETED").length,
 251 | 			cancelled: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "CANCELLED").length,
 252 | 			pending: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "PENDING").length,
 253 | 			noShow: appointments.filter(a => a.status === "NO_SHOW").length
 254 | 		};
 255 | 
 256 | 		const revenue = payments.reduce((sum, p) => sum + (p.amount ?? 0), 0);
 257 | 		const revenueByMethod = payments.reduce(
 258 | 			(acc, p) => {
 259 | 				const method = p.paymentMethod || "UNKNOWN";
 260 | 				acc[method] = (acc[method] || 0) + (p.amount ?? 0);
 261 | 				return acc;
 262 | 			},
 263 | 			{} as Record<string, number>
 264 | 		);
 265 | 
 266 | 		return {
 267 | 			period: { startDate, endDate },
 268 | 			appointments: appointmentStats,
 269 | 			revenue: {
 270 | 				total: revenue,
 271 | 				byMethod: revenueByMethod,
 272 | 				averagePerAppointment: appointmentStats.completed > 0 ? revenue / appointmentStats.completed : 0
 273 | 			},
 274 | 			patients: {
 275 | 				total: patients.length,
 276 | 				newPatients: patients.length
 277 | 			},
 278 | 			prescriptions: prescriptions.length
 279 | 		};
 280 | 	},
 281 | 	async checkVitalSignsAccess(userId: string, patientId: string): Promise<boolean> {
 282 | 		const userData = await db.query.user.findFirst({
 283 | 			where: { id: userId },
 284 | 			with: {
 285 | 				patients: true,
 286 | 				doctors: true
 287 | 			}
 288 | 		});
 289 | 
 290 | 		if (!userData) return false;
 291 | 
 292 | 		if (userData.role === "admin" || userData.role === "staff") return true;
 293 | 		if (userData.role === "doctor" && userData.doctors) return true;
 294 | 		if (userData.role === "patient" && Array.isArray(userData.patients)) {
 295 | 			return userData.patients.some(p => p.id === patientId);
 296 | 		}
 297 | 
 298 | 		// Check if user is guardian
 299 | 		const guardianRecord = await db.query.guardian.findFirst({
 300 | 			where: {
 301 | 				userId: userId,
 302 | 				patientId: patientId
 303 | 			}
 304 | 		});
 305 | 
 306 | 		return !!guardianRecord;
 307 | 	},
 308 | 	async checkDoctorAccess(doctorId: string, userId: string, clinicId?: string) {
 309 | 		const userRecord = await db.query.user.findFirst({
 310 | 			where: { id: userId },
 311 | 			with: {
 312 | 				doctors: true,
 313 | 				clinics: true
 314 | 			}
 315 | 		});
 316 | 
 317 | 		if (!userRecord) return false;
 318 | 
 319 | 		// Admin has full access
 320 | 		if (userRecord.role === "admin" || userRecord.role === "superadmin") return true;
 321 | 
 322 | 		// Staff has limited access
 323 | 		if (userRecord.role === "staff") return true;
 324 | 
 325 | 		// Doctor access
 326 | 		if (userRecord.role === "doctor") {
 327 | 			const doctorRecord = await db.query.doctor.findFirst({
 328 | 				where: {
 329 | 					userId: userId,
 330 | 					id: doctorId
 331 | 				}
 332 | 			});
 333 | 			return !!doctorRecord;
 334 | 		}
 335 | 
 336 | 		// Check clinic membership
 337 | 		if (clinicId) {
 338 | 			const clinicMember = await db.query.clinicMember.findFirst({
 339 | 				where: {
 340 | 					userId: userId,
 341 | 					clinicId: clinicId
 342 | 				}
 343 | 			});
 344 | 			return !!clinicMember;
 345 | 		}
 346 | 
 347 | 		return false;
 348 | 	},
 349 | 
 350 | 	async createFolders(data: schema.CreateFoldersInput) {
 351 | 		const [result] = await db.insert(schema.folder).values(data).returning();
 352 | 		return result;

 592 | 		const [result] = await db.insert(schema.payment).values(data).returning();
 593 | 		return result;
 594 | 	},
 595 | 
 596 | 	async recordPayment(data: schema.CreatePaymentInput) {
 597 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 598 | 			const [payment] = await tx
 599 | 				.insert(schema.payment)
 600 | 				.values({
 601 | 					...data,
 602 | 					id: data.id ?? crypto.randomUUID(),
 603 | 					billDate: data.billDate ?? new Date(),
 604 | 					totalAmount: data.totalAmount ?? data.amount,
 605 | 					amountPaid: data.status === "PAID" ? data.amount : 0,
 606 | 					paidDate: data.status === "PAID" ? new Date() : null,
 607 | 					receiptNumber: data.receiptNumber ? data.receiptNumber : Math.floor(Math.random() * 1_000_000)
 608 | 				})
 609 | 				.returning();
 610 | 
 611 | 			return payment;
 612 | 		});
 613 | 	},
 614 | 
 615 | 	async createManyPayments(data: schema.CreatePaymentInput[]) {
 616 | 		return await db.insert(schema.payment).values(data).returning();
 617 | 	},
 618 | 	async createInvoice(data: {
 619 | 		patientId: string;
 620 | 		clinicId: string;
 621 | 		appointmentId?: string;
 622 | 		items: Array<{ description: string; amount: number }>;
 623 | 		dueDate?: Date;
 624 | 		notes?: string;
 625 | 	}) {
 626 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 627 | 			const totalAmount = data.items.reduce((sum, item) => sum + item.amount, 0);
 628 | 
 629 | 			const [payment] = await tx
 630 | 				.insert(schema.payment)
 631 | 				.values({
 632 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 633 | 					patientId: data.patientId,
 634 | 					clinicId: data.clinicId,
 635 | 					appointmentId: data.appointmentId,
 636 | 					amount: totalAmount,
 637 | 					totalAmount: totalAmount,
 638 | 					status: "PENDING",
 639 | 					billDate: new Date(),
 640 | 					notes: data.notes,
 641 | 					receiptNumber: Math.floor(Math.random() * 1_000_000)
 642 | 				})
 643 | 				.returning();
 644 | 
 645 | 			// Note: If there was an invoice_items table, we would insert items here.
 646 | 
 647 | 			return payment;
 648 | 		});
 649 | 	},

 676 | 	},
 677 | 	async generateReceipt(paymentId: string) {
 678 | 		return await db.query.payment.findFirst({
 679 | 			where: { id: paymentId },
 680 | 			with: { patient: true, appointment: true, clinic: true }
 681 | 		});
 682 | 	},
 683 | 	async processPaymentWithReceipt(
 684 | 		paymentId: string,
 685 | 		amountPaid: number,
 686 | 		paymentMethod: schema.PaymentMethod,
 687 | 		notes?: string
 688 | 	) {
 689 | 		return await db.transaction(async tx => {
 690 | 			const payment = await tx.query.payment.findFirst({
 691 | 				where: { id: paymentId },
 692 | 				with: {
 693 | 					patient: true,
 694 | 					appointment: true
 695 | 				}
 696 | 			});
 697 | 
 698 | 			if (!payment) {
 699 | 				throw new Error("Payment not found");
 700 | 			}
 701 | 
 702 | 			const isFullyPaid = amountPaid >= (payment.totalAmount ?? 0);
 703 | 			const receiptNumber = `RCP-${Date.now()}-${Math.floor(Math.random() * 1000)}`;
 704 | 
 705 | 			const [updatedPayment] = await tx
 706 | 				.update(schema.payment)
 707 | 				.set({
 708 | 					amountPaid,
 709 | 					paymentMethod,
 710 | 					paymentDate: new Date(),
 711 | 					paidDate: new Date(),
 712 | 					status: isFullyPaid ? "PAID" : "PARTIAL",
 713 | 					notes: notes ? `${payment.notes || ""}\n${notes}` : payment.notes,
 714 | 					receiptNumber: Number.parseInt(receiptNumber.split("-").pop() || "0", 10),
 715 | 					updatedAt: new Date()
 716 | 				})
 717 | 				.where(eq(schema.payment.id, paymentId))
 718 | 				.returning();
 719 | 
 720 | 			// Create receipt notification
 721 | 			if (payment.patient?.userId) {
 722 | 				await tx.insert(schema.notification).values({
 723 | 					id: crypto.randomUUID(),
 724 | 					userId: payment.patient.userId,
 725 | 					clinicId: payment.clinicId ?? "",
 726 | 					title: "Payment Receipt",
 727 | 					body: `Payment of ${amountPaid} received. Receipt #: ${receiptNumber}`,
 728 | 					type: "payment_receipt",
 729 | 					priority: "medium",
 730 | 					metadata: {
 731 | 						receiptNumber,
 732 | 						amountPaid,
 733 | 						paymentMethod
 734 | 					}
 735 | 				});
 736 | 			}
 737 | 
 738 | 			return updatedPayment;
 739 | 		});
 740 | 	},
 741 | 
 742 | 	async restorePayment(id: string) {
 743 | 		const [result] = await db
 744 | 			.update(schema.payment)
 745 | 			.set({ deletedAt: null })
 746 | 			.where(eq(schema.payment.id, id))
 747 | 			.returning();
 748 | 		return result;
 749 | 	},
 750 | 	async getAllConfigs(tx?: DBorTx) {
 751 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 752 | 		return client.select().from(schema.configStore);
 753 | 	},
 754 | 
 755 | 	/**
 756 | 	 * Get a single config value by key
 757 | 	 */
 758 | 	async getConfig(key: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 759 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 760 | 		const result = await client.select().from(schema.configStore).where(eq(schema.configStore.key, key)).limit(1);
 761 | 		return result[0] ?? null;
 762 | 	},
 763 | 
 764 | 	/**
 765 | 	 * Get multiple config values by keys
 766 | 	 */
 767 | 	async getConfigs(keys: string[], tx?: DBorTx) {
 768 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 769 | 		const results = await Promise.all(keys.map(key => this.getConfig(key, client)));
 770 | 		return results.reduce(
 771 | 			(acc, result, idx) => {
 772 | 				if (result) acc[keys[idx] ?? ""] = result.value;
 773 | 				return acc;
 774 | 			},
 775 | 			{} as Record<string, string>
 776 | 		);
 777 | 	},
 778 | 
 779 | 	/**
 780 | 	 * Set a config value (upsert)
 781 | 	 */
 782 | 	async setConfig(key: string, value: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 783 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 784 | 		return client.insert(schema.configStore).values({ key, value }).onConflictDoUpdate({
 785 | 			target: schema.configStore.key,
 786 | 			set: { value }
 787 | 		});
 788 | 	},
 789 | 
 790 | 	/**
 791 | 	 * Set multiple config values (batch upsert)
 792 | 	 */
 793 | 	async setConfigs(configs: Array<{ key: string; value: string }>, tx?: DBorTx) {
 794 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 795 | 		const results = [];
 796 | 		for (const config of configs) {
 797 | 			const result = await this.setConfig(config.key, config.value, client);
 798 | 			results.push(result);
 799 | 		}
 800 | 		return results;
 801 | 	},
 802 | 
 803 | 	/**
 804 | 	 * Delete a config key
 805 | 	 */
 806 | 	async deleteConfig(key: string, tx?: DBorTx) {
 807 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 808 | 		return client.delete(schema.configStore).where(eq(schema.configStore.key, key));
 809 | 	},
 810 | 
 811 | 	/**
 812 | 	 * Get all config keys that exist
 813 | 	 */
 814 | 	async getExistingKeys(tx?: DBorTx) {
 815 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 816 | 		const rows = await client.select({ key: schema.configStore.key }).from(schema.configStore);
 817 | 		return rows.map(row => row.key);
 818 | 	},
 819 | 
 820 | 	/**
 821 | 	 * Initialize missing config keys with default values
 822 | 	 */
 823 | 	async initializeMissingConfigs(defaults: Array<{ key: string; value: string }>, tx?: DBorTx) {
 824 | 		const client = tx ?? db;
 825 | 		const existingKeys = await this.getExistingKeys(client);
 826 | 		const missing = defaults.filter(d => !existingKeys.includes(d.key));
 827 | 
 828 | 		if (missing.length > 0) {
 829 | 			await client.insert(schema.configStore).values(missing).onConflictDoNothing();
 830 | 		}
 831 | 
 832 | 		return missing;
 833 | 	}
 834 | };
 835 | 
 836 | export type SystemRepo = typeof systemRepo;

```

`reset.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { stdin as input, stdout as output } from "node:process";
   2 | import * as readline from "node:readline";
   3 | 
   4 | import "dotenv/config";
   5 | import postgres from "postgres";
   6 | 
   7 | const DATABASE_URL = process.env.DATABASE_URL;
   8 | 
   9 | if (!DATABASE_URL) {
  10 | 	console.error("❌ DATABASE_URL environment variable is not set");
  11 | 	process.exit(1);
  12 | }
  13 | 
  14 | async function askConfirmation(): Promise<boolean> {
  15 | 	const args = process.argv.slice(2);
  16 | 	if (args.includes("--force") || args.includes("-y")) {
  17 | 		return true;
  18 | 	}
  19 | 
  20 | 	const rl = readline.createInterface({ input, output });
  21 | 	try {
  22 | 		const answer = await new Promise<string>(resolve => {
  23 | 			rl.question("\n⚠️  WARNING: This will delete ALL data in the public schema. Continue? (y/N): ", resolve);
  24 | 		});
  25 | 		return answer.toLowerCase() === "y" || answer.toLowerCase() === "yes";
  26 | 	} finally {
  27 | 		rl.close();
  28 | 	}
  29 | }
  30 | 
  31 | async function resetDatabase() {
  32 | 	const confirmed = await askConfirmation();
  33 | 	if (!confirmed) {
  34 | 		console.log("❌ Reset cancelled.");
  35 | 		return;
  36 | 	}
  37 | 
  38 | 	console.log("\n🧹 Preparing to reset PostgreSQL database...");
  39 | 	const maskedUrl = DATABASE_URL?.replace(/:([^:@]+)@/, ":****@");
  40 | 	console.log(`📡 Connecting to: ${maskedUrl}`);
  41 | 
  42 | 	const sql = postgres(DATABASE_URL ?? "", { max: 1 });
  43 | 
  44 | 	try {
  45 | 		// Test connection
  46 | 		await sql`SELECT 1`;
  47 | 		console.log("✅ Database connection successful\n");
  48 | 
  49 | 		console.log("🔥 Dropping and recreating public schema...");
  50 | 
  51 | 		// We use a transaction to ensure we don't leave the DB in a broken state
  52 | 		await sql.begin(async sql => {
  53 | 			// Drop the entire public schema and recreate it
  54 | 			// This is the most robust way to ensure everything (tables, enums, sequences, etc.) is gone
  55 | 			await sql`DROP SCHEMA IF EXISTS public CASCADE`;
  56 | 			await sql`CREATE SCHEMA public`;
  57 | 			await sql`GRANT ALL ON SCHEMA public TO public`;
  58 | 			await sql`COMMENT ON SCHEMA public IS 'standard public schema'`;
  59 | 		});
  60 | 
  61 | 		console.log("✅ Schema reset successful.");
  62 | 
  63 | 		console.log("\n✨ Database reset complete!");
  64 | 		console.log("\n🚀 Next steps:");
  65 | 		console.log("   1. Run migrations: bun run db:migrate");
  66 | 		console.log("   2. Seed database: bun run db:seed");
  67 | 		console.log("   3. Start the app: bun run dev");
  68 | 	} catch (error) {
  69 | 		console.error("\n❌ Reset failed:", error instanceof Error ? error.message : error);
  70 | 		process.exit(1);
  71 | 	} finally {
  72 | 		await sql.end();
  73 | 	}
  74 | }
  75 | 
  76 | resetDatabase();

```

```ts
   3 | export const user = pgTable("user", {
   4 | 	id: text("id").primaryKey(),

  13 | 		.notNull(),

  95 | 	},
```

`schema/clinic.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import {
   2 | 	boolean,
   3 | 	index,
   4 | 	integer,
   5 | 	jsonb,
   6 | 	type PgColumn,
   7 | 	pgEnum,
   8 | 	pgTable,
   9 | 	primaryKey,
  10 | 	real,
  11 | 	serial,
  12 | 	text,
  13 | 	timestamp,
  14 | 	uniqueIndex,
  15 | 	uuid
  16 | } from "drizzle-orm/pg-core";
  17 | 
  18 | import { user } from "./auth";
  19 | 
  20 | // =======================

 210 | 	{

 214 | 		createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { mode: "date" }).notNull().defaultNow(),

 217 | 		address: text("address"),
 218 | 		phone: text("phone"),
 219 | 		isDefault: boolean("is_default").notNull().default(false),
 220 | 		deletedAt: timestamp("deleted_at", { mode: "date" }),
 221 | 		isDeleted: boolean("is_deleted").notNull().default(false)
 222 | 	},
 223 | 	t => [uniqueIndex("clinics_name_unique").on(t.name), index("clinics_is_deleted_idx").on(t.isDeleted)]
 224 | );

 497 | 			.references(() => medicalRecord.id, { onDelete: "cascade" }),

 499 | 		type: text("type"),

 512 | 			.$onUpdate(() => new Date())
 513 | 			.notNull()
 514 | 	},

 980 | export const notification = pgTable("notification", {
 981 | 	id: uuid("id").primaryKey().defaultRandom(),
 982 | 	title: text("title").notNull(),
 983 | 	body: text("body").notNull(),
 984 | 	userId: text("user_id").notNull(),
 985 | 	clinicId: text("clinic_id").notNull(),
 986 | 	status: notificationStatusEnum("status").default("unread").notNull(),
 987 | 	priority: notificationPriorityEnum("priority"),
 988 | 	type: text("type"),
 989 | 	createdAt: timestamp("created_at", { mode: "date" }).defaultNow().notNull(),
 990 | 	updatedAt: timestamp("updated_at", { mode: "date" })
 991 | 		.defaultNow()
 992 | 		.$onUpdate(() => new Date())
 993 | 		.notNull(),
 994 | 	actions: jsonb("actions").$type<NotificationAction[] | null>().default([]),
 995 | 	metadata: jsonb("metadata").$type<Record<string, unknown>>().default({})
 996 | });

```

`schema/index.ts`:

```ts
   1 | export * from "./auth";
   2 | export * from "./clinic";
   3 | export * from "./types";

```

`schema/relations.ts`:

```ts
   1 | import { defineRelations } from "drizzle-orm";
   2 | 
   3 | import * as schema from "../schema";
   4 | 
   5 | export const relations = defineRelations(schema, r => ({
   6 | 	user: {
   7 | 		sessions: r.many.session(),
   8 | 		accounts: r.many.account(),
   9 | 		clinic: r.one.clinic({
  10 | 			from: r.user.clinicId,
  11 | 			to: r.clinic.id
  12 | 		}),
  13 | 		files: r.many.file({
  14 | 			from: r.user.id,
  15 | 			to: r.file.userId
  16 | 		}),
  17 | 		folders: r.many.folder({
  18 | 			from: r.user.id,
  19 | 			to: r.folder.userId
  20 | 		}),
  21 | 		twoFactors: r.many.twoFactor({
  22 | 			from: r.user.id,
  23 | 			to: r.twoFactor.userId
  24 | 		}),
  25 | 		quota: r.one.userQuota({
  26 | 			from: r.user.id,
  27 | 			to: r.userQuota.userId
  28 | 		}),
  29 | 		clinics: r.many.clinicMember({
  30 | 			from: r.user.id,
  31 | 			to: r.clinicMember.userId
  32 | 		}),
  33 | 		doctors: r.many.doctor({
  34 | 			from: r.user.id,
  35 | 			to: r.doctor.userId
  36 | 		}),
  37 | 		staffs: r.many.staff({
  38 | 			from: r.user.id,
  39 | 			to: r.staff.userId
  40 | 		}),
  41 | 		patients: r.many.patient({
  42 | 			from: r.user.id,
  43 | 			to: r.patient.userId,
  44 | 			alias: "PatientUser"
  45 | 		}),
  46 | 		createdPatients: r.many.patient({
  47 | 			from: r.user.id,
  48 | 			to: r.patient.createdById,
  49 | 			alias: "PatientCreatedBy"
  50 | 		}),
  51 | 		guardians: r.many.guardian({
  52 | 			from: r.user.id,
  53 | 			to: r.guardian.userId
  54 | 		}),
  55 | 		createdMedicalRecord: r.many.medicalRecord({
  56 | 			from: r.user.id,
  57 | 			to: r.medicalRecord.doctorId,
  58 | 			alias: "createdBy"
  59 | 		}),
  60 | 		notifications: r.many.notification({
  61 | 			from: r.user.id,
  62 | 			to: r.notification.userId
  63 | 		}),
  64 | 		invitesCreated: r.many.invite({
  65 | 			from: r.user.id,
  66 | 			to: r.invite.createdBy,
  67 | 			alias: "createdBy"
  68 | 		}),
  69 | 		invitesUsed: r.many.invite({
  70 | 			from: r.user.id,
  71 | 			to: r.invite.usedBy,
  72 | 			alias: "usedBy"
  73 | 		}),
  74 | 		twoFactor: r.one.twoFactor({
  75 | 			from: r.user.id,
  76 | 			to: r.twoFactor.userId
  77 | 		}),
  78 | 		clinicMemberships: r.many.clinicMember({
  79 | 			from: r.user.id,
  80 | 			to: r.clinicMember.userId
  81 | 		}),
  82 | 		doctorProfile: r.one.doctor({
  83 | 			from: r.user.id,
  84 | 			to: r.doctor.userId
  85 | 		}),
  86 | 		staffProfile: r.one.staff({
  87 | 			from: r.user.id,
  88 | 			to: r.staff.userId
  89 | 		}),
  90 | 		patientProfile: r.one.patient({
  91 | 			from: r.user.id,
  92 | 			to: r.patient.userId,
  93 | 			alias: "PatientUser"
  94 | 		}),
  95 | 		patientsCreated: r.many.patient({
  96 | 			from: r.user.id,
  97 | 			to: r.patient.createdById,
  98 | 			alias: "PatientCreatedBy"
  99 | 		}),
 100 | 		guardianRelations: r.many.guardian({
 101 | 			from: r.user.id,
 102 | 			to: r.guardian.userId
 103 | 		})
 104 | 	},
 105 | 
 106 | 	// Account relations
 107 | 	accounts: {
 108 | 		user: r.one.user({
 109 | 			from: r.account.userId,
 110 | 			to: r.user.id
 111 | 		})
 112 | 	},
 113 | 
 114 | 	// Session relations
 115 | 	sessions: {
 116 | 		user: r.one.user({
 117 | 			from: r.session.userId,
 118 | 			to: r.user.id
 119 | 		})
 120 | 	},
 121 | 
 122 | 	// Notification relations
 123 | 	notifications: {
 124 | 		user: r.one.user({
 125 | 			from: r.notification.userId,
 126 | 			to: r.user.id
 127 | 		}),
 128 | 		clinic: r.one.clinic({
 129 | 			from: r.notification.clinicId,
 130 | 			to: r.clinic.id
 131 | 		})
 132 | 	},
 133 | 
 134 | 	// Folder relations (self-referential)
 135 | 	folders: {
 136 | 		user: r.one.user({
 137 | 			from: r.folder.userId,
 138 | 			to: r.user.id
 139 | 		}),
 140 | 		parent: r.one.folder({
 141 | 			from: r.folder.parentId,
 142 | 			to: r.folder.id,
 143 | 			alias: "subfolders"
 144 | 		}),
 145 | 		subfolders: r.many.folder({
 146 | 			from: r.folder.id,
 147 | 			to: r.folder.parentId,
 148 | 			alias: "subfolders"
 149 | 		}),
 150 | 		files: r.many.file({
 151 | 			from: r.folder.id,
 152 | 			to: r.file.folderId
 153 | 		})
 154 | 	},
 155 | 
 156 | 	// File relations
 157 | 	files: {
 158 | 		user: r.one.user({
 159 | 			from: r.file.userId,
 160 | 			to: r.user.id
 161 | 		}),
 162 | 		folder: r.one.folder({
 163 | 			from: r.file.folderId,
 164 | 			to: r.folder.id
 165 | 		})
 166 | 	},
 167 | 
 168 | 	// Invite relations
 169 | 	invites: {
 170 | 		user: r.one.user({
 171 | 			from: r.invite.usedBy,
 172 | 			to: r.user.id,
 173 | 			alias: "usedBy"
 174 | 		}),
 175 | 		creator: r.one.user({
 176 | 			from: r.invite.createdBy,
 177 | 			to: r.user.id,
 178 | 			alias: "createdBy"
 179 | 		})
 180 | 	},
 181 | 
 182 | 	// Two-factor relations
 183 | 	twoFactor: {
 184 | 		user: r.one.user({
 185 | 			from: r.twoFactor.userId,
 186 | 			to: r.user.id
 187 | 		})
 188 | 	},
 189 | 
 190 | 	// Clinic relations
 191 | 	clinics: {
 192 | 		doctors: r.many.doctor({
 193 | 			from: r.clinic.id,
 194 | 			to: r.doctor.clinicId
 195 | 		}),
 196 | 		patients: r.many.patient({
 197 | 			from: r.clinic.id,
 198 | 			to: r.patient.clinicId
 199 | 		}),
 200 | 		appointments: r.many.appointment({
 201 | 			from: r.clinic.id,
 202 | 			to: r.appointment.clinicId
 203 | 		}),
 204 | 		userToClinics: r.many.clinicMember({
 205 | 			from: r.clinic.id,
 206 | 			to: r.clinicMember.clinicId,
 207 | 			alias: "clinic"
 208 | 		}),
 209 | 		medicalRecords: r.many.medicalRecord({
 210 | 			from: r.clinic.id,
 211 | 			to: r.medicalRecord.clinicId
 212 | 		}),
 213 | 		clinicSettings: r.many.clinicSetting({
 214 | 			from: r.clinic.id,
 215 | 			to: r.clinicSetting.clinicId
 216 | 		}),
 217 | 		prescriptions: r.many.prescription({
 218 | 			from: r.clinic.id,
 219 | 			to: r.prescription.clinicId
 220 | 		}),
 221 | 		payments: r.many.payment({
 222 | 			from: r.clinic.id,
 223 | 			to: r.payment.clinicId
 224 | 		}),
 225 | 		encounters: r.many.diagnosis({
 226 | 			from: r.clinic.id,
 227 | 			to: r.diagnosis.clinicId
 228 | 		}),
 229 | 		services: r.many.service({
 230 | 			from: r.clinic.id,
 231 | 			to: r.service.clinicId
 232 | 		}),
 233 | 		staffs: r.many.staff({
 234 | 			from: r.clinic.id,
 235 | 			to: r.staff.clinicId
 236 | 		}),
 237 | 		clinicNotifications: r.many.notification({
 238 | 			from: r.clinic.id,
 239 | 			to: r.notification.clinicId
 240 | 		}),

```

`schema/types.ts`:

```ts
   1 | // db/types.ts
   2 | import type { InferInsertModel, InferSelectModel } from "drizzle-orm";
   3 | 
   4 | import type { account, session, twoFactor, user, verification } from "./auth";
   5 | import type {
   6 |   actionTypeEnum,
   7 |   adverseEvent,
   8 |   aiReport,

  10 |   appointment,
```
